Friend,

We can't leave this entire election up to our grassroots momentum. We can't just HOPE that people are riled up on Election Day and go out to vote.

name: Rick Scott, me (2)
subject: We are blessed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
I’ve been extremely blessed to live in the greatest country in the world.

Only in America can a little boy in public housing grow up to be a United States Senator.

That’s why I’m giving my all in this race to take back our Republican Senate majority and defend the American Dream.

_But I’m not going to lie, it’s going to be an uphill battle._

Out of state billionaires are determined to turn us into the next failed blue state, and I need your help to make sure they don’t get away with it.

Peter,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**_With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought._

ALWAYS.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.

Does that surprise you?**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. | | Peter, We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan. We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought. ALWAYS. Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve. And the Democrats? They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on. Does that surprise you? I am in Washington to fight for YOU. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, this fight has put a HUGE target on my back , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, . I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of liberties. That said, I need your support today– because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington. As a personal favor to me, Make no mistake, Peter - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia. I’m proud to stand with you in defense of liberty. God Bless, Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Dr. Brian Williams (personal)
subject: I've been a pretty introverted person for most of my life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter, I've been a pretty introverted person for most of my life.

Growing up, I always felt a call to serve. Seeing my father serve his country, joining the Air Force, and serving my community as a surgeon — creating change and uplifting the people in my community became my purpose. But, as my wife can tell you, I was always content to help behind the scenes.

Running for office was _never_ in the cards. But all around me, I saw crisis after crisis.

I spent so much time treating gun violence victims, who were mostly young Black men, and nothing was changing. I watched patient after patient suffer because they couldn't afford care. As a Veteran, I saw my fellow Veterans struggling to re-enter civilian life after their service. As a father, I knew there was work left so my daughter could grow up in a world where she could thrive

I was always taught that in times of crisis, we need people who are willing to stand up and find solutions. I realized that to make the change I wished to see in the world, I had to take a stand.

Running for Congress _isn't_ a step in my career. It’s the continuation of something I’ve been doing my entire life — answering the call to serve my community and my family in the best way I can.

Ahead of tonight’s crucial fundraising deadline, I’m asking: Will you make a donation of $5 or more to ensure we can hit our $75,000 end-of-month goal? You can use this link my team made >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brian-williams-january-2024**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78163432/452578492/-1417367329?refcode=em24_240131_EOM7PM_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240131_EOM7PM_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=13a3dcef-94c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTNhM2RjZWYtOTRjMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iQDT0sB8E7tJgqpFNJb4Ydj_JnNKl7PoJAHP7Wp7fhE=)

Brian

| Peter,

In the past year, I’ve worked to make sure my time in Congress is spent wisely.

I currently have three voting rights bills in committee aimed at protecting our voting rights and defending our democracy.

As a member of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force, I’m working across the aisle to pass lifesaving gun violence prevention legislation.

And every day, I’m working to protect reproductive freedom and ensure safe, legal, and accessible abortion services for all.

This year will be no different. And as I work to advance much-needed legislation for North Carolina families, I will also be working to take back the House this November.**We can’t slow down our momentum in the face of Republican attacks on our fundamental rights.[_Ahead of our first major deadline of the year tonight, will you join my efforts to stop Republican extremism and take back the House in November?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78163497/452579383/2125913804?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2024-01-31_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDJkZTYwZi05NWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0An_Z-I4Gr01fCzvWlNemtjksuxkVIDF5fx1t3EyfxQ=)**

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Our membership deadline is midnight, Peter -- please, renew your membership -- it's just $5!
body:
For a limited time, your support goes three times as far.

MEMBERSHIP DRIVE 2024
TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE

Peter - we're following up as part of our annual Membership Drive.

Your membership matters. https://links.messages.lcv. LCV's annual Membership Drive determines the resources we have, and how hard we can fight for our environment and democracy, throughout the year. That's why it's so important that we hear from you.

Your support is critical right now. House Republicans led by "MAGA Mike" Johnson are conspiring to shut down important parts of the federal government in order to force through new oil and gas drilling on public lands, among other attacks on our environment and communities. Their proposals would gut clean energy investments and end almost all attempts to address environmental injustice. They would slash EPA's enforcement and public health protections, which would lead to dirtier air and water.

Our movement is what's stopping polluters and fossil fuel companies from getting their way - but we need more resources to keep our campaigns going in this critical election year.

The best thing you can do right now is to help fund our hard-hitting environmental campaigns. Renew your LCV membership today. For a limited time, every contribution will be TRIPLE MATCHED. Even $5 can make a difference >> https://links.messages.lcv.

---
League of Conservation Voters
2024 Membership Drive

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE https://links.messages.lcv.

Deadline: 11:59 pm, January 31, 2024
Fundraising Goal: $50,000

Member Status: Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.
---

Right now, we're fighting on multiple fronts for healthier communities and a better future for our planet. We can't afford to lose ANY of these fights. Here are just a few reasons to support LCV's work for the environment this year:
- Because MAGA Republicans are pushing even harder to slash clean energy investments, zero out funding for environmental justice, cut clean air and water enforcement, and mandate more dirty drilling leases. LCV is organizing quickly to mobilize grassroots pressure on Congress to reject reckless anti-environment proposals. But at the end of the day, the impact we can have will depend on our members. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_
- Because anti-environment legislators are trying to stop important protections for the Arctic. Republicans' extreme legislation would put the Arctic at risk of more oil and gas drilling and threaten species like caribou. The environmental movement CANNOT sit this fight out. We need you, Peter. https://links.messages.lcv.
- Because LCV is campaigning hard for the Biden administration to propose new protections that reduce pollution and promote healthy communities. We have a real chance to pressure the White House to go big for the sake of our climate and our health. Your support makes that happen. Renew your membership today >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_
- Because a group of donors is triple-matching every contribution this month. Bottom line, your contribution goes further to win environmental progress if you give now. Triple your impact now >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/qjPNc8Rx-

It's important that we hear from you, Peter. Please, renew your LCV membership for just $5 today while it will be triple matched >> https://links.messages.lcv.

Onward,

LCV Membership Team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10537904&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDY0MDM0MQS2&spReportId=MTkwMDY0MDM0MQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10537904&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDY0MDM0MQS2&spReportId=MTkwMDY0MDM0MQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683
https://links.messages.lcv.

name: Jasmine Smith
subject: I want to talk to you personally about why this matters so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78163957/452583345/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1415-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmZTYwNGEzLTk1YzAtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QUZbbUx0It0eayfPRxRyyQIrTzhMvNypxw0G3n1vIU=)
---
Peter,

We have just hours left before our first big fundraising deadline of the year, and we're still falling short of the goal we set to secure 1000 new Emerge Members for 2024. **[I'm asking you here and now to please donate $25 to activate your membership, but I also want to talk about why Emerge is so immensely important this year.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78163958/452583346/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk1415-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmZTYwNGEzLTk1YzAtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QUZbbUx0It0eayfPRxRyyQIrTzhMvNypxw0G3n1vIU=)**
Across the country, we continue to see a rise in right-wing conspiracy theories that existed before Donald Trump and has festered since he was booted from the White House. They've banned abortion. They've attacked marginalized communities. They've censored books. They've threatened our very democracy.
**But Emerge alums are fighting back.****Emerge alums are working to restore abortion rights in a post-Roe world.****Emerge candidates are the rising generation of the Democratic Party that will counter and defeat extremism and win. **
And with MAGA leader Donald Trump poised to clinch the Republican nomination for president, Emerge's ability to recruit, train, and elect more Democratic women is more important than ever. **We can stand up to Trump and all MAGA Republicans by getting more than 500 Emerge candidates on the ballot this year!**
But that sort of work simply isn't possible without grassroots resources, which is why I'm reaching out once again before the deadline. **Please, Peter, this is the last and final call:[Will you donate $25 to become a 2024 Emerge Member – we still need just a handful of donors before the deadline – and help empower more Democratic women to run for office?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78163959/452583347/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk1415-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmZTYwNGEzLTk1YzAtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QUZbbUx0It0eayfPRxRyyQIrTzhMvNypxw0G3n1vIU=)**
Thank you,

Jasmine Smith
Development Manager
Emerge
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ZShko813aE2PbaayjFt-qw2?unsubscribedata=KFf5SMw7XqbiF789QF8Ayz1zpqooPmRl%2BSmM%2B11z4ZTUtcRT1aeIO8wQZpy8BzOq%2BRxxssYXuDkOd3RGQKIUiVipDDyDNvTwzA4TlNptzCBTdQXkLlDhy1qDApGFUchn8KP96ro93791Ofqjw2v5Yg2CmhKgV5S4hT49S70R49%2FIsrFoLLhSDrrsiqao60YimKShQCbl496mDG%2BHKo1OEdZQ%2B5PJNqxJmWL5nLm63axEWtzg9vDY1qewWSATW34RklatZpIrEMQBr4qAGCDWHckZR7aofSv0B30rD9WvhG7eYtLxs5gF3Joj4b1RTT%2BWRFoGbATyNqL1zblGXsa5ZFpLViza33dAj8jxVm7hcdNReSg%2By9CA%2F9%2FmpLcET6qRHAlscl21dpMVOwvje7ctzvFQSVyVQQCGUdUh66a9CNc%3D) off all our lists instantly. Questions or concerns? [Contact us here.](mailto:connect@emergeamerica.org) Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
4 Embarcadero Center
Suite 1400
San Francisco, CA 94111
United States |

Please, Peter, this is the last and final call:= Thank you, Jasmine Smith Development Manager Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to off all our lists instantly. Questions or concerns? mailto:connect@emergeamerica.org Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States |

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I know I must use my voice, Peter.
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78164015/452583469/296097457?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240131_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWU2MDRhMy05NWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfCDUc0aFrSKJ7gBShc5bca6dVrci9Ch0rMfJDj8rbc=) Aloha Peter, As the first Asian American woman elected to the Senate — and the only immigrant currently serving in the chamber — I know how important it is to speak out against injustice. **Before I explain more below, can you add a donation before tonights’s end-of-month fundraising deadline?** **Here’s a personal link to give:****[secure.actblue.com/donate/mkh-em-jan24&supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78164016/452583470/296097457?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240131_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWU2MDRhMy05NWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfCDUc0aFrSKJ7gBShc5bca6dVrci9Ch0rMfJDj8rbc=)** For most of my career, I engaged in this work stolidly and without much fuss. In the cultures I was raised in, we were not rewarded for speaking up, or speaking out. So I focused on doing the work, and letting the work speak for itself. This led many to say, when I began speaking out about the awful actions by the Trump Administration, and the awful behavior by Trump himself, that I had “found my voice.” **This could not be further from the truth. I chose to use my voice.** I couldn’t stand by while the Trump administration ripped children out of the arms of their parents, incited white supremacists, and packed the nation’s courts with demagogues who would later overturn _Roe v. Wade_. His bullying behavior, and his interest in tearing our country apart by our differences, instead of investing in the diversity that makes us stronger, had to be called out. This interest in exposing our differences was never limited to Donald Trump. This is the GOP’s agenda. It was there in the way they embraced calling COVID-19 “the China virus,” it was there when they spoke out against President Biden’s intention to nominate a Black woman to the Supreme Court, and it is still there now, as Republican legislatures across the country ban books that tell diverse, welcoming stories for minority and LGBTQ+ communities. **As long as Republicans — whether in the House, the Senate, or the supermajority of right wing ideologues on the Supreme Court — continue to try to tear us apart, I will continue to speak out bluntly about the danger they pose to women, the LGTBQ+ community, immigrants, and other vulnerable groups.** [**Peter, my work has always been powered by grassroots supporters like you, and I wouldn’t have it any other way. If you’re able today, please chip in $10 or any amount to help us reach our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year before tonight’s 11:59 PM cutoff and keep me fighting in the U.S. Senate for our working families, our freedoms, and our future. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78164017/452583471/296097457?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240131_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWU2MDRhMy05NWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfCDUc0aFrSKJ7gBShc5bca6dVrci9Ch0rMfJDj8rbc=) | | | ****[Chip in $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78164018/452583472/296097457?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240131_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWU2MDRhMy05NWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfCDUc0aFrSKJ7gBShc5bca6dVrci9Ch0rMfJDj8rbc=)****

Mazie

You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=Hhe6yUWFhculpRWNXLCtXM8YyOD0hIJJWplqstK6NJc0VRYcAyw8JNNTWjbp8DKPQjoY2FY3tbGcABMYbFGeXaP%2F67hZvD63ToIlJYD5pKONf6nLRN8qczhxfTSG%2BC0RE6W7locRui6aAqiU76k9S14u5DBVEb0UWHn4S4m3Wy0wiqfv3rrbqxSVWDahKyo%2BP2jWUn2HgXiCq6teROtnj5aw8XmwlQMcVpy%2FnG21UrYbSPcw2ONXM1Y737boK1WAFyLjiw6DE7Po4z3z2JS7UblV2iqpBSBJG0CzkyAivPBa3bcWxLbqGuSl62NzkrS4XGTvlVoF7Zim09HRpMgaI0XNJy2tVQZTVYSXsuu9NkR1XHreCd5JyDK8bFv6lWj9PotiQ4DO6y6H7E8rjA%2FxB2V%2F7s%2F%2BkqNEpXsRThMHyS3RYhic7vefXENB1JW6my1k .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em&amount=5]
Peter, I know your inbox is probably flooded with messages like this right now — so I’ll keep this brief.
Our very first monthly fundraising deadline of the year is in just six hours.
But Olac, my finance director, just told me that as of 4:00 pm, we’re still coming up $1,400 short of our can’t-miss goal.
Let me be clear, Peter: We can’t afford to fall short right now.
Ted Cruz is banking on his mega donors and special interest backers to buy him another term in the Senate.
And if he sees that we missed our first big test of the election year, he’ll take it as a sign that he has this race locked up.
I know we have what it takes to win — but we need to stand together at pivotal moments like this.
So please, Peter, if you can spare $10, $15, or $25 before midnight, I’d be so grateful. You can chip in at the secure link below:
secure.actblue.com/donate/roland-january-deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Thank you,
Roland

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Claim your match here | Fellow Patriot, We know that Kat reached out to you about our January End-of-Month fundraising deadline... But, what she didn’t tell you, however, is that thanks to the generosity of an anonymous donor, FOR THE NEXT 7 MINUTES, ALL DONATIONS WILL BE 300% MATCHED! Take advantage of this generous matching offer and let’s keep the Democrats out of Florida! | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Cammack Finance Team | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Cammack Finance Team 5200 NW 43rd St, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- =

body:
Can you spare just 30 seconds?

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78164222/452586963/-1494636936?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.01.31_b2_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjgwYTNlNC05NmMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcj0C2cMXt0KS_RyT9eWy3AM3RwYs8SKLxGvjbwWrLo=)

Friend, it’s Greg. This email is just a few sentences long, so I’d be grateful if you could spare just 30 seconds to hear me out tonight.

This team’s first monthly fundraising deadline of 2024 is just **5 hours away.**

_But I just got word from my finance director that we’re still**$893 short.**_

I won’t lie to you: It’s important that we close this gap before midnight.

I remember what it was like in 2022, when Big Money special interests spent every penny they could to keep this seat red.

**And I remember what it was like when we won anyway – _thanks to grassroots supporters like you who chipped in whatever they could to help us fight back._**

I know we can pull off a win like that again — but I need you with me.

**[That’s why I’m asking you personally to rush in $5, $10, $15 — anything you can spare — to help close the gap before time runs out. Please, this is your last chance to become a 2024 Founding Donor before our deadline expires. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78164224/452586964/129931077?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.01.31_b2_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjgwYTNlNC05NmMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcj0C2cMXt0KS_RyT9eWy3AM3RwYs8SKLxGvjbwWrLo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78164226/452586966/-1494636936?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2024.01.31_b2_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjgwYTNlNC05NmMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcj0C2cMXt0KS_RyT9eWy3AM3RwYs8SKLxGvjbwWrLo=)

body:
# [#]
Team-

I just met with my finance team and we need to raise just $1,352 to close our fundraising gap for January!

If you’re able to help us get across the finish line, please use this link to rush a donation before tonight at midnight:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zoe-january-24?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zoe-january-24?amount=10]

I’m raising funds to support the Democrats whose races will determine control of the House - many of them right here in California. That’s why it is so important that we don’t fall behind on a single fundraising deadline.

Control of the House may very well be decided by the people of California. So, let’s get to work to ensure that come November the GOP is out of power.

Use this secure link to chip in $10 or whatever you can:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zoe-january-24?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zoe-january-24?amount=10]

Thank you for all that you do,

Zoe

As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:

Our first end-of-month deadline of 2024 is at midnight, so I'll get right
to the point.

Extreme MAGA Republicans are actively trying to derail the progress we’ve
made. Whether it’s abortion rights, access to health care, or the right to

body:

| | Patriot,

---
On January 20, 2025, I will place my hand upon the Bible and take the Oath of Office as I am inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States.
---
I will thank God for granting us the strength to prevail against the most vicious witch hunts ever conceived.
---

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Quick note before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is our opportunity to set the tone for the rest of the year
#

Hi there, we know it’s getting late, so we’ll keep this quick. But we needed to reach out one last time before our January fundraising drive ends at midnight.
[**If you’re ready to be one of the top supporters we need to make a contribution and push us over the top, please make a contribution here:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240131-2-15&t=1&akid=7585%2E3935704%2EUNOhAm)
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240131-2-15&t=2&akid=7585%2E3935704%2EUNOhAm)**
This is our first fundraising deadline of the year, which means this is our opportunity to set the tone for the rest of 2024. With our slim Senate majority, the White House, and a chance to take back the House all on the line this year, there’s no room for us to fall short.
[**So please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our January fundraising deadline passes in just a few hours.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240131-2-15&t=3&akid=7585%2E3935704%2EUNOhAm)
Thank you for helping us cross the finish line.
\- The team at GIFFORDS PAC
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240131-2-15&t=4&akid=7585%2E3935704%2EUNOhAm)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=7585%2E3935704%2EUNOhAm) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Because of our work together, Minnesota is setting a national example of progress. But everything we’ve accomplished will be in jeopardy if we fail to hold the line up and down the ballot this November.
Donald Trump, who said he’d be a “dictator” on “day one,” is sailing to the Republican nomination, and his local allies are already on offense, spending money in competitive districts across the state and lying about what our DFL majorities have accomplished for Minnesota families.
I believe with all my heart that Americans will rise above the politics of fear and division and reject Trumpism up and down the ballot this November. But it won’t happen on its own.
To keep Trump out of the White House and the MAGA agenda out of Minnesota, we’re going to need to fight with everything we’ve got between now and November, and that starts with reaching our first fundraising goal of the year tonight.
[**Peter, with hours to go, I’m counting on you. name: Eric Sorensen (personal)
subject: reaching out directly before Midnight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
Glad I caught you tonight.

| | Glad I caught you tonight, Peter. I’m reaching out one last time before January comes to a close to let you know that we’re still just short of our first monthly fundraising target for the election year. I know my team and I have been in touch quite a bit lately, but I wouldn’t be doing right by my team or our supporters if I didn’t send one last email to try and hit our goal. Will you chip in a last-minute contribution to help us meet our goal? Your donation could be the one that puts us over the top. Here’s the link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q1-2024?refcode= dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/OzpbvASNrFQ5oH2q25eu2g~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnnWsvP0RFaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXExLTIwMjQ_cmVmY29kZT1lbS0xLjMxLjI0LWFsbC1hVwNzcGNCCmW6Mua6ZYElMVVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAb) This first full year in Washington has been a whirlwind, and it's been a lifelong dream to represent my hometown and all of Central & Northwestern Illinois in Congress. Last election, plenty of people wrote us off, but together we kept this seat blue by a razor-thin margin. This year’s race is likely going to be close, and national Republicans have already named me one of their top targets. I’m laser-focused on my work in Congress – delivering for IL-17 and being the representative that my constituents deserve and can trust. At the same time, we need to fend off whatever attacks the far-right throws. Before tonight's deadline hits, please add a donation of $5 or more to help us get over the hump. Here's the link again: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q1-2024?refcode= dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/OzpbvASNrFQ5oH2q25eu2g~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnnWsvP0RFaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXExLTIwMjQ_cmVmY29kZT1lbS0xLjMxLjI0LWFsbC1hVwNzcGNCCmW6Mua6ZYElMVVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAb) Thank you, \- Eric

**Fellow Conservative,**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
Colin Allred just announced a MASSIVE $15 million fundraising haul, and he is within two points of our campaign in the polls.
Peter - This is a crisis.

The election year could not have gotten started on a more concerning note. Colin Allred, challenging me for the U.S. Senate, raised $15 million last quarter. That is a considerable number and only part of what he’s raised. All the dark money groups in D.C. are chomping at the bit to cut massive checks to my Democrat opponent.

Here’s the bad news: **_all the money flooding Texas is working._**

[**A new poll shows only a margin of error difference between us!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f510fb77fa4f40f789aa45a3e9607374&_e=jfp383W15NfD2kPyuCaGmfNY3XfXqn4IWYOkN8N9gz1qlzZbljcTMpy-VxsMH90pombs0Ml2vUqH1Oq5BQxUAc2GdrKWN6jHOOgBlcka4Ds6JGMiOA03a_P2qTGDu6U97T3Cjq4V-Eb6SiW24sMBmeddfrI4wDjZE6i4JlitJN9TEIX2GMn30VIsDImHyVrWypn4rEWYzSA1sZo6LGEOBzkk687qxUS3gwArmqiWT85km7qCvHpePek4xkKUCA085Wgy1jzjqy5rm0WqtZoehdieLj9DFRJg732SbDxKJGfuap3xTiEz1l8EieEY5HzbM8FgpedAfUAOfqtr3JMcy7q0q_FZHZ6kQG8SXh7LQm4_raT5xSf37NncPyWBUTIcAd6-IVfMMGDtO_Mt09YcIjm2SPNicMlMEj-fGdlTWAM%3D) We will be neck and neck to the finish line; every dollar will make a significant difference in the race.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f510fb77fa4f40f789aa45a3e9607374&_e=jfp383W15NfD2kPyuCaGmfNY3XfXqn4IWYOkN8N9gz1qlzZbljcTMpy-VxsMH90pombs0Ml2vUqH1Oq5BQxUAc2GdrKWN6jHOOgBlcka4Ds6JGMiOA03a_P2qTGDu6U97T3Cjq4V-Eb6SiW24sMBmeddfrI4wDjZE6i4JlitJN9TEIX2GMn30VIsDImHyVrWypn4rEWYzSA1sZo6LGEOBzkk687qxUS3gwArmqiWT85km7qCvHpePek4xkKUCA085Wgy1jzjqy5rm0WqtZoehQVY9D1nLLgmNZ8D1fzxvlSjmYoIjOXB2hjOX6u2UjyxfDUwMTRMeKv3uXqTUTOqnMKNviHQUbMWQ9WVTCZYtJfn7xi_vW5Sx5MeuTxbl5gTuJ8kWNyOfGHv1BdP-MweSmgdjFL4IyGcLPPZOQU1aBQ%3D)
[**I need your help to take on my opponent, who is a mouthpiece for the liberal agenda and Joe Biden’s failed policies.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f510fb77fa4f40f789aa45a3e9607374&_e=jfp383W15NfD2kPyuCaGmfNY3XfXqn4IWYOkN8N9gz1qlzZbljcTMpy-VxsMH90pombs0Ml2vUqH1Oq5BQxUAc2GdrKWN6jHOOgBlcka4Ds6JGMiOA03a_P2qTGDu6U97T3Cjq4V-Eb6SiW24sMBmeddfrI4wDjZE6i4JlitJN9TEIX2GMn30VIsDImHyVrWypn4rEWYzSA1sZo6LGEOBzkk687qxUS3gwArmqiWT85km7qCvHpePek4xkKUCA085Wgy1jzjqy5rm0WqtZoehaGy-ftpQEbXbZDKn0SGru8Grxo9BWe6tRrrm6VRAjT7KBJq3iIIjV-xUUxDIeNdh17FOOrCfLtn0QHPbg8RrJsYDHJhcAx-OTaYpj59hwfceyuqU4AdsGvp96_b0CutVG9MNJazZo3qc1dc8tPoQJg%3D) We can’t let a sycophant like Colin Allred represent Texas in the United States Senate.

**But it’s not just Texans that should be concerned.** We are fighting to take back the Majority, and we need to HOLD this seat to make that dream a reality! If we lose this seat, it would be a disaster for our plans to take back the Majority.

[**So please pitch in your most generous gift today to my re-election campaign and Senate Republicans across the country. Your gift will directly fund our strategy to WIN in November.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f510fb77fa4f40f789aa45a3e9607374&_e=jfp383W15NfD2kPyuCaGmfNY3XfXqn4IWYOkN8N9gz1qlzZbljcTMpy-VxsMH90pombs0Ml2vUqH1Oq5BQxUAc2GdrKWN6jHOOgBlcka4Ds6JGMiOA03a_P2qTGDu6U97T3Cjq4V-Eb6SiW24sMBmeddfrI4wDjZE6i4JlitJN9TEIX2GMn30VIsDImHyVrWypn4rEWYzSA1sZo6LGEOBzkk687qxUS3gwArmqiWT85km7qCvHpePek4xkKUCA085Wgy1jzjqy5rm0WqtZoehc_Ck1Lg-BguNKEE5jPC4hACLka0WpE3O6KNZZxdr3eqjK0OBoLwvhdCfGBDA6SwYKyITKaQZUBIAVyow-jkRZkgkRa0WemV5etycSxuy6eiLsQ8U_etlx94Hay8pdN6JELzej0oWkKhDYY2A1pXCWw%3D)

[**WATCH MY FOX NEWS INTERVIEW**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f510fb77fa4f40f789aa45a3e9607374&_e=jfp383W15NfD2kPyuCaGmfNY3XfXqn4IWYOkN8N9gz1qlzZbljcTMpy-VxsMH90pombs0Ml2vUqH1Oq5BQxUAc2GdrKWN6jHOOgBlcka4Ds6JGMiOA03a_P2qTGDu6U97T3Cjq4V-Eb6SiW24sMBmeddfrI4wDjZE6i4JlitJN9TEIX2GMn30VIsDImHyVrWypn4rEWYzSA1sZo6LGEOBzkk687qxUS3gwArmqiWT85km7qCvHpePek4xkKUCA085Wgy1jzjqy5rm0WqtZoehQly4DHdkQAJkZP-rvrcCVyU9qflK3LUjlSRJb4YB3c0LFlrOZAEY3ry58k1KBk1zJOIqszQv_tMJUGiE-yUh8och9_9l7-XWoQOPdQsNa8zWqMGxnpdqflSzYxIg6HPqSeuDD_FPdh0M6uURQBH55s%3D)
This race is going to be a hard-fought battle to the finish. Pundits and politicians will try to predict who is in the lead, and pollsters will charge money to tell us more of what we already know: it will come down to the wire.

We can’t fall behind in the fundraising race this early. That would mean disaster for our campaign come this fall. Collin Allred will flood the airwaves with his message that I am wrong for Texas, and he is our future. He will attack my family and my values and tear down my record of accomplishment in the U.S. Senate.

But we will win if we fight back, spreading the truth to voters about my family, voting record, and principled beliefs. But that will get very expensive. Advertisements are always costly, but as the election grows nearer, the TV and radio stations hike their rates WAY up.

And that is precisely when we will NEED to be up on the air spreading our positive message and countering sneaky attacks from Allred and his D.C. dark money allies. So we’ve got to have our fundraising to strike back hard and fast and spread the truth.

[**That’s why I’m asking for your most generous contribution to my re-election campaign today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f510fb77fa4f40f789aa45a3e9607374&_e=jfp383W15NfD2kPyuCaGmfNY3XfXqn4IWYOkN8N9gz1qlzZbljcTMpy-VxsMH90pombs0Ml2vUqH1Oq5BQxUAc2GdrKWN6jHOOgBlcka4Ds6JGMiOA03a_P2qTGDu6U97T3Cjq4V-Eb6SiW24sMBmeddfrI4wDjZE6i4JlitJN9TEIX2GMn30VIsDImHyVrWypn4rEWYzSA1sZo6LGEOBzkk687qxUS3gwArmqiWT85km7qCvHpePek4xkKUCA085Wgy1jzjqy5rm0WqtZoehaMNeEXo3Kd7Ga7_kS2NCnLXX8VoxZ7rg4W-PggYw5Rw3fLFaIzfr7fhalXwJWQGNMVHfaS7u4NfmeUQ2qrmBROLHqkRAunSLDHuYKZB9dVHvI2IlTNW1ejiwMqJh0Ck003ioXXBfKmRquE_zBQHhFo%3D) _We will win this thing if we keep our foot on the gas._

clean_body: Colin Allred just announced a MASSIVE $15 million fundraising haul, and he is within two points of our campaign in the polls. Peter - This is a crisis. The election year could not have gotten started on a more concerning note. Colin Allred, challenging me for the U.S. Senate, raised $15 million last quarter. That is a considerable number and only part of what he’s raised. All the dark money groups in D.C. are chomping at the bit to cut massive checks to my Democrat opponent. Here’s the bad news: all the money flooding Texas is working. We will be neck and neck to the finish line; every dollar will make a significant difference in the race. We can’t let a sycophant like Colin Allred represent Texas in the United States Senate. But it’s not just Texans that should be concerned. We are fighting to take back the Majority, and we need to HOLD this seat to make that dream a reality! If we lose this seat, it would be a disaster for our plans to take back the Majority. This race is going to be a hard-fought battle to the finish. Pundits and politicians will try to predict who is in the lead, and pollsters will charge money to tell us more of what we already know: it will come down to the wire. We can’t fall behind in the fundraising race this early. That would mean disaster for our campaign come this fall. Collin Allred will flood the airwaves with his message that I am wrong for Texas, and he is our future. He will attack my family and my values and tear down my record of accomplishment in the U.S. Senate. But we will win if we fight back, spreading the truth to voters about my family, voting record, and principled beliefs. But that will get very expensive. Advertisements are always costly, but as the election grows nearer, the TV and radio stations hike their rates WAY up. And that is precisely when we will NEED to be up on the air spreading our positive message and countering sneaky attacks from Allred and his D.C. dark money allies. So we’ve got to have our fundraising to strike back hard and fast and spread the truth. We will win this thing if we keep our foot on the gas. I appreciate your support, Ted Cruz If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. | Peter,

In 2016, I ran for Commissioner of Public Lands because I was determined to do my part to keep Washington State – the Evergreen state – evergreen. Despite being patronized and told to "wait my turn," I knew that in the face of climate change, we didn't have time to wait – _**we needed EPIC progress at EPIC speed.**_

Together, we broke barriers, bringing innovative solutions that transformed the Department of Natural Resources and Washington State into a national standard for wildfire response and mitigation.

In just six years, we've restored over 600,000 acres of forestlands, prevented millions of acres from burning, and conserved nearly 200,000 acres from development – creating good-paying jobs, investing in new technologies, and supporting our rural economy along the way.

Now, as catastrophic climate events become more frequent and our housing crisis deepens, our nation needs the same innovative solutions we've successfully brought to Washington. That's why I'm running for the 6th Congressional District.

[_**Early fundraising is critical to building the team we need to reach every voter in Washington's 6th Congressional District. With my first end-of-month deadline at midnight, can I count on you to join me by contributing $5 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78164965/452596367/-1503679382?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-01-31_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY1Y2NjNDYtOTljMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nqZx8girm88BszuFQNcWrTd4lN8av4HLYrpmsUSw_LQ=)

name: Letitia James
subject: How did this happen, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
---
Peter, I don't even know what happened here.
A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community of supporters with an exciting update: **We were just $7,341 away from hitting my massive $25,000 end-of-month fundraising goal!**
From the moment I announced this massive public deadline I was facing, grassroots supporters rushed to help my fight for justice and accountability. We were making up ground incredibly fast, and I was truly touched by the amount of people who were putting their hard-earned money toward my work.

**But then, ****out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to go from what was a strong position to now not even potentially hitting this goal.**
I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short, but I _refuse _to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the $7,341 gap before my MIDNIGHT deadline.**
**Peter******,** I’m counting on **_you_ to be one of the grassroots donors I need, so please: [**Will you donate any amount 11:59 p.m. tonight? I can't show any sign of weakness so early in the year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78165126/452598195/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1317-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ0MjdjZS05OWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0BU1AoFNLXha3iyKeb7Hrnmsz7aZ1FHDeqqSSl7k9z4=)

Thank you.

Letitia

Peter, I'm not afraid to make enemies. From the moment I became New York's attorney general in 2019, I got to work holding the wealthy, corrupt, and manipulative accountable. I went after Big Pharma, Big Polluters, gun rights activists, landlords – and now, I'm holding one of the most powerful and corrupt men in the nation accountable.
But to be honest, my corrupt (and well-funded) enemies are looking to find any weaknesses they're able to. They're going to want a fight, and I need to show that I have a powerful team standing with me. That's where you come in, Peter.
**I'm counting on dedicated supporters like you to help us hit our goal and show up strong for my first major deadline of the year. I _know_ that this team is powerful enough to do it, and missing this deadline is simply _not_ an option. So please:**
**[Can you donate $5 right now so that we can meet our $25,000 goal? My deadline is 11:59 p.m. on Jan. 31 and we still have a lot of ground to make up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78165136/452598207/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1317-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ0MjdjZS05OWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0BU1AoFNLXha3iyKeb7Hrnmsz7aZ1FHDeqqSSl7k9z4=)**

clean_body: Peter, I don't even know what happened here. A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community of supporters with an exciting update: We were just $7,341 away from hitting my massive $25,000 end-of-month fundraising goal! From the moment I announced this massive public deadline I was facing, grassroots supporters rushed to help my fight for justice and accountability. We were making up ground incredibly fast, and I was truly touched by the amount of people who were putting their hard-earned money toward my work. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to go from what was a strong position to now not even potentially hitting this goal. I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short, but I refuse to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the $7,341 gap before my MIDNIGHT deadline. Peter**, I’m counting on you to be one of the grassroots donors I need, so please: = | | = Thank you. | [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61253?t=6&akid=12774%2E878179%2EUDXhbz) Team, at this critical juncture for our nation, President Biden needs to know Democrats like you are by his side!

**You’ve been personally selected to sign our letter standing with Biden and thanking him for his incredible work for the American people:** [**SIGN BEFORE YOUR SPOT CLOSES AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61253?t=7&akid=12774%2E878179%2EUDXhbz) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61253?t=8&akid=12774%2E878179%2EUDXhbz)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,

_I’m so proud to stand with you in this critical Election Year._**

Over the last three years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**Trump and his MAGA minions will do ANYTHING to defeat you — and if we don’t stop them, they’ll seize the White House in an instant!**

So today, I’m recommitting to the fight to elect amazing Democrats like you and doing my part to save our democracy from dangerous MAGA extremists.

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and support »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61253?t=9&akid=12774%2E878179%2EUDXhbz) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61254?t=10&akid=12774%2E878179%2EUDXhbz)
---
**_X A PROUD DEMOCRAT_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12774%2E878179%2EUDXhbz). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12774%2E878179%2EUDXhbz).**

name: Laura (personal)
subject: Before I sign off…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| Glad I caught you, friend.

I know you’ve heard from me and my team quite a bit over the past couple of days. The honest truth is that midnight tonight marks an important fundraising deadline as we close in on March 5.

As it stands, we're a little short of our 1,000 individual donor goal to make sure we have the resources to contact every undecided voter before they receive their ballots.

We’re roughly 57 donors short. If you can, please chip in $3 to help us close the gap: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q1-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78165182/452600239/-1710610234?refcode=em-1.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk5MWQ4M2ItOWFjMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KWR8KRr8Nf--HlB7MfgaVCHeI1SkYTU_SIuUXvZYJZ8=)**

I'll admit it, my least favorite part about campaigning for Congress is fundraising. I also don't believe for a second that money will be the most important factor in determining who wins this race.

But the fact is this is one of the most crowded primaries in the entire state. With so many competing voices in the field, we have to work harder to reach voters.

Every dollar translates into more ads deployed and more mail pieces sent out. But more importantly, your donation sends an important message that CA-30 is ready for home-grown, progressive change in Washington.

I’d appreciate anything you can give before January comes to a close. Here’s the link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q1-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78165184/452600240/-1710610234?refcode=em-1.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk5MWQ4M2ItOWFjMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KWR8KRr8Nf--HlB7MfgaVCHeI1SkYTU_SIuUXvZYJZ8=)**

Thank you,

Laura

clean_body: | Friend, We are less than a year away from election day. Democrats surpassed every fundraising goal this past year. We are up against a well-oiled machine. Thanks to Team Wild, I won one of the closest House races in 2022, and Democratic experts are already forecasting an even tighter race this time. If we lose here, we have no chance of taking back the House majority.

I am proud to work with my colleagues every day on issues like infrastructure, workforce development, and fighting inflation. To keep me in Congress working on these issues, please consider contributing to my re-election campaign before our deadline tonight.

Susan Wild

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: They’re going after birth control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Nope, you didn’t accidentally travel back a few decades to another century
#
friend,
When someone tells you what they’re going to do, believe them.
When Donald Trump first ran for president, he promised to appoint Supreme Court justices who oppose the right to an abortion. That’s exactly what he did. And that’s exactly why Roe v. Wade is no longer the law of the land.
So I’m paying attention to what MAGA Republicans promise to do if they win in 2024. Some of Trump’s closest allies and former advisors have released a blueprint. It proposes steps for him to take as president without approval from Congress, like...
* Reversing the FDA’s approval for mifepristone, a medication used for one of the most common methods of abortion
* Enforcing a law from 1873 in a way that’s “viewed as a de facto federal abortion ban by reproductive rights advocates and anti-abortion activists alike,” according to Rolling Stone
* No longer paying for service members’ travel expenses if they have to leave the state they’re stationed in for reproductive care — a.k.a. the policy that Senator Tommy Tuberville blocked hundreds of military nominations and promotions to try to stop
* And they won’t stop at abortion. They also plan to restrict access to birth control. Yep, birth control. Nope, you didn’t accidentally travel back a few decades to another century — it’s 2024, and right-wing extremists are attacking basic contraceptive care.

Friend, two things are clear. Number one: right-wing extremists won’t rest until abortion is banned nationwide. Number two: we’ve got to defeat them — in 2024 and beyond.
[**I’m running for re-election this year to stay in the fight. Can you split any amount between my campaign and The Long Run to help hold the line against anti-abortion rights ideologues?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em240131-1-tt&t=1&akid=5183%2E196590%2EkRa0FM)
We’ve got to keep Donald Trump from getting anywhere near the White House again so he can’t enact any of this out-of-touch agenda.
We’ve got to win abortion rights battles at the state level, like organizers did last year in Ohio.
And we’ve got to keep working to protect abortion rights at the federal level. We can make that happen if we protect and expand our Senate majority.
Look, I get it: none of this is easy. In fact, it’s infuriating that we’re in this position. It’s outrageous that a handful of Supreme Court justices ripped a constitutional right away from over half our population.
I’m still angry, and I’m still determined to fight back. Right-wing extremists were able to overturn Roe because of years and years and years of planning — and we’ve got to do whatever it takes, for as long as it takes, to undo the damage they’ve done.
That’s what I’m committed to. And I’m glad to be by your side in this fight.
[**To help grow our re-election campaign and fight for the right to an abortion, can you split a donation between our campaign and The Long Run today? Whatever you’d be able to contribute would go a long way as we enter this powerfully important election year.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em240131-1-tt&t=2&akid=5183%2E196590%2EkRa0FM)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5183%2E196590%2EkRa0FM). clean_body: Nope, you didn’t accidentally travel back a few decades to another century friend, When someone tells you what they’re going to do, believe them. When Donald Trump first ran for president, he promised to appoint Supreme Court justices who oppose the right to an abortion. That’s exactly what he did. And that’s exactly why Roe v. Wade is no longer the law of the land. So I’m paying attention to what MAGA Republicans promise to do if they win in 2024. Some of Trump’s closest allies and former advisors have released a blueprint. It proposes steps for him to take as president without approval from Congress, like... Reversing the FDA’s approval for mifepristone, a medication used for one of the most common methods of abortion Enforcing a law from 1873 in a way that’s “viewed as a de facto federal abortion ban by reproductive rights advocates and anti-abortion activists alike,” according to Rolling Stone No longer paying for service members’ travel expenses if they have to leave the state they’re stationed in for reproductive care — a.k.a. the policy that Senator Tommy Tuberville blocked hundreds of military nominations and promotions to try to stop And they won’t stop at abortion. They also plan to restrict access to birth control. Yep, birth control. Nope, you didn’t accidentally travel back a few decades to another century — it’s 2024, and right-wing extremists are attacking basic contraceptive care. Friend, two things are clear. Number one: right-wing extremists won’t rest until abortion is banned nationwide. Number two: we’ve got to defeat them — in 2024 and beyond. We’ve got to keep Donald Trump from getting anywhere near the White House again so he can’t enact any of this out-of-touch agenda. We’ve got to win abortion rights battles at the state level, like organizers did last year in Ohio. And we’ve got to keep working to protect abortion rights at the federal level. We can make that happen if we protect and expand our Senate majority. Look, I get it: none of this is easy. In fact, it’s infuriating that we’re in this position. It’s outrageous that a handful of Supreme Court justices ripped a constitutional right away from over half our population. I’m still angry, and I’m still determined to fight back. Right-wing extremists were able to overturn Roe because of years and years and years of planning — and we’ve got to do whatever it takes, for as long as it takes, to undo the damage they’ve done. That’s what I’m committed to. And I’m glad to be by your side in this fight. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

name: Eric (iPhone)
subject: What’s at stake in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
(and why we need to end this month strong)
Hey team,
I hope this email finds you well. I apologize for reaching out again so soon, but there's a critical update I wanted to share with you. As of now, we are just hours away from our midnight deadline tonight, and we are still 54 donors short of our goal.
Our campaign has always been about standing up for working people everywhere. That couldn’t be farther from the Chaos Caucus’ agenda, who are focused on engaging in political maneuvering and making divisive statements to gain attention.
What's at stake this year is our ability to reinstate norms in the House so we can do the People’s work. If the Republicans were to maintain their majority, the consequences could extend far beyond their petty attacks and do-nothing attitude – our very democracy could hang in the balance.
So, team, I am reaching out to ask for your support once more. Can you make a donation of $5 or any amount you can afford before our midnight deadline tonight? Your contributions will play a crucial role in powering our campaign as we start this critical election year.
To make your donation, please use my personal ActBlue link below so that I can personally track your support: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2024-FR-January?refcode=EricPersonal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78165606/452607970/1580423617?&refcode=E6821-20240131-EOM6-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBhOTc5Yy05Y2MwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C065n1AISvPNkjKP5MtlQweyHRmfJVJnpxsi2wQvCgs=)**
I genuinely appreciate your assistance during this critical time. Your support is instrumental in helping us achieve our goal, and together, we can work towards a better future for all.
Thank you for your dedication and generosity.
Warm regards,
Eric

Paid for by Swalwell For Congress

Peter,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**_With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought._

ALWAYS.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.

Does that surprise you?**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I need your help today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b3a4a8ce66e84659b48cd5afaeacbd04&_e=VoDgHbq3lHIhgJiPfa1VK-Y51gcPPAQwvkObN-Q-MzNBzJ8bQgzyHGK5TpocTwiErF5XIphHGdT_xAchKRnKQHNtSnziIY3j4IGbfscpmFiy_Px16lZ63xpgaUGYmH7BqGin-yLs4SPejQ1OgDRyTFpI-7yMeUAH3J750Rd4CTFjqOT_dtZBq6xOzI610One1ELo6piRc5kuNMz5Vu5JjCtnDOL-U61LZiJ2OdtXXuLz2Ih22Apjl0ZXVYppIp8P8dfk5edROFVV6KltfKGtG9sBVi1-Ia2uuUSAt_dU28Sjc9J-MS2JtF0Bp8HKkGb6rFVb61t1GtLaJXEmdHS16RaVBW-bTARPGAJwbhzQl-EGEFkRRW1AJW9zbwWki10SJAGq03MBWunid-ZtpCA99KKc-CtXOxnnGyYBlAdWTiLk1DxugfQF3fKKseX4d2ocHHPCi-PcuyOwcqDrqphg_w%3D%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please make an immediate contribution of $10 or more right now?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b3a4a8ce66e84659b48cd5afaeacbd04&_e=VoDgHbq3lHIhgJiPfa1VK-Y51gcPPAQwvkObN-Q-MzNBzJ8bQgzyHGK5TpocTwiErF5XIphHGdT_xAchKRnKQHNtSnziIY3j4IGbfscpmFiy_Px16lZ63xpgaUGYmH7BqGin-yLs4SPejQ1OgDRyTFpI-7yMeUAH3J750Rd4CTFjqOT_dtZBq6xOzI610One1ELo6piRc5kuNMz5Vu5JjCtnDOL-U61LZiJ2OdtXXuLz2Ih22Apjl0ZXVYppIp8P8dfk5edROFVV6KltfKGtG9sBVi1-Ia2uuUSAt_dU28Sjc9J-MS2JtF0Bp8HKkGb6mKyrbHT2MEwHAKFmKrHs6K6jR00bO4hCTxoSEsFaHnIp3J2s4O1tlBJpzSSyccHvwDmyrzzQ50GOh3bz7yhchTnTdkSrLC91nkpLzIF7E6hDEUhzcbaHT2wcEfJx2yJzN8TXbN4lmDWznKLJ6Ham_w%3D%3D) **

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. | | Peter, We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan. We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought. ALWAYS. Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve. And the Democrats? They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on. Does that surprise you? I am in Washington to fight for YOU. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, this fight has put a HUGE target on my back , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, . I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of liberties. That said, I need your support today– because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington. As a personal favor to me, Make no mistake, Peter - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia. I’m proud to stand with you in defense of liberty. God Bless, Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=972c47a7079a40218f8be350fa566313&_e=KwCkxXXKJ-wgWMh6NEktkg4JQsw7HW_YTq7_qhQrcz5DM91iwtCkb9jj9XUvLKz59LJZhSsOEIekxGpLI_olGMTaT9UK_6rvj-zwtqyCZcEYJtarqWkbMs4Naqys-8Y7Fxoy6plbwAtHRXA4r34poVVh7A4MXWgFpv--RHWbNC6_2pNvf4zxQ22NEDBRksnusYIZ5UPmsdq9zziiIaISoZRxEGoFO3fhXziGMVpYpA6sRu2Zr-gwe0SbcbEJJnP0h2TOMt-0nGrR1z_eUKLt3oBx-JKmDwqynAQGBe6y1WLcnj7HnIpebDowglvwWodK7ZBseT4a9uFvYShe8P830IULx2xmmzsRYFvlji25xrYjGyC5k32sdFeHANeGNIMlKTSa-plhGAnGEBtna1N2Xw%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=972c47a7079a40218f8be350fa566313&_e=KwCkxXXKJ-wgWMh6NEktkg4JQsw7HW_YTq7_qhQrcz5DM91iwtCkb9jj9XUvLKz59LJZhSsOEIekxGpLI_olGMTaT9UK_6rvj-zwtqyCZcEYJtarqWkbMs4Naqys-8Y7Fxoy6plbwAtHRXA4r34poVVh7A4MXWgFpv--RHWbNC6_2pNvf4zxQ22NEDBRksnusYIZ5UPmsdq9zziiIaISoZRxEGoFO3fhXziGMVpYpA6sRu2Zr-gwe0SbcbEJJnP0NbTEPgwM9JbClYiHBHu3cUSdcSYqszk819EGGGkdln1xC1YIpnzFi--dun_-NGn24WEAF3a5I6VJ7sadlKt5SJ5pn6nuxeOq3V7gwRpTq8BJzaBbMQ-Fw5kuElbmbzGfey__SesBlCOk79-eZm-diw%3D%3D)

Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today.

I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: You still have a chance!
body:

Dear Friend,
There's still a few hours left until our books close on January, and that means there's still time for you to make a contribution to help us reach our January online fundraising goal. As of this minute we're only about $1,100 short.
Your contribution could make the difference! Click here to donate now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Not sure if you should donate? In case you missed it, Shamaine's message from her last email lays out the stakes in this campaign, and why we need your support today. You can check it out below
Thanks in advance!
- Team Daniels
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

From: Shamaine Daniels
Date: January 31, 2024
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/Copy%20of%20Perry%20Tireless.png]
Dear Friend,
As you know, today is the last day of the month. Over the last few days, we've been reaching out to supporters like you to ask for your help reaching our online fundraising goal for January. As always, we've been overwhelmed by the response from our supporters, but we're still a little short. As you consider whether or not to pitch-in and help us close the gap, I wanted to remind us all what's at stake in this race.
Scott Perry was a central figure in the attempts to overturn the 2020 election [https://www.pennlive.com/news/2023/11/unsealed-ruling-details-us-rep-scott-perrys-tireless-work-for-trumps-2020-cause.html] , and is one of the most dangerous members of Congress.
As part of Team Daniels, you know that isn't hyperbole, You know that Perry is the man behind the curtain, and far more dangerous that his more famous lackeys like Jim Jordan, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Matt Gaetz.
As long as Perry remains in office, he will continue to undermine our institutions, and will remain a threat to our Democracy. That's why I'm asking you to make a contribution before midnight tonight to help us reach our January goal - CLICK HERE to make a contribution. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]

In the time since President Biden took office, as the Chair of the ultra-conservative, pro-MAGA Freedom Caucus, Perry is the one behind the debt ceiling standoff, the ouster of Kevin McCarthy, the repeated threats of a government shutdown, the complete dysfunction in the House of Representatives, and the election of the current pro-Trump Speaker Mike Johnson.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m asking if you’re able to pitch in to support my re-election campaign and start 2024 with the strongest momentum. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1913%2E4032634%2ESCN6yz)
---
Hi there, [**I’m asking if you can please pitch in tonight to help hit our first monthly fundraising goal of 2024.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1879?t=8&akid=1913%2E4032634%2ESCN6yz) It’s powerfully important that we reach every grassroots fundraising target in this critical election year in order to campaign for our plans for big, structural change. Any sign of weakness — any decline of support — could signal that momentum behind these plans is weakening. That could enable our opponents to strike back, or potentially encourage them to recruit a challenger against me to try to put a stop to our plans. As a reminder, the plans we’re fighting for would stop...
* MAGA extremists from engaging in voter suppression, overturning election results, and taking away our rights
* Quality child care from eating up an entire paycheck
* Big bank CEOs from gambling with working people’s livelihoods
* The filibuster from blocking bills that most Americans are calling for, like protecting abortion rights and enacting gun safety laws

And they would start...
* Making multi-millionaires and billionaires pay a small wealth tax on fortunes greater than $50 million so all of our kids can have a fighting chance at success
* Restoring public trust in our nation’s highest court by getting Supreme Court justices to follow a basic code of ethics (and at least four more new justices will follow those rules once we expand the Court, too)
* Bringing down the cost of housing by increasing supply
* Rooting corruption out of Washington

[**A contribution of $28 or any amount you can give right now will help ensure we can advocate and grow momentum for these plans from the halls of the Senate and all across the country. And you’ll send a message to the special interests and out-of-touch ideologues that we're fighting against that together, we are going to defeat them.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1879?amount=28&t=9&akid=1913%2E4032634%2ESCN6yz)
