clean_body: | | | Hi there, It’s powerfully important that we reach every grassroots fundraising target in this critical election year in order to campaign for our plans for big, structural change. Any sign of weakness — any decline of support — could signal that momentum behind these plans is weakening. That could enable our opponents to strike back, or potentially encourage them to recruit a challenger against me to try to put a stop to our plans. As a reminder, the plans we’re fighting for would stop... MAGA extremists from engaging in voter suppression, overturning election results, and taking away our rights Quality child care from eating up an entire paycheck Big bank CEOs from gambling with working people’s livelihoods The filibuster from blocking bills that most Americans are calling for, like protecting abortion rights and enacting gun safety laws And they would start... Making multi-millionaires and billionaires pay a small wealth tax on fortunes greater than $50 million so all of our kids can have a fighting chance at success Restoring public trust in our nation’s highest court by getting Supreme Court justices to follow a basic code of ethics (and at least four more new justices will follow those rules once we expand the Court, too) Bringing down the cost of housing by increasing supply Rooting corruption out of Washington If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2024 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We'll miss you, but you can always .

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Here’s what will happen if we don’t win all 7 competitive Senate races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
To save the Senate from Mitch McConnell and a MAGA Republican takeover, we need to win 7 out of 7 competitive Senate races.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78166282/452613816/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJhNTZlMS05ZGMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4GolScQW3-xSK4Tejk-32oxhY8EZa7b2n413_BP075Q=&emci=b2185cdb-9dc0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=a6ba56e1-9dc0-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=7731215)
---

| | It's time for us to put the full pedal to the metal in the race to save the Senate Democratic Majority from Mitch McConnell and a MAGA Republican takeover. To do that, we need to win 7 out of 7 competitive Senate races, including some incredibly difficult ones in states like Montana, Ohio, and Arizona and purple states like Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. [**Today,****I'm asking you to make a contribution to help us save the Democratic Senate Majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78166283/452613818/-641752998?refcode=2024-01-31-eom3&recurring=&amount=18&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a6ba56e1-9dc0-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJhNTZlMS05ZGMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4GolScQW3-xSK4Tejk-32oxhY8EZa7b2n413_BP075Q=) **Here's what is at stake if we don't win all 7 races:** Republicans will block every judge nominated by a re-elected Biden. They will obstruct the confirmations of essential Cabinet posts. And they will eagerly kill good policy on health care, housing, jobs, civil rights, and climate chaos. That's a future we can't afford, so we have to invest now to save the Senate. Here's a deeper look at our Democratic lineup:
* **MONTANA:** Senator Jon Tester has won three times in a state that's picked a Republican for President seven times in a row. As a Democrat with rural roots, he's a strong defender of our public lands and family farms. It's going to be tough, but Jon's a tough guy, and we'll have his back.

* **OHIO:** Senator Sherrod Brown is a powerhouse champion for working folks, which is why he's won three times in a state trending redder and redder. In the Senate, he's fighting to raise the minimum wage, protect Social Security and Medicare, and hold big banks and corporations accountable for the damage they do to our workers and our economy.

* **PENNSYLVANIA:** Senator Bob Casey is a champion for children's health care who's been elected three times in another crucial swing state that helps decide the presidential election every time.

* **WISCONSIN:** Senator Tammy Baldwin has been elected twice in the swing state that re-elected hard-right Republican Ron Johnson to the Senate in 2022. As Wisconsin's first woman Senator and the first out LGBTQ+ Senator, Tammy's a fighter who's not afraid to smash glass ceilings.

* **NEVADA:** In 2018, Senator Jacky Rosen was the only Democrat to defeat an incumbent Republican Senator. Throughout her first term, she's worked hard, away from the cameras, to protect reproductive rights and deliver smart, bipartisan solutions to improve tourism and commerce, among other issues.

* **MICHIGAN & ARIZONA: **Of course, we have two seats in competitive states that are up for grabs this year. In Michigan, we have the chance to elect a replacement for retiring Democratic Senator Debbie Stabenow. In Arizona, we have a chance to elect a strong Democrat against the potential GOP opponent Kari Lake.

**It's going to be tough, but this grassroots team has**** _never_****backed down from a tough fight before!** [**I know the key to progressive victories is out-hustling, out-organizing, and out-inspiring the other side.****That's why I'm asking you to help us win by pitching in to the Blue Wave Project's goal to save the Senate.****If you're ready to get to it, please make a donation of $18 to the Blue Wave Project today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78166284/452613823/-641752998?refcode=2024-01-31-eom3&recurring=&amount=18&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a6ba56e1-9dc0-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJhNTZlMS05ZGMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4GolScQW3-xSK4Tejk-32oxhY8EZa7b2n413_BP075Q=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78166285/452613847/-641752998?refcode=2024-01-31-eom3&recurring=&amount=18&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a6ba56e1-9dc0-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJhNTZlMS05ZGMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4GolScQW3-xSK4Tejk-32oxhY8EZa7b2n413_BP075Q=) Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

The announcement by the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee is a game changer. It officially gives my opponent the seal of approval from Democrat leadership. It opens the floodgates for Democrat donors across the Country, _**not to mention access to the DCCC’s $48 MILLION war chest.**_

This also signals to every Democrat that if they're going to retake the Majority, they NEED this seat.

Fellow Conservative, this is a game changer. My opponent now has unlimited resources to go after me and flip this seat. If we're going to hold our ground, I need to ramp up our fundraising operation just to keep up.

[**That’s why I need to**raise an additional $2,630 from grassroots donors** before tonight's first End-of-Month fundraising deadline. clean_body: House Democrats just announced I’m one of their top targets for their "red-to-blue" program. | Fellow Conservative, House Democrats just announced I’m one of their top targets for their "red-to-blue" program. The announcement by the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee is a game changer. It officially gives my opponent the seal of approval from Democrat leadership. It opens the floodgates for Democrat donors across the Country, not to mention access to the DCCC’s $48 MILLION war chest. This also signals to every Democrat that if they're going to retake the Majority, they NEED this seat. Fellow Conservative, this is a game changer. My opponent now has unlimited resources to go after me and flip this seat. If we're going to hold our ground, I need to ramp up our fundraising operation just to keep up. Thank you and God bless, Marc Molinaro Congressman | | Paid for by Marc for US

body:
| | | Peter,

I’ll make this quick - I’m EXTREMELY worried.

Our end of month deadline is tonight at midnight, and we still must raise $10,839.

I’m counting on my grassroots team more than ever, and that means YOU, Peter,.

If we miss this goal, we have NO chance at taking back President Trump’s majority in the Senate.

But in New York, the GOP just had their best election cycle in DECADES. With Politico reporting that Dems are facing **a tough Senate map** in 2024, they're more confident than ever.
Now, they're coming for Kirsten's seat —**and she's _counting on you_ to stand with her team during this critical moment.**

We can’t let them overturn the will of the people |
#
---
Team — anti-abortion extremists are suing me to attempt to overturn our state’s abortion protections. They’re willing to do everything they possibly can to rip away our fundamental rights. **[Can you rush in a donation today ahead of our first end-of-month deadline of 2024 to help us defeat attempts to ban abortion in Michigan and other states across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78167397/452620932/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240131_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFjYzdlZGMtOWZjMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VPHiInrJzHkIEGm-0UhPuaPH7qIPEawzahGKPuxBh_g=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78167398/452620933/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240131_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFjYzdlZGMtOWZjMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VPHiInrJzHkIEGm-0UhPuaPH7qIPEawzahGKPuxBh_g=)

When anti-choice extremists fight to overturn the will of the voters after losing elections, they’re showing you that they don’t value your voice.
A **clear majority** of Michiganders went to the ballot box in 2022 to make their voices heard after the far-right majority on the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade._
They supported a ballot measure that enshrined abortion rights into our state’s constitution.
And they gave Michigan Democrats full control of the state legislature to serve as an extra line of defense against any attempts to rip away our fundamental rights.
These Michiganders believe decisions about abortion should be between a woman and her doctor — and I agree.
But now, anti-abortion activists are suing to reverse all the progress we made and to overturn the will of the voters.
**We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines.**
Republican extremists have been _very_ clear about their plans to pass a national abortion ban and other anti-choice measures if they win in 2024.
**That’s why it’s more important than ever that we send them a message loud and clear that we will never let them take away our fundamental rights.**
**[This ridiculous lawsuit imposes an extreme minority’s ideology on Michiganders, and we cannot let them overturn the will of the people. Could you rush in a donation before midnight tonight to ensure that we’ll be able to continue to fight like hell against their efforts to ban abortion in Michigan and nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78167399/452620934/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240131_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFjYzdlZGMtOWZjMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VPHiInrJzHkIEGm-0UhPuaPH7qIPEawzahGKPuxBh_g=)**

name: Bob Casey
subject: The last email you’ll get from us tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, this is the last email you’ll get before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I need your help to kick off 2024 on the right foot.
A new poll shows our Senate race closer than ever before. We can’t afford to fall behind.
[**That’s why this deadline is so important. We can’t win in November if we fall short in January, so please, rush $5 or whatever you can right now so I can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240131-4?refcode=em20240131-4&refcode2=1867_552475_MZxzgt&akid=1867%2E552475%2EMZxzgt)
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

Hey There,

I know my team and I have reached out a ton in these last few days, but
with major poll results coming out right on top of an end-of-month
fundraising deadline, we wanted to make sure you know where our campaign
stands.

Our end-of-month deadline is coming up in just a couple of hours. Our poll
shows that we have a clear path to victory, and all we need to do is
ensure we have the resources we need to make it to the finish line

We still need to raise $643 to reach our projected monthly goal, and we
need your help to get there. Can you contribute to our people-powered and
people-funded campaign before we close the books this month?

You can use this link:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5307?t=1002&akid=35155%2E120265%2EWEQaa_ ]https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5307?t=1003&akid=35155%2E120265%2EWEQaa_

Thank you for your ongoing support.

– Qasim

name: Kim (personal)
subject: you are making a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
I promise to be quick!

The team let me know how many folks are pitching in to ensure our campaign can move forward with our first direct mail program.

That means a lot to me.

It is critical to reach primary voters with my campaign message as ballots arrive in their mailboxes. We’re not taking anyone or their vote for granted.

However, we still need a last-minute push before midnight tonight to get us over our voter outreach fundraising finish line.

Can you help?

Here’s a secure link you can use for your donation today:

https://go.votekimnguyen.com/a/january-2024

Thank you so much for your support. It is much appreciated!

– Kim

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for Details of Fani Willis’ Controversial Hiring of Special Prosecutor
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a lawsuit against
Fulton County, Georgia for records regarding the hiring of Nathan Wade
as a special prosecutor by District Attorney Fani Willis. Wade was
hired to pursue unprecedented criminal investigations and prosecutions
against former President Trump and others over the 2020 election
disputes.

name: Biden-Harris Update
subject: Good news...bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
President Biden was hoping you might be able to help. | | |
---
Peter, Our campaign has a bit of a problem on our hands -- and with only a few hours to go before our FEC fundraising deadline ends, President Biden was hoping you might be able to help. **The good news is** , we have far more individual donations to our campaign this month than in the last few months. The President is very proud of that fact, and you should be too. **The bad news is** that our average donation in the last week has slipped by about $5. That's OK -- this campaign is all about people giving whatever they can afford at the moment. No donation is too small. **But what it means is that in order to hit our goals before our deadline, we either need more donations, or we need people to give a little bit more.** Normally we ask someone making their first online donation to give just $10. Today, we have to ask you to do a little bit more, Peter. Especially with Trump having all but locked up the Republican nomination. [**Can President Biden count on you to contribute $2 to his campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline in just a few hours? Every donation matters. clean_body: President Biden was hoping you might be able to help. | | | Peter, Our campaign has a bit of a problem on our hands -- and with only a few hours to go before our FEC fundraising deadline ends, President Biden was hoping you might be able to help. The good news is , we have far more individual donations to our campaign this month than in the last few months. The President is very proud of that fact, and you should be too. The bad news is that our average donation in the last week has slipped by about $5. That's OK -- this campaign is all about people giving whatever they can afford at the moment. No donation is too small. But what it means is that in order to hit our goals before our deadline, we either need more donations, or we need people to give a little bit more. Normally we ask someone making their first online donation to give just $10. Today, we have to ask you to do a little bit more, Peter. Especially with Trump having all but locked up the Republican nomination. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for contributing before this midnight deadline. At the drop of a hat, **our challenger or GOP super PACs could flood the airwaves with misleading ads about Martin's record.** __**SO**__ : It’s more important than ever to hit our fundraising milestones, like tonight’s end-of-month fundraising goal, to respond to any attacks and get Martin’s message out. **We promise this is the last time we’ll ask this month:[Will you help us keep New Mexico and the Senate blue by pitching in any amount before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78168236/452626046/-1374307457?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240131_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJiNzA5Ni1hM2MwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_fRX6jB4hl86RoBAdRkwalTMEq5V2dxBR9Snz_DzTQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78168237/452626047/-1374307457?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240131_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJiNzA5Ni1hM2MwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_fRX6jB4hl86RoBAdRkwalTMEq5V2dxBR9Snz_DzTQ=)

clean_body: Let’s recap a few key events, folks — FIRST : Martin’s new Republican challenger launched her campaign to unseat him, pouring $500,000 of her own funds into New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race. THEN : Mitch McConnell’s allies came out in full support of the hedge fund executive, a mega-millionaire who is the daughter of the last Republican Senator to represent New Mexico. NOW : We need to prepare for the inevitable: Martin’s new opponent can write herself another big check at any moment, on top of any support she gets from national Republicans. At the drop of a hat, our challenger or GOP super PACs could flood the airwaves with misleading ads about Martin's record. SO : It’s more important than ever to hit our fundraising milestones, like tonight’s end-of-month fundraising goal, to respond to any attacks and get Martin’s message out. We promise this is the last time we’ll ask this month:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for all you’re doing to send Martin back to the Senate to fight for New Mexico values. — Team Heinrich | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. Extreme Republicans will stop at nothing to take complete control of Congress _and_ the White House — we can’t let that happen. Here at The Collective PAC, we’re working harder than ever to elect Black candidates up and down the ballot that can stand up to MAGA extremists, but we need your help to make it happen.

| Adam’s wealthy opponent Steve Garvey has completely upended this Senate race – and he has the $$ to self-fund
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5279%2E5257348%2ED7tK97)
Derek – We know it’s getting a little late, but we promise this email will take less than a minute to read.
Adam’s wealthy, Republican celebrity opponent Steve Garvey has completely upended this Senate race – and the fact is, he’s so wealthy he has the ability to pour his own money into this race.
With our first fundraising deadline of the year just a few hours away, **Adam needs your help to gather all the resources needed to come out on top in this primary election. Should it be Steve Garvey on the ballot in November, Adam is the best candidate to take him on.**
This month’s goal is one of the most important ones yet – it’s our last fundraising deadline before folks start to head to the polls and cast their early ballots.
**[So please, will you help us in the final hours before our deadline to reach Adam’s end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240131_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5279%2E5257348%2ED7tK97)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?David?=
subject: Introducing "Chicken Jimmy"
body:
Chicken Jimmy is a character who combines wit, wisdom, and a touch of humor to bring important political discussions to our community. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/the-only-progressive-policy-platform-in-ca-13932654?e=fee98d637f)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends,

We are thrilled to introduce you to "Chicken Jimmy," the newest member of our campaign family! Chicken Jimmy is a character who combines wit, wisdom, and a touch of humor to bring important political discussions to our community.
---
|
---
| **But who is Chicken Jimmy, you might ask?** He's more than just a character – he's a storyteller, a truth-teller, and a symbol of our commitment to keeping politics honest and accessible. With his sharp beak and keen eye, Chicken Jimmy will peck through the political landscape, uncovering facts, exposing contradictions, and bringing to light the information you need to know.

>From Jimmy Gomez's voting record to the sources of his campaign funding, Chicken Jimmy will be there to cluck out the facts. He's not afraid to ruffle some feathers to ensure our community gets the full story. Expect to see Chicken Jimmy across our social media, at events, and wherever our campaign goes, always ready to share a fresh perspective on the political issues that matter most to you.

Chicken Jimmy has already made his first appearance, where he be cracked open the truth on a recent mailer sent out by Jimmy Gomez. Go follow him on X **@ChickenJimmy**. You won't want to miss what he has to say!

Thank you for your continued support. Together, with Chicken Jimmy's help, we're building a campaign that's not just about winning an election, but also about engaging, informing, and empowering our community.
---
|
---
|
---
| | **UPCOMING EVENTS**
---
|
---
---

clean_body: Chicken Jimmy is a character who combines wit, wisdom, and a touch of humor to bring important political discussions to our community. | | | | | | | Dear Friends, We are thrilled to introduce you to "Chicken Jimmy," the newest member of our campaign family! Chicken Jimmy is a character who combines wit, wisdom, and a touch of humor to bring important political discussions to our community. | | But who is Chicken Jimmy, you might ask? He's more than just a character – he's a storyteller, a truth-teller, and a symbol of our commitment to keeping politics honest and accessible. With his sharp beak and keen eye, Chicken Jimmy will peck through the political landscape, uncovering facts, exposing contradictions, and bringing to light the information you need to know. From Jimmy Gomez's voting record to the sources of his campaign funding, Chicken Jimmy will be there to cluck out the facts. He's not afraid to ruffle some feathers to ensure our community gets the full story. Expect to see Chicken Jimmy across our social media, at events, and wherever our campaign goes, always ready to share a fresh perspective on the political issues that matter most to you. Chicken Jimmy has already made his first appearance, where he be cracked open the truth on a recent mailer sent out by Jimmy Gomez. Go follow him on X @ChickenJimmy. You won't want to miss what he has to say! Thank you for your continued support. Together, with Chicken Jimmy's help, we're building a campaign that's not just about winning an election, but also about engaging, informing, and empowering our community. | | | | UPCOMING EVENTS | | | "Become a $34 monthly donor today!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 David Kim for Congress - CA34, All rights reserved.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78168614/452627438/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmI1ZmRiMC1hNWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nWEOoWgMCH71OLQy_xpI76S89GWGDL4n70Rj1TFOl34=&emci=fffbb29e-91c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=86b5fdb0-a5c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=29359352)
---

| | Peter, **Serious allegations against my opponent in the primary, Jamie McLeod-Skinner, have emerged. They must be discussed.** The _Willamette Week_ headline: Multiple former people who have worked for my primary opponent have come forward to describe an environment of **fear and confusion** in the final days of Jamie McLeod-Skinner's prior campaign for Congress, where one of her closest employees **feared physical violence** from her. Campaigns are difficult. The final moments of any run, win or lose, are some of the most tense. **But there is**** _zero_****excuse to**** _ever_****make one's campaign staff feel unsafe or disrespect the labor they are putting in. You cannot claim to champion workers in policy if you don't treat workers well in practice.** And now we're facing the consequences of Jamie McLeod-Skinner's dysfunctional campaign: a Trump ally representing OR-05. **The stakes are too high in 2024 to repeat what happened last time.** Time is ticking to take back the House. Oregon deserves better in so many ways, and that's why I'm wholly committed to doing everything I can to build a grassroots coalition to win this race. And let's be blunt about it: Jamie McLeod-Skinner has shown both through her loss last year and the mistreatment of her campaign staff that she is the _wrong_ candidate to get the job done. clean_body: | | | | Peter, Serious allegations against my opponent in the primary, Jamie McLeod-Skinner, have emerged. They must be discussed. The Willamette Week headline: Multiple former people who have worked for my primary opponent have come forward to describe an environment of fear and confusion in the final days of Jamie McLeod-Skinner's prior campaign for Congress, where one of her closest employees feared physical violence from her. Campaigns are difficult. The final moments of any run, win or lose, are some of the most tense. But there is zeroexcuse to evermake one's campaign staff feel unsafe or disrespect the labor they are putting in. You cannot claim to champion workers in policy if you don't treat workers well in practice. And now we're facing the consequences of Jamie McLeod-Skinner's dysfunctional campaign: a Trump ally representing OR-05. The stakes are too high in 2024 to repeat what happened last time. Time is ticking to take back the House. Oregon deserves better in so many ways, and that's why I'm wholly committed to doing everything I can to build a grassroots coalition to win this race. And let's be blunt about it: Jamie McLeod-Skinner has shown both through her loss last year and the mistreatment of her campaign staff that she is the wrong candidate to get the job done. We deserve better — and I will make sure the people of OR-05 get that.= More soon, Lynn | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

Time, Talent, and Treasure | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7d3dad68cc81/elizabeth-needs-your-help?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=f223d5675d&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Dear Peter,
---
| | As we ramp up our efforts for the upcoming election, we're reaching out to our amazing community of supporters to ask for your help. Whether it's [your time, your talents](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=ad940b3faa&e=54a81bd33c), or [your treasure,](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=9ac803aa14&e=54a81bd33c) every contribution you make plays a crucial role in our campaign to elect Elizabeth Helgelien to Congress in Nevada's 3rd Congressional District.

[**1\. Volunteer Training This Friday - Join Us!**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=fcdf1b910a&e=54a81bd33c)

We're excited to announce our first volunteer training session this Friday at 3 PM Pacific Time. This is your chance to be on the front lines, making phone calls or knocking on doors to spread Elizabeth's message. Even if you're not in Southern Nevada, you can make a significant impact from anywhere!
---
|
---
| [📅 Sign up for Volunteer Training This Friday](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=791179b4c1&e=54a81bd33c "📅 Sign up for Volunteer Training This Friday")
---
| [**2\. Can't Make It Friday? Sign Up to Volunteer Anyway!**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=dfdf3a8e99&e=54a81bd33c)

If you can't make it this Friday, don't worry – there's still plenty you can do! Sign up to volunteer, and we'll get you set up to make phone calls or knock on doors at a time that works for you. Your talent and dedication are invaluable to our cause.

---
| [👥 Sign Up to Volunteer](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=e5f7b4b04d&e=54a81bd33c "👥 Sign Up to Volunteer")
---
| [**3\. Support with a Donation – Every Little Bit Helps!**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=66a54ff219&e=54a81bd33c)

Not everyone has the time or ability to volunteer, but your financial support is just as critical. Did you know that just $5 allows us to connect with 100 voters over the phone? Your donation, no matter the size, fuels our campaign and brings us closer to victory.

---
| [💰 Donate $5 or Whatever You Can](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=cf4afc42ee&e=54a81bd33c "💰 Donate $5 or Whatever You Can")
---
| We're counting on your support in whatever form it comes. Whether it's your time, talent, or treasure, you are a vital part of our team. Together, we can ensure that Elizabeth Helgelien's voice is heard loud and clear in Congress, championing the values we hold dear.

---
| Thank you for standing with us,
---
| **Steve Walsh**
Senior Strategist
Elizabeth for Nevada
[**ElizabethForNV.com**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=1a429b10ff&e=54a81bd33c)

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Our first fundraising deadline of 2024 is at midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter,
**Is there anything we can say to encourage you to add your first donation of any amount toward our goal of raising $400,000 before midnight TONIGHT?**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43280?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq)**
What if we told you that recent approval ratings from _Morning Consult_ confirmed that Josh Hawley remains the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024 — and that multiple recent polls show he’s in a margin-of-error race with Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?
Or what if we said shady insiders and corporate mega-donors are already spending MILLIONS to keep their grip on this seat by dumping money into Super PACs and Josh Hawley’s campaign, all so they can fund desperate attacks on Lucas and preserve their corrupt status quo?
Or what if we told you that we’re just hours away from our first fundraising deadline of 2024 — and that we’re just $1,500 away from hitting our January end-of-month goal?
**How we start this year will have a major impact on our campaign’s ability to fight back and win in November — so supporting Lucas and our race here in Missouri _right now_ could be your chance to make a real difference.**
**[So Peter, can you add your first donation of absolutely any amount toward our goal of raising $400,000 online before midnight tonight? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so your support really does power our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43280?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43281?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43281?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43281?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43281?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43281?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43281?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43280?refcode=em20240131-4725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4725%2E614464%2EWgtRjq)

Team Lucas Kunce

Dear Peter,
I'm reaching out to you today with an urgent request for your support.
Today marks the fundraising filing deadline, and the figures we report to the FEC will shape the narrative around our campaign's momentum.
Since the start of this campaign, I've dedicated every moment to spreading my message far and wide, _but we desperately need to keep the momentum going_. Without the backing of wealthy donors, we rely on Americans just like you to ensure our campaign finishes strong.
In Q3 2023, we outraised both the Biden and Trump campaigns in contributions under $6,600! [Your contribution, whether it's $5, $10, or more, makes a significant difference.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_1_31_24_rs_nd1&n=4)

I know what it’s like to keep chaos at bay, Friend.

_As a Captain in the U.S. Army, I kept America safe from the Soviet Union in the final days of the Cold War.

As Director of the CIA, I had the responsibility to protect our nation’s citizens from her enemies.

During my time in the House of Representatives, I defended our common values from the radical Left.

As Secretary of State, I ensured that America’s interests **always** came first._

So Friend, I need you to listen very closely when I tell you this: _**the Republican House Majority is the only thing that stands between order and chaos!**_

The radical Left wants more than anything else to take our House Majority so that they can continue to leave American interests in the dust. If they take the House Majority, they’ll continue to drive our economy into the ground, they’ll make Americans less safe with bad policy domestically and abroad.

_We**cannot** lose the House Majority, Friend._

I’m writing you today because I’d like you to meet the veteran, father, and Christian that is standing in their way. His name is Brandon Williams. **And, Friend, he is the ONLY thing keeping the radical Left’s chaos at bay.**
---

I'm Brandon Williams. I don't enjoy the DC scene. I'm not hopping from party to party mixing & mingling with lobbyists & wealthy megadonors. I'm not your traditional politician.

But I'm a proud U.S. Navy veteran, Friend. I served in the Navy as a Strategic Missile Officer. I understand the meaning of service and accountability.

The fact is, I didn't come to DC to attend cocktail receptions, I came to fight for you and the conservative values that we hold dear.

_But right now, I'm fighting to defend the seat I won in 2022._

A lot of politicians will SAY they're in tough races, but the reality is that I'm in the toughest race in the entire country. **I won by only 1%. Biden won my district by 7%.**

Congressional races don't get much closer than that, Friend.

Because my race was so close, Democrats are POURING resources into my 2024 race. They want this Navy engineer gone.

**[While I HATE asking good conservatives for their hard-earned money, I have to today. name: Navy SEAL Update
subject: 13 dead Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=c989aefdc6544db48feaae33b8279e1b&_t=WRo6Vzig_ayx-fZDaxbvc9OS4U-UzvYJDbgyFqjpt_fb-8bC_-M2TGwqKIHfg_K6Xn7BI-tn2USdTeM_-aoGFfB_--rbJTzrTNt2VhIAjtk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=c989aefdc6544db48feaae33b8279e1b&_t=WRo6Vzig_ayx-fZDaxbvc9OS4U-UzvYJDbgyFqjpt_fb-8bC_-M2TGwqKIHfg_K6Xn7BI-tn2USdTeM_-aoGFfB_--rbJTzrTNt2VhIAjtk%3D)
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=c989aefdc6544db48feaae33b8279e1b&_e=06gu4vTs00lsKklIxWOMWLfVWHwDLuJ56fzFFsBRUi3vFI2_h4nJ-Mjsj-9gJvlRIWm3i_aPa1OVFtSRySmaS78iczH0iWbhoomRAfnVJD3bj9PB_Yy23W_tfROfsMq9XXsAxa8CDgPLJV-rKM_3iSVU1YKdTCuaLEGfoTq0E26wUwIsKYDDl5-4CPeWmrHFo1OHvH9_QDc-QnNk4gWt-Wb4BRfehZcCTHy8T_-IAnQRp6w3oibuBIJ0ju4WAmr_-6hYYzZZ8hjLhMPcAxB2abSxmweU8hOvFGRdaybYKbFmNp4mr4GR-C0e0yx9MANskbHPgCzBDfNOB-VF2KuT6p9Sg6w_-XkGm0Mfbe6ru3rID8KF7F4IZlQMGwLQGqJMq5oJlMVmOLMQI3eviTu4SfW4fiIbaqCz8mIt641A7Mw%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=c989aefdc6544db48feaae33b8279e1b&_e=06gu4vTs00lsKklIxWOMWLfVWHwDLuJ56fzFFsBRUi3vFI2_h4nJ-Mjsj-9gJvlRIWm3i_aPa1OVFtSRySmaS78iczH0iWbhoomRAfnVJD3bj9PB_Yy23W_tfROfsMq9XXsAxa8CDgPLJV-rKM_3iSVU1YKdTCuaLEGfoTq0E26wUwIsKYDDl5-4CPeWmrHFo1OHvH9_QDc-QnNk4gWt-Wb4BRfehZcCTHy8T_-IAnQRp6w3oibuBIJ0ju4WAmr_L-KNc-Ceyt--Wh7ZHnhNIBfXXHoc87xe2hlutmYQEb4u-qODxx8L9KAitN_7j4xh_tutCUymifFhXqfSy5pNzV-736Ei8ovHwJ3Zp8eQX0oX6_k3V_xgBI6be3D_WOc4wlSoXdahkNn6k2TT_utvxc8HOzSP9lPA2j5nP12AGyo%3D)**.

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=c989aefdc6544db48feaae33b8279e1b&_e=06gu4vTs00lsKklIxWOMWLfVWHwDLuJ56fzFFsBRUi3vFI2_h4nJ-Mjsj-9gJvlRIWm3i_aPa1OVFtSRySmaS78iczH0iWbhoomRAfnVJD3bj9PB_Yy23W_tfROfsMq9XXsAxa8CDgPLJV-rKM_3iSVU1YKdTCuaLEGfoTq0E26wUwIsKYDDl5-4CPeWmrHFo1OHvH9_QDc-QnNk4gWt-Wb4BRfehZcCTHy8T_-IAnQRp6w3oibuBIJ0ju4WAmr_9NAjfwzhiEO2cI-zC2-NV3ji9rjIgUtTThWlrJmX3QZB_kWw7hAa3r8lQEzYGWYkMbBm8_x-_X4slbyUVXeUqa2eXq6VUCVSFDMIz7SjY_TSp6ptBiyF3SfMd0hdcyZZJVFVuoYYijA3xyUuMjWoKszuahZYZ-Vx2QBa9gMSaMk%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=c989aefdc6544db48feaae33b8279e1b&_e=06gu4vTs00lsKklIxWOMWLfVWHwDLuJ56fzFFsBRUi3vFI2_h4nJ-Mjsj-9gJvlRIWm3i_aPa1OVFtSRySmaS78iczH0iWbhoomRAfnVJD3bj9PB_Yy23W_tfROfsMq9XXsAxa8CDgPLJV-rKM_3iSVU1YKdTCuaLEGfoTq0E26wUwIsKYDDl5-4CPeWmrHFo1OHvH9_QDc-QnNk4gWt-Wb4BRfehZcCTHy8T_-IAnQRp6w3oibuBIJ0ju4WAmr_wH-x2HBnX2cjkTdWjmuxX_CYf7W0AgDLpX2Yp4_SBJ18GN9atePaixUJBQWWism831L0RcrfoHyPnYtspF7GV3lqYShfI5vyq2_Asc9HksvtkfhU1sciSTireaZuuBTWBSY5MkpNfE0FLdFmtuB32Yu53s4LvtZ4vZa0umsbako%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

clean_body: I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. Friend — I hope you're doing well this evening!
I'm writing to ask for a donation to support my campaign for Congress ahead of our internal end-of-month deadline at midnight: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_mikefeuer_fr_q12024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78169039/452628713/1732327776?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.01.31_B1_EOMJan24_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU4OWI5Y2MtYTdjMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ld9HZ-k_gEeC0fG0lf4Img75rlbPoJ0Bd7j91zEefmU=)**_
Here's what's happening:
Voting in the 2024 California primary starts in five days, and I am one of fifteen candidates on the ballot to succeed Adam Schiff and represent the 30th Congressional District.
I'm reading the same headlines you are about Trump, antisemitism, and threats to democracy at home and abroad. The urgency of this moment demands a proven national leader who will stand up for democracy and tackle homelessness, gun violence, the climate crisis, and more with skill and integrity.
In the past week, we've received endorsements from former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords and Giffords PAC, the _Los Angeles Sentinel_ , and Vote Common Good — in addition to longstanding support from incredible leaders like Mayor Karen Bass.
Ultimately, though, the voters decide. Our goal is to raise the funds to cut through the noise and inform every voter of my record, my values, and the contrast between the candidates.
Can you contribute now to fuel our voter contact program in these critical final days? You can use this link: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_mikefeuer_fr_q12024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78169041/452628717/1732327776?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.01.31_B1_EOMJan24_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU4OWI5Y2MtYTdjMC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ld9HZ-k_gEeC0fG0lf4Img75rlbPoJ0Bd7j91zEefmU=)**_
I sincerely appreciate your steadfastness, generosity, and patience. If you have any questions about the campaign, please email [info@mikefeuerforcongress.com](mailto:info@mikefeuerforcongress.com).
Thank you,
— Mike

clean_body: Friend — I hope you're doing well this evening! I'm writing to ask for a donation to support my campaign for Congress ahead of our internal end-of-month deadline at midnight: = Here's what's happening: Voting in the 2024 California primary starts in five days, and I am one of fifteen candidates on the ballot to succeed Adam Schiff and represent the 30th Congressional District. I'm reading the same headlines you are about Trump, antisemitism, and threats to democracy at home and abroad. The urgency of this moment demands a proven national leader who will stand up for democracy and tackle homelessness, gun violence, the climate crisis, and more with skill and integrity. In the past week, we've received endorsements from former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords and Giffords PAC, the Los Angeles Sentinel , and Vote Common Good — in addition to longstanding support from incredible leaders like Mayor Karen Bass. Ultimately, though, the voters decide. Our goal is to raise the funds to cut through the noise and inform every voter of my record, my values, and the contrast between the candidates. Can you contribute now to fuel our voter contact program in these critical final days? You can use this link: = I sincerely appreciate your steadfastness, generosity, and patience. If you have any questions about the campaign, please email mailto:info@mikefeuerforcongress.com. Thank you, — Mike | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS Mike Feuer for Congress 16633 Ventura Blvd Suite 1008 Encino, CA 91436 United States | | If you would like to visit our campaign website, If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . body:

It's been a long day, friend, so I'll jump right in: **If Democrats lose in Nevada, we will lose our Senate majority. Full stop.**
That's why hitting our fundraising goals – and having the resources to defeat the GOP – is so critical. But unfortunately, I just got word from my team that we're still $5,274 short of our end-of-month goal with just 3 hours left until the midnight deadline.**

[So please, this is the last call: Will you chip in $5 – even $25 – right now to keep Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78169063/452628772/-1853236879?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3392-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDg5YjljYy1hN2MwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIK9rZzy-ZYroIZwXnNh-ME7_aiIWzoCMMlCSiUBYv0=)**

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Alexandria doesn’t host fancy cocktail fundraisers asking for big checks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re just a few hours away from our January fundraising deadline, and we’re so close to reaching our goal of $375,000 for the month.
#
It’s our deadline day, so we’ll make this quick!
**We’re just a few hours away from our January fundraising deadline, and we’re so close to reaching our goal of $375,000 for the month.** We need to raise $20,241 before midnight. Here’s a look at where we’re at:
Hitting goals like this one is crucial to keeping our 100% people-powered campaign prepared for any attacks that come our way (which is, sadly, all the time) and building the infrastructure needed to re-elect Alexandria to Congress this year.
This campaign is different from others. Alexandria doesn’t host fancy cocktail fundraisers asking for big checks—she’s focused on fighting for all of us.
[Will you rush your first grassroots contribution of $5 to directly support Alexandria and our movement for real, progressive change before midnight?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240131-2.O_8FTx&refcode=em20240131-5741-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5741%2E2526796%2EmCiJrB)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240131-2.O_8FTx&refcode=em20240131-5741-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5741%2E2526796%2EmCiJrB)**
Thanks for making our unapologetic movement for economic, social, and racial justice possible!
— Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240131-2?refcode=em20240131-5741-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=5741_2526796_mCiJrB&akid=5741%2E2526796%2EmCiJrB)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240131-5741-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=5741%2E2526796%2EmCiJrB)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=5741%2E2526796%2EmCiJrB) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=5741%2E2526796%2EmCiJrB) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=5741%2E2526796%2EmCiJrB)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

If we want to save our seat and stop Radical Portland Liberals, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately.

_

_A Note For You, From Lori Chavez-DeRemer
_
Thank you for your unwavering support as we strive to build a stronger, safer, and more prosperous future for Oregon. I am committed to prioritizing the safety of our communities, putting America and Oregon first, supporting our veterans, empowering farmers, improving transportation and infrastructure, and addressing homelessness.

With your continued support, we can work together to implement effective measures and policies that will positively impact the lives of our residents and the overall well-being of Oregon.

Thank you for all your support!

\- Lori Chavez-DeRemer

clean_body: | | | | Personal Message Enclosed | Peter, I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive supporters for January, and I need to make sure you activate your Foundation Membership before the January deadline. If we want to save our seat and stop Radical Portland Liberals, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Border Security, keeping China out of America, and our House majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines... Your membership has never been more critical. Please, use this custom link to activate right now: Thanks for taking action to activate your Foundation Membership, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | A Note For You, From Lori Chavez-DeRemer Thank you for your unwavering support as we strive to build a stronger, safer, and more prosperous future for Oregon. I am committed to prioritizing the safety of our communities, putting America and Oregon first, supporting our veterans, empowering farmers, improving transportation and infrastructure, and addressing homelessness. With your continued support, we can work together to implement effective measures and policies that will positively impact the lives of our residents and the overall well-being of Oregon. Thank you for all your support! \- Lori Chavez-DeRemer | CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 | If you love Oregon as much as Lori does, claim your official Love Oregon T-Shirt! | | | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer (Personal) 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \-

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: TX-15 is going Red to Blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Join me in the fight against Republican extremism.
| Hola folks, my name is Michelle Vallejo, and I am running to defeat far-right Republican Monica De La Cruz and represent my community in Congress.

**The DCCC just announced that they’re putting TX-15 on their 2024 Red to Blue list because this seat is the most competitive House race in Texas and one of 17 most critical House races nationwide.**

Red to Blue races are at the center of Democrats’ efforts to regain our House Majority next year and races like ours in TX-15 are the tip of the spear in the fight against MAGA extremism.

[**My team and I are in the fight of our lives to take back South Texas from extremist GOP incumbent Monica De La Cruz. This is a must-win race — will you chip in whatever you can afford and make a split contribution between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project so we have the resources we need to WIN?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61260?t=6&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Michelle Vallejo and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61261?t=7&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61262?t=8&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61263?t=9&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61264?t=10&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61260?t=11&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM)
We are at a historic crossroads, not just for South Texas, but for our nation.

All across the country we are seeing an all-out assault on our democracy and our fundamental freedoms: pushes for restrictive abortion bans, threats to LGBTQ+ rights, cuts to Medicare and Social Security, and elected officials perpetuating Trump’s Big Lie.

And in Texas, GOP extremists like Monica De La Cruz have not just been paving the way, they have been gleefully leading the charge.

[**We have a chance to take back the House AND the state of Texas. By putting us on their Red to Blue list, the DCCC has validated that TX-15 is a crucial, must-win race — that’s why I’m asking you to step up and make a split donation of any amount between this campaign and the Voter Protection Project today.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61260?t=12&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM)

¡Vamos por Quince!

Michelle Vallejo
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=12776%2E878179%2E5V_9nM)

clean_body: We are just HOURS away from tonight’s critical end-of-month deadline – but we’re still $12,000 short of our must-hit goal. Here’s why we’re urging you to step up: | | | | | ---|--- This is it.We are just HOURS away from tonight’s critical end-of-month deadline – butwe’re still $12,000 short of our must-hit goal. This is the last email we’ll send ahead of our all-important deadline, but here’s why we’re urging you to step up: Earlier this month, Donald Trump won BIG in Iowa and New Hampshire, bringing him one step closer to becoming the Republican nominee. Right now, his MAGA cronies are amped up and ready to win as many seats as possible to give Trump the best chance of passing his extreme agenda in every single state and in every single district. But Democrats have an incredible opportunity to mobilize right now and give state Democrats the resources they need to win, fight Trumpism, defeat extreme Republicans, and make 2024 the Year of the States. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. name: Tammy
subject: Short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We need all hands on deck to defend my toss-up Senate seat.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1936%2E35263%2EKpSd4Q)
Peter — It’s getting late, so I’ll keep this email short. My team let me know we’re still quite a few donations away from hitting our January fundraising goal. With Republican Eric Hovde getting ready to enter this race — and spend at least $20 million of his own fortune to defeat me — we need all hands on deck to defend this toss-up Senate seat. That starts by hitting each and every one of our fundraising goals, including tonight’s. Could you make a donation toward my reelection campaign to help us reach our goal before midnight? I’ll even drop my personal ActBlue link you can use to donate: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-jan24?refcode=tammy-personal](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240131_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1936%2E35263%2EKpSd4Q)** I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t important. Thanks for pitching in, if you’re able. — Tammy

Extremist Republicans have a pattern of negligence that is evident. Inaction on climate change, gun violence, and so much more has skyrocketed to troubling heights under their leadership in the House.

Political pundits, national Republicans, dark money groups — _everyone's_ watching to see if our grassroots supporters are sticking with us as extremism continues to infect Congress and prevent my Democratic colleagues and I from doing work to improve the lives of our constituents.

name: Kim, personal
subject: Our first end-of-month deadline is here, I need to know I have your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This is how we can defend my seat in WA-08 together Peter, We're just a few hours away from our first end-of-month deadline of 2024. So, I'm reaching out to share why it's important we hit our fundraising goal by midnight. Republicans have made it clear they don't know how to govern, nor do they want to. In just the past few weeks alone, we've seen House Republicans bring our country to the brink of _another_ shutdown, consolidate support around Trump, and propose a nationwide abortion ban. At the same time, they’re blocking bipartisan solutions to the crisis at our southern border. Under their leadership, this obstruction will never stop. That's why we must retake the House majority to put a stop to the radical Republican agenda and get back to helping people in Washington state and across the country. But we've got a tough fight ahead of us, so we must get to work now. In 2022, this grassroots team helped me beat the odds and prevent a Republican flip of Washington's 8th District. I'm counting on your support once again as we face our toughest election yet. **Will you donate $5 or whatever you can before midnight to help reach our first end-of-month goal of 2024?[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-january24-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78169635/452630382/-660155977?refcode=em24_240131_eom4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240131_eom4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=680b9311-aec0-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODBiOTMxMS1hZWMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqgK43rENJbperAYfjAFYeraCXdXiXD-HPggtFxY6PY=)** Thank you, Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Judaism is at the very core of my work
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78169808/452630980/-1853236879?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3420-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ4MWMyYi1iMGMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4y-NSMQGYTsiu-L2kfSL1ibZvOw3CvbloNdcus4ajGI=)
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend?
While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that _this_ was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism helps guide much of my work in the Senate today.** **In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**
Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country.** ** And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**
**Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate just set a new GOP fundraising record to defeat me, and recent polling shows me in a dead heat in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**
[**If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you ****– if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love – ****will**** you chip in $5 or more today to help me defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78169809/452630981/-1853236879?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3420-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ4MWMyYi1iMGMwLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4y-NSMQGYTsiu-L2kfSL1ibZvOw3CvbloNdcus4ajGI=)

| **ABOUT NELLA**
**“New Mexico is my home. I was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of my childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas Blvd. and Monroe St. with my seven brothers, sisters, and parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. I began my education at Our Lady of Fatima, where I learned the values I hold today. I am the devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. My family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and it is here that I have always returned, no matter where my life has taken me. My husband Pat and I cherish our home in New Mexico, that we have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like my father and mother, I have been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those whom quality healthcare was out of reach. I have also been a champion of improving the education of our youth in underserved communities.

Like everyone starting their career, I began at the bottom and worked my way up through the complex finance world, where I eventually served as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In my career, I helped build businesses, helped companies grow, and created jobs. With this business experience, I will help New Mexico attract new companies and create jobs - so hardworking New Mexicans can find success and live their American Dream.

New Mexico is blessed with abundant natural resources, cultural diversity and rich traditions, hardworking people, and leading national laboratories. But sadly, our leaders in Washington and Santa Fe have failed us. The cost of living is up, we are in a crime crisis, the border is wide open, and our public education system is leaving our kids behind.

We are clearly on the wrong track. We can and must do better. That’s why I am running for the United States Senate.” _-Nella_**

body:
My final message in your inbox this month | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d3452d9bf6be/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12679623?e=91a702298f)
---
|
---
Hi Friend,
This is John Lee here – I’m on the road campaigning and meeting with voters but wanted to reach out quickly with a brief message.
I just got off the phone with my team, and they made it clear we’re still looking for about $1,500 in campaign resources to come in before midnight tonight in order to keep pace with projections and hit our January goal.
Missing the first monthly goal of the election year would be a major setback, and might lead to budget cuts. I hate asking for money, but since I know we can’t fight off Democrat attack ads without resources – will you consider pitching in $5 or more towards my campaign today so we can make up ground? [**https://secure.winred.com/john-lee-for-nevada/donate-tonight**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=86440e6552&e=91a702298f)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart. I can’t wait to flip this district and deliver an incredible conservative victory with your support.
–John J. Lee
_Sent from my iPhone_
|

---
Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | Senator Cassidy was just recognized with a perfect A+ rating in... Did you hear the good news,** Friend? Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America’s***** 2023 National Pro-Life Scorecard* just came out, and Senator Cassidy received a perfect A+ rating! This rating is a testament to Senator Cassidy's unwavering commitment to defending the sanctity of life and championing pro-life values. | | | | | | With your support, Bill will see that you Stand for Life, and it will motivate him even more to do everything he can to protect the unborn. Don’t delay, send or any amount right away. >> | Thank you. – Cassidy Field Team | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate?** Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Cassidy Field Team PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 \- =

body:
If you can, rush a donation to the Biden-Harris reelection campaign before midnight tonight. | | |
---
**We’ll keep this email short, Peter.** After winning the Iowa caucuses and the New Hampshire primary, Donald Trump has all but locked up the Republican nomination. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: what is the best number to reach you?
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Can you tell me if there's a phone number I could reach you at more effectively?

I’ve emailed you a few times over the past couple of days because I need to hear from 100% of _Students for Life Action’s_ supporters.

I’m worried I’m going to have to make big, devastating cuts to our 2024 programs and I haven’t yet heard any input from you.

_So, I’m wondering if contacting you via phone would be better?_

If it is, just click on the link below and enter your phone number when asked, and I’ll make note of it for the future.

Pro-Life Friend, with so much on the line in 2024, I really need to hear from all of _Students for Life Action’s_ supporters right away.

All I really need is for you to **[please CLICK HERE to fill out your _Students for Life Action Supporter Ballot_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdhuun-duchtdja-y/)** to tell me where you would have me focus our resources.

If we can’t find the resources to avert this budget shortfall, I’m going to have to cut one **_OR MORE_** of these crucial programs, including:

**1._Young Voter Outreach_** – Our programs reaching out to young voters could not be more crucial as we move closer to the elections this fall, as they will be the future of the Pro-Life Movement. Vice President Kamala Harris seems to know this as well, since she’s crisscrossing battleground states trying to mobilize young people on abortion.

We HAVE to fight back as young voters aged 18-34 are the BIGGEST voting demographic in America;

**2._State Legislative Battles_** – Pro-abortion legislation, including radical pro-abortion state referendums, are intentionally written with ambiguous language to confuse voters and allow legislators to define them in a way that permits abortions throughout all nine months of a pregnancy and forces taxpayers to pay for abortions.

We HAVE to stand up to these attacks and continue to fighting to save lives; and/or

**3._Vote Pro-Life First_** – This campaign is designed to help pro-abortion Democrat politicians and cowardly Republicans “retire early” by convincing voters in their districts that ending the violence of abortion should be their #1 priority when it comes time to cast their vote.

As November 2024 nears, we HAVE to ensure every young pro-life voter gets to the polls!
Pro-Life Friend, cuts are the last thing I want right now . . . and I can’t stomach the thought of taking an axe to any one of these critical programs!

But I haven’t yet heard from you . . . and I’m growing more concerned by the day.

Can you please let me know how best to reach you or go ahead and **[fill out your _Students for Life Action Supporter Ballot_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdhuun-duchtdja-j/)** to tell me where you would have me focus our resources?

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sdhuun-026154D2-duchtdja-i) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-sdhuun-duchtdja-d/)
**

**
---
