| John McGuire Out-raises Rep. Bob Good!
---
| | |
---|---
|
All,

Newly-filed campaign finance reports show that we out-raised my opponent Rep. Bob Good during the 4th quarter of 2024.

Good raised $[204,983.32](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ersbvxebZAvkomxaDdQ2XKIS8DrUeKAwVFOST_wnrKSsYj5XYYOqFS9YUdZXkduVaHamcjNpYaUjeLxuAkDAVYemj3oWtAs7pM8NvmwQK8dC1Vv_cR-g4VqOWwxQ-BlzaQXRJA_DqSyQuoXwvjyvVn8pIaIQMukI8VfUrcmt2wiCjcOdMKHEZuIYDrm2OEp-hQhAMDSWzp0=&c=VFv7dWMT_uVibEHbsyo1zvpsglyAWsyYTTPPXnbywQnR2lMpApyGHQ==&ch=Hr24VeVPmSNMlCkOWo_rk1PjvYbHms8XynfNm0aPF7k-eQDVnwo_PA==) McGuire raised $[212,421.86](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ersbvxebZAvkomxaDdQ2XKIS8DrUeKAwVFOST_wnrKSsYj5XYYOqFS9YUdZXkduVc6-07bib5FgiiKBgjITXi2E0NLSo18fpmXD1XTH0TdOXbiJdjFOLDYKZmjn9UmEeKn645sMxFkUDjbrG-DwGv2WUPz1q88b8YhmnSNK7FGx9zOOLadnd7HNVZefWWwujnjoPD0UgdSc=&c=VFv7dWMT_uVibEHbsyo1zvpsglyAWsyYTTPPXnbywQnR2lMpApyGHQ==&ch=Hr24VeVPmSNMlCkOWo_rk1PjvYbHms8XynfNm0aPF7k-eQDVnwo_PA==).

Since announcing for Congress with fewer than 30 fundraising days in the quarter, McGuire raised more money and has clearly built more momentum and excitement for his campaign than Bob Good who had a full quarter.

I'm running for Congress to save Virginia and make America great again -- and we know that re-electing President Trump and giving him backup in Congress is the only way to get that done. Bob Good cannot be trusted to deliver on the America First policies of President Trump, and in fact Bob has worked to undermine Trump time and again.
| | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ersbvxebZAvkomxaDdQ2XKIS8DrUeKAwVFOST_wnrKSsYj5XYYOqFQPEDkzjH-5kGhvdiK8ARrApObr1yIvAFDZasYBjm9loueLm3SJI1ejacU506qe2ZNX4Ze9SV4iamJTYFAhJBxIR21I8FXNca6exuiQAXcFsTJXh0NZ6tfFDiQ6yXxlfag==&c=VFv7dWMT_uVibEHbsyo1zvpsglyAWsyYTTPPXnbywQnR2lMpApyGHQ==&ch=Hr24VeVPmSNMlCkOWo_rk1PjvYbHms8XynfNm0aPF7k-eQDVnwo_PA==)
---|---
|
My opponent Bob Good often publicly disrespects his constituents and he has a history of betraying Trump by saying one thing to the public and something different in private. [click here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ersbvxebZAvkomxaDdQ2XKIS8DrUeKAwVFOST_wnrKSsYj5XYYOqFSoInpQ-t8YEY_e4R-5xbwW2-bc9fRDsHtEKuVaBAf_i4rnZo9rcwmQP9DCiJbFLZQgF1SkGbF0oSOx6zzOMy5V4N93Gsb6DWqjAqNwfW_OLVJhVZT1wbSFCZUH9o4JHLWSdULMqFjc4zSIUn_J4-phnMHqXeC6PhWZrHNDZ7OnPDpiRxAfioF41YRyVmuX6Eso3wm83lN3VEJXZYcDqcPG5DE9vV6h7dC_YHdYBPZg_OLPNc4F-4VwcQPqxodx6R3iyHo0TIf-YtpCe_DrLA4Yl0KuejCuK0Q==&c=VFv7dWMT_uVibEHbsyo1zvpsglyAWsyYTTPPXnbywQnR2lMpApyGHQ==&ch=Hr24VeVPmSNMlCkOWo_rk1PjvYbHms8XynfNm0aPF7k-eQDVnwo_PA==)

Not MAGA: After Governor DeSantis ended his campaign, Bob said: "I have never been caught on camera because I have never trashed President Trump," [CNN anchor Kaitlin Collins played the infamous video of Bob trashing Trump on camera.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ersbvxebZAvkomxaDdQ2XKIS8DrUeKAwVFOST_wnrKSsYj5XYYOqFQ0Xn--uMBn4xvNWbMZ1vjdfTtT6go6_f9TcCnz4LrZKV_VQEa9MfJs5xpBqwui3vLGbrwoZ3sD4e4xcl2OkFoq0zxEUZXkIGL5oPDc-Zo5-vGJyX3ZfLaQwWDZCdNswjFPQgsX4S-4ovu8OZsGQxP8rvtzuKL8Cwg==&c=VFv7dWMT_uVibEHbsyo1zvpsglyAWsyYTTPPXnbywQnR2lMpApyGHQ==&ch=Hr24VeVPmSNMlCkOWo_rk1PjvYbHms8XynfNm0aPF7k-eQDVnwo_PA==)

I am humbled by the tremendous support we have received so far, but we have a long way to go. name: Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
subject: Did you know your tax dollars are funding this organization?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Fellow American,

Care, no matter what.

This is the motto of Planned Parenthood. While it sounds great on the surface, Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls, and to the American people through manipulative and dangerously subtle language.

While they claim to provide healthcare services to women no matter who they are or where they live, abortion can never be healthcare. Further, while they claim to provide numerous services to women, 97.2% of Planned Parenthood’s pregnancy resolution services are devoted to abortions, the purposeful ending of an unborn baby’s life.

**[Does 97.2% of cases brought to Planned Parenthood that end in the death of an innocent child sound like “care” to you?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-jmx4bCkDrg)**

Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women’s fear, and fuels itself on greed. When a woman arrives seeking answers to an unexpected pregnancy, the clock to gain a profit starts ticking. They will do whatever they can to make a woman agree to an abortion because each abortion completed is more profit in their pockets.

At SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to stopping the manipulation and the gruesome deaths of innocent babies. In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands.

[We cannot be the only voice fighting for these precious children and exposing the lies of Planned Parenthood.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this “ _David vs Goliath_ ” battle.

Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country.

**The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now.**

Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below:

[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._23kpUA)
| I can’t tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDMyLWMxZDJmY2UyZTJjYTRiOTY4ZWY5NWI5OGY1M2VkNjg0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/FmT_fBf5LsXgJkvp1W5JTw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Urgent Call to Support Impeachment Proceedings Against Alejandro Mayorkas
body:
We need your support to make our voices heard and demand the necessary actions to address this situation.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| The recent actions and decisions of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas have raised serious concerns about his ability to uphold the principles and responsibilities of his office.
In light of this, the US House of Representatives will begin impeachment hearings soon. We believe these hearings and proceedings are crucial to ensure accountability and protect the integrity of our government institutions. His handling of the immigration crisis at our southern border has demonstrated a lack of competence and a disregard for the citizens of America.
We need your support to make our voices heard and demand the necessary actions to address this situation. Here's how you can help:

1. **[Sign the Petition:](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979467fd5bfb/1edb979467fb11b2 "https://alignact.com/go/impeach-alejandro-mayorkas-now")** Join thousands of concerned citizens in demanding impeachment. Visit our AlignAct page today to [sign the petition](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979467fd5bfb/1edb979467fb11b4 "sign the petition")!

2. **Spread the Word:** Share this email with your friends, family, and colleagues who may share our concerns. Encourage them to join the cause and make their voices heard.

3. **Contact Your Representatives:** Reach out to your elected officials and urge them to support impeachment proceedings against Secretary Mayorkas.

We believe in the importance of holding our government officials accountable for their actions, and your support is crucial in achieving this goal. Together, we can ensure that our government operates with transparency, integrity, and in the best interests of the American people. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin ************

name: Jerry Evans
subject: Our Team is Growing - Two More Endorsements
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| Friend,
This past week our team was humbled to receive the support of two prominent Illinois patriots. Both State Senator Craig Wilcox and Chairman Michael Buehler have officially announced their endorsement of our campaign for Congress and have pledged their support of our mission here in the Illinois 11th!
---
|
---
|
---
| With their support and the support of others like you in this district, we will continue to build a movement and win in March! It will take more than just words though. Every dollar [raised](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MAdNk8sIol4fh73Ce05NzcXjyL07zYW0I5ywfAGCP2a_yNs-rJkwqvAYENZaEkovGgKfLZS1GylzzvFoxoMN7iqRdzHpdx17bbFcgNKN80evQO0TOENXssL1s5fw_hfLpkltNIaHZbQPXdUabBAgFSlEYCJ3DhjejITc8hGybKS7ubU1p7BE5FDkZdVMx2KhvNasdnJxiwQ=&c=Of3RR6xzEPMneMXP9cG0rEzcGXbehMyonr7CDyiggfd2w9J44HKQ2A==&ch=78gDI4wS1321URS6LSJZRnd9U29_hcuxJtOb9Mvjd_UR20krWRd46A==) will go towards sharing our message with the people of the 11th and bring us closer to victory. [Donate now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MAdNk8sIol4fh73Ce05NzcXjyL07zYW0I5ywfAGCP2a_yNs-rJkwqvAYENZaEkovGgKfLZS1GylzzvFoxoMN7iqRdzHpdx17bbFcgNKN80evQO0TOENXssL1s5fw_hfLpkltNIaHZbQPXdUabBAgFSlEYCJ3DhjejITc8hGybKS7ubU1p7BE5FDkZdVMx2KhvNasdnJxiwQ=&c=Of3RR6xzEPMneMXP9cG0rEzcGXbehMyonr7CDyiggfd2w9J44HKQ2A==&ch=78gDI4wS1321URS6LSJZRnd9U29_hcuxJtOb9Mvjd_UR20krWRd46A==) to continue supporting our campaign and the shaping the future here in Illinois.
As we are approaching the March 19th primary, we have begun reaching out to voters, but we need your help. We are looking for volunteers to sign-up to phone bank or knock on doors to help us get out the vote. If you would like to phone bank with our team, please sign up [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MAdNk8sIol4fh73Ce05NzcXjyL07zYW0I5ywfAGCP2a_yNs-rJkwqh2cUnnRkbHog6mr0ruZ9VZT4uzyL5Dk8YVqHgJ1uDPbUslw8IRtgm68f7IQ-mndtY771EEbbPOwg0W61AkH8uExCvb0wErUBgBe5iP3GLwq&c=Of3RR6xzEPMneMXP9cG0rEzcGXbehMyonr7CDyiggfd2w9J44HKQ2A==&ch=78gDI4wS1321URS6LSJZRnd9U29_hcuxJtOb9Mvjd_UR20krWRd46A==). Also, if you can join us to knocking doors in your neighborhoods, please sign up [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MAdNk8sIol4fh73Ce05NzcXjyL07zYW0I5ywfAGCP2a_yNs-rJkwqh2cUnnRkbHogh_xVeuIrRbIWsDLuRDmNwMrUM9BgDegYJVsIZu5RbDhoSDm0tcxxsFkH0CVaHOfKQRDjfU_b31U3jPomopnQxGbk0Gu_Wod&c=Of3RR6xzEPMneMXP9cG0rEzcGXbehMyonr7CDyiggfd2w9J44HKQ2A==&ch=78gDI4wS1321URS6LSJZRnd9U29_hcuxJtOb9Mvjd_UR20krWRd46A==) and someone from the campaign will get in touch with you. I would very much appreciate any time that you could volunteer.
For the cause,
Jerry Evans
P.S. I know that running a campaign is a team effort and that no candidate can win on their own. Therefore, I am asking you to share this message with your friends, family, and neighbors who wish to join the campaign. A donation of just [$40](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MAdNk8sIol4fh73Ce05NzcXjyL07zYW0I5ywfAGCP2a_yNs-rJkwqvAYENZaEkovGgKfLZS1GylzzvFoxoMN7iqRdzHpdx17bbFcgNKN80evQO0TOENXssL1s5fw_hfLpkltNIaHZbQPXdUabBAgFSlEYCJ3DhjejITc8hGybKS7ubU1p7BE5FDkZdVMx2KhvNasdnJxiwQ=&c=Of3RR6xzEPMneMXP9cG0rEzcGXbehMyonr7CDyiggfd2w9J44HKQ2A==&ch=78gDI4wS1321URS6LSJZRnd9U29_hcuxJtOb9Mvjd_UR20krWRd46A==) can help us reach more voters with our message of conservative, common sense change. Also, please visit our website at [jerryevansforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MAdNk8sIol4fh73Ce05NzcXjyL07zYW0I5ywfAGCP2a_yNs-rJkwqoMLXXD1pdn41mLzDQZ4R1aHXHQVpR3NCIYMcBw-3mr3jg5n77GRT3GJb3xq7u4Mh0gvw7MIHE1rFbPdqp6tEPgpO8tX1vVTkfgeBK55Tzwk&c=Of3RR6xzEPMneMXP9cG0rEzcGXbehMyonr7CDyiggfd2w9J44HKQ2A==&ch=78gDI4wS1321URS6LSJZRnd9U29_hcuxJtOb9Mvjd_UR20krWRd46A==) to find out how you can help our movement here at home!

name: The Flyover
subject: DeSantis Beats Disney, the Clydesdales Return, and Spy vs. Spy Poll
body:
A Senate panel told the CEOs of five major social media companies that they have "blood" on their hands for risking children's safety on their platforms.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---
| | |
# THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1790, the U.S. Supreme Court convened for the first time. Chief Justice John Jay presided over a Court of six judges with nothing to do because there were no appeals to hear. ([Who Were The First Justices?](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvszAQgOFfA5vR-WJwGDx8S7Z8a0dkzDlcZHBkH6H991U7d3rHV3o-7tPdc-L98d9v5CTmyQfhN02otEIzmXZxkQjp0pLTFgY72h6u7eqsB5zHZfY2LHgFa4eoexONNnHuIeqWHQIaQNAa-gGuXRgH3y9kzdzjGOzYGKCFJZfumXmXlWL6ym8qXchbm9wq8qrN5V-DtwZvIe9VWA7hvAfahUqXy6PB25zyT841q5MKKVlJRS5VVOVPVY9XoY1UyEcR9TyqcKDaFre8Tk6J62AbA4_Nc_rdyl8G3wEAAP__2ANf0g)) We're happy to report in our Sports section today that Budweiser is bringing its Clydesdale horses back for a warm-hearted Super Bowl ad. Yes, it's clearly an effort to move past the Bud Light fiasco, but who doesn't like the Clydesdales? ## Congress Hammers Social Media Moguls
A Senate panel told the CEOs of five major social media companies that they have "blood" on their hands for risking children's safety on their platforms. At one point, Sen. Josh Hawley asked Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg if he wanted to apologize to families for the harm Facebook has caused. Zuckerberg stood and faced the packed audience to apologize. [The video is here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskr2O3CAUhZ-G6RjBNX8uXETZuNttU1oMXMZE2Izw3bH27SOPk24r0DmHn0_n_n6f3n0ueb1_-AUHSnXygfITJ-CSg5rUJQ4JEbC74CCtMLa3WrjLPETtk9fGSSfACCk6B53RyYIXCZKylzyAACVASCm0Ee4aeuN1RKtuGvpge6YExky1Xf_UvNKMqXzVJ7ZrqMulDDPRY2PdDwYjg5H2THR6DMZ3H0bfil_xA_eNwbiRp89jI60Gq2wHwoE0EkyvWTc2TNPWAuveaD9W0PoXpZ2Btj9pD355nNKOSLjcMP5zCNvycr679ozc2ytgdPCyi15Cr4ODgO4WQqeCll5Z5Yy-oU1Ouv9P1vV1bJMTA3N877MV1r2d0KAPbH2Aaxj3fb_ievfxjnTyaxg3XD0hJyxl41sN2Re-YMyeB6wbpxm_-OyfyG-l1sjreki58dmvceOpNp7O4jlV_miVMBAPcy6x4cqlFUpK59R1pqVc2hAfey4lb8YyJe6Lz-XVEn03Mn8DAAD__9GQuVI) The four-hour hearing covered a lot of ground, veering at one point into questions about TikTok's relationship with China. ## DeSantis Beats Disney in Court
A federal judge dismissed Disney's lawsuit against Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis in a [major setback for the media giant's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2u3CAUBOCnsTsswPiHgiKNu02b0sLmYJ8Ig8VhF-3bR5vb3OJ230hTjObPY31YDBiP3_YCU3xa7V7wBatkgkm1qtYZDyChb8GIiY-TngY-t6fpB60VWO-3TWgu-caVn0DNVvDR9QO0aCSXiksuBB9GPne7Hu3gYFLbIPU-6UZxcFhS7v4mjOUEH97pBbnb09UGc5ZyU9P_auTSyKXW2p0phHdNyWW4Uy5fzUYu25MwAtE3sgj1kx1ShDcLttITC7OHxUiF-ZAyOsuO9GI5ReaAbCxIjG7Y0QbmkErGvXxwIRE4JmQ_zEKMY9_Ipc3G3RVDQBqnRvHjshj-Dy8_vfgvAAD__xFkduo) legal battle over control of the Reedy Creek board. Disney sued after DeSantis dismissed the board and created a new one to oversee the property around Disney World. The company claimed it was the victim of political retaliation, violating its free speech rights. The court [tossed out the case](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOozAQQL_GdI6MY2woKK6hy7VXogEPZqKJHeEhUf7-tCttt_Ur3tP7d5tvQEw5_YUHjrKVGVahF85Wt9q62TVx3BAtXhsc22B8GEJn-mYfh2Xz7TCAgaWz2G-rD71rXe987xcXY0OjNdYZa9rWdN70l3Xw0EUMbunssIZBOYORpByXe6EsO278KS88Lmt5NDzuIs-qrn-UnZSdZMedmL-YstOB6WQQKlnZaS3nIXoBEcaq7OScM13o9f2MCbWUWrHqSDXjp2qGdz1JNCSgXEVHrJCFqgZmTJSTfhYmoRVYHyjA9KNpjjE-38RM1QflTHoAffc08tu4_wEAAP__Ka9yEg), ruling that Disney had no standing to sue because it showed no injury from the board change. The judge also ruled that DeSantis' motivations were irrelevant since the takeover complied with state law.
## PGA Gets $3 Billion Investment
[The PGA Tour](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOrCAUxvGnwe4YOCCMBcVt7Oa2WxrEo7KLYgDH7NtvZuutv3zJL_-P5_h0IYZj_e92snVJo_M1vGhEEIBqVM1sFyIk2ZAVhmvTm44_ms12k1y46rSRk1YP42avOqekFE7gor1vgkWOiiMXgneaP1rfa9fNZNTUYe9NzxSnOdSU288UjrrREr_Ti3Lr095Eu9V6Fib_MRwYDvd9t5muSrm8d4ZDOVOuheGwprgwHM7VQU1XhnB8FZAwhRhDOmAmF-EOdYOrgE9HSbmGa4e3DrgAKRgOTbbzeb8fRRum-Lq7EH8h9a8qPwEAAP__tExisg) received a $3 billion investment from Strategic Sports Group, an investment firm featuring American executives and owners of professional sports franchises. The partnership between the two is [separate from the commercial venture](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGPpSAUBeBfg901iIqPwmJfYbHJ23ZLg3hRZhAcuD7jv5849XQnOclJvvP_Nb608y4s__SGPdk4akPujaOACkQzNsXcW0SBdYF91XHZqa7lj2Lt1VRLNdmqredpmppOGm6VtVJZi7rmsnC94KLhglcVbyV_lEZJ3c7YNVMrlOkUazjOjmIqP6ILtKL1V3xjKk3cCt-vRHtm9R8mBiaG8zzLLYe7Y2LAAEdmYsh7THQHc5lbwcSwLxooHgkyJfeJGWqYnPcuBphRezgdrWAxnPoCjzO48MZMGwaCJcVjh93rC1MGirAgAX4dji6IZ8CUV7czMegEz2e1Xob_LVI_7-e9n2XHGr5s2vkfAP325ncAAAD__7gNeiE) framework the PGA Tour signed eight months ago with the Saudi-backed LIV Golf. The deal calls for a new entity, [PGA Tour Enterprises,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL3SpCAQRZ8Gs7aw_UEDgk3MZtMNLZBWmULaAmbcefut2fhL7z3BqfPnsTyMDz7uv81Jumy8mLX4Ny0IDWC3dJXTGxFSW5FulBzUpHo5VoducFTUWtuaUVnsGjUpu209SunGYVJj5TVK7CTKppH9IMd6nQbTO1Kd7XFa1SQ6Sc4XTvWTfSwHbeHDb0r1ymcV9FHKlUX7S-AscL7vu15tjnTn7y9wtpwLR4HzdxM4X7uBwq8EG8XbfCBfnEqGPfHrgicfEQ6K6QMtWB-C5wiOQzAJfHxTLifFAo5MgEQOMv8VOFdJu-v-0nlQopP7aXz4r1d-avUvAAD__0WzbQ0) to be set up as a for-profit venture that will offer players more than $1.5 billion in equity ownership to compete with the high bonuses paid to star golfers who joined the LIV tour.

clean_body: A Senate panel told the CEOs of five major social media companies that they have "blood" on their hands for risking children's safety on their platforms. | | | | | | THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1790, the U.S. Supreme Court convened for the first time. Chief Justice John Jay presided over a Court of six judges with nothing to do because there were no appeals to hear. () We're happy to report in our Sports section today that Budweiser is bringing its Clydesdale horses back for a warm-hearted Super Bowl ad. Yes, it's clearly an effort to move past the Bud Light fiasco, but who doesn't like the Clydesdales? In case you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can do that here . | Congress Hammers Social Media Moguls A Senate panel told the CEOs of five major social media companies that they have "blood" on their hands for risking children's safety on their platforms. At one point, Sen. Josh Hawley asked Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg if he wanted to apologize to families for the harm Facebook has caused. Zuckerberg stood and faced the packed audience to apologize. The four-hour hearing covered a lot of ground, veering at one point into questions about TikTok's relationship with China. A roundup of the high points from a tech viewpoint , and for a political overview, . DeSantis Beats Disney in Court A federal judge dismissed Disney's lawsuit against Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis in a legal battle over control of the Reedy Creek board. Disney sued after DeSantis dismissed the board and created a new one to oversee the property around Disney World. The company claimed it was the victim of political retaliation, violating its free speech rights. The court , ruling that Disney had no standing to sue because it showed no injury from the board change. The judge also ruled that DeSantis' motivations were irrelevant since the takeover complied with state law. PGA Gets $3 Billion Investment received a $3 billion investment from Strategic Sports Group, an investment firm featuring American executives and owners of professional sports franchises. The partnership between the two is framework the PGA Tour signed eight months ago with the Saudi-backed LIV Golf. The deal calls for a new entity, to be set up as a for-profit venture that will offer players more than $1.5 billion in equity ownership to compete with the high bonuses paid to star golfers who joined the LIV tour. We're happy to report that The Flyover keeps growing, approaching 550,000 readers thanks to our advertisers and readers like you. mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to share with your friends and family. | ➤**A House committee advanced impeachment charges against Homeland Security Chief Alejandro Mayorkas for not protecting the border. A vote in the full House could come as early as next week. () ➤ Fani Willis, the district attorney in Donald Trump's Georgia case, has been subpoenaed to testify at a Feb. 15 hearing about allegations that she hired her romantic partner as lead prosecutor and financially benefited from it. () ➤ Themilitia group accused of killing U.S. troops said it was suspending military operations in Iraq and would no longer target American soldiers. The move comes as President Biden weighs retaliatory measures. () ➤ The Georgia House voted almost unanimously to require watermarks on election ballots to help convince voters of the upcoming election's integrity. It must still pass the state Senate. ( | Hello Flyover Reader! We've officially survived January. Have I ever mentioned that I don't like the first two months of the year? Christmas is over, the weather stinks, and it's generally gray and drab outside. However... Retreating indoors has its benefits. It's a great time to work on new projects, and we've been busy. In January, we jumped to 550,000 readers, hired two new employees, and launched a brand new newsletter: . It was a jam-packed month, but we're just getting started for 2024. We want to reach another half a million people, and we'd love to create a second state-specific newsletter. All of that work requires people, of course. We need to hire a few more smart, hardworking Americans to meet our goals this year. If you enjoy The Flyover and would like to help us grow, would you donate today? We count it as a privilege to bring you the news (and a few laughs; I can hear our head writer cracking up as I type this. Something good must be coming). Thanks for being a part of The Flyover family . \- Cole, CEO | ➤ The Seattle Seahawks hired former Baltimore Ravens defensive coordinator Mike Macdonald as the team's new head coach. The Ravens' defense ranked first in sacks and points allowed. () ➤ Baltimore native David Rubenstein has agreed to buy the Baltimore Orioles from its current owners for $1.725 billion. The other MLB owners still have to approve the deal. () ➤ The Budweiser Clydesdales are returning to the Super Bowl with a new ad as Anheuser-Busch looks to win back customers. The Clydesdale ad, "Old-School Delivery," harkens back to horse-drawn beer deliveries. () | Market Report 1/31/24 | ▼ | NASDAQ Natl. Assoc. of Securities Dealers Automated Quotations | 15,164.01 | -2.23% ---|---|---|--- ▼ | SPX S&P 500 | 4,848.87 | -1.55% ▼ | DJI Dow Jones Industrial Average | 38,150.30 | -0.82% ▼ | BTC Bitcoin | $42,167.0 | -1.00% ▲ | PARA Paramount Global | $23.33 | +21.57% ➤ Big Stock Move: Paramount Global stock rose 22% after media mogul Byron Allen made a $14.3 billion bid for the company, his second attempt to buy it. () ➤ eBay agreed to a $59 million settlement with the Justice Department for selling pill presses that could be used to make counterfeit drugs. The company said it would also increase security in the future. () ➤ Boeing beat 4th quarter expectations by cutting losses to $30 million and increasing aircraft production. The results came before the FAA grounded 170 of its planes for safety issues. () ➤ The Federal Reserve signaled they were still hesitant to begin cutting interest rates. Fed Chair Jerome Powell said he wants to see more "good data" before lowering them. () | Flying together with our sponsor We recognize that not all of our readers are in a position to donate to our cause, and that's okay! There's another extremely valuable way you can help The Flyover. If you have friends that you think would enjoy our emails, you can use mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to refer them. We appreciate you! | ➤ A new device called "WEHEAD" connects to ChatGPT via a screen that displays a human face with expressions and a voice for conversations with the AI, like a disembodied concierge. () ➤ An astrophotographer in Iceland captured a rare northern lights phenomenon where the Earth's magnetic field causes the lights to visibly ripple, like a vibrating guitar string. () ➤ Neanderthals and humans lived side by side for thousands of years in Northern Europe before Neanderthals went extinct, according to a new genetic analysis of bone fragments in Germany. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤**The world 's first wireless charging hearing aids cost less than $100. () | ➤ **President Biden 's approval rating dropped to 38% in January as border worries rose, according to a Reuters-Ipsos poll. Immigration rose six points to become the No. 1 concern of 17% of Americans. () ➤A WalletHub survey found that 34% of Gen Zers don't think their parents set a good financial example for them, a larger share than in any other generation. () ➤Most Americans feel they pay too much in taxes and get too little in return, a new AP-NORC survey shows. That goes for federal taxes, local property taxes, and state sales taxes. () | ➤ A Gustav Klimt painting worth $54 million was found after being lost for nearly 100 years. The painting will go up for auction, where Klimt's art has fetched huge sums. () ➤ A record number of people won a South Carolina lottery, with 3,351 ticket buyers all choosing the same number, 4-4-4-4, in the state's "Pick 4" lottery. Each winner got either $2,500 or $5,000 per play. () ➤A Washington D.C. man spent months building a large model of Dulles Airport using 50,000 Lego pieces. The finished Lego model will go on display at the real-life airport. () | Who's your favorite TV/movie spy? 1. 2. 3. 4. 5. 6. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: this is it . . .
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I didn’t want it to have to come to this.

But with Bidenflation hitting us hard right now and the Abortion Lobby doubling its efforts for 2024, we just don’t have enough gas in the tank to fund all our programs this year.

By tomorrow morning, I’ll have to make the decision on which of _Students for Life Action’s_ life-saving programs I’ll have to cut for good.

**And my biggest fear is that I don’t hear from you, Pro-Life Friend.**

So, **[please CLICK HERE to fill out your _Students for Life Action Supporter Ballot_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdklliy-duchtdja-y/)** before the deadline at **11:59 PM TONIGHT** , so I can make an informed decision.

**[And after you do, please make your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25 right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdklliy-duchtdja-j/)!**

If we can’t find the resources to avert this budget shortfall, I’m going to have to cut one **_OR MORE_** of these crucial programs:

**1._Young Voter Outreach_** – Our programs reaching out to young voters could not be more crucial as we move closer to the elections this fall, as they will be the future of the Pro-Life Movement. If young voters don’t matter, then why is Vice President Kamala Harris crisscrossing battleground states trying to mobilize young people on abortion?

We HAVE to fight back as young voters aged 18-34 are the BIGGEST voting demographic in America;

**2._State Legislative Battles_** – Pro-abortion legislation, including radical pro-abortion state referendums, are intentionally written with ambiguous language to confuse voters and allow legislators to define them in a way that permits abortions throughout all nine months of a pregnancy and forces taxpayers to pay for abortions.

We HAVE to stand up to these attacks and continue fighting to save lives; and/or

**3._Vote Pro-life First_** – This campaign is designed to help pro-abortion Democrat politicians and cowardly Republicans “retire early” by getting voters in their districts to know that ending the violence of abortion should be their #1 priority when it comes time to cast their vote. As November 2024 nears, we MUST ensure every young pro-life voter gets to the polls!
Pro-Life Friend, cuts are the last thing I want right now . . . I can’t stomach the thought of taking an axe to any one of these critical programs!

Of course, there is always the option that I don’t cut any of these programs, but the only way that happens is if I can rely on some major help from all our supporters!

So please, **[once you’ve filled out your _Supporter Ballot_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdklliy-duchtdja-i/)** , consider making your **[most generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25 to _Students for Life Action_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdklliy-duchtdja-d/)** before **TONIGHT’S 11:59 PM** deadline!

Millions of little preborn boys and girls are counting on us to fight for them in 2024 – _this is your last chance to have an impact!_

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – By tomorrow morning, I’ll have to make the decision on which of _Students for Life Action’s_ life-saving programs I’ll have to cut for good.

But if I can hear from all our supporters before the **11:59 PM** deadline **TONIGHT** and have your full support Pro-Life Friend, I might not have to make any cuts at all!

**That’s why I need your opinion urgently!**

**[Please fill out your _Students for Life Action Supporter Ballot_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdklliy-duchtdja-h/)** , and then please consider making your **[most generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdklliy-duchtdja-k/)!**

subject: Sign: Stand with Taylor Swift against right-wing attacks
body:
| | | | |

# [Add your name: "I stand WITH Taylor Swift and AGAINST the haters!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3382388a-cbf0-4a76-bb2f-e83799c1a23f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | For some bizarre reason, right-wingers appear to be "triggered" by Taylor Swift and her relationship with NFL star Travis Kelce. They are attacking her on social media and elsewhere, and making up absurd conspiracy theories about the couple being "[secret agents](https://default.salsalabs.org/T392dc0cf-65d8-44ec-a485-e2d51d2c33c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)" working on behalf of the deep state -- even claiming that the whole NFL season has been secretly rigged to allow them to re-elect Joe Biden (go ahead, Google it, it's crazy). [**We stand WITH Taylor Swift, and AGAINST the haters.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98e5429b-d2fe-4512-8632-cb2191262679/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) She has worked hard for her success, and if the haters are jealous, that's their fault, not hers. Plus, she's used her success for good, having done a ton to promote voter registration by young people, which is a great cause. And if the two of them are happy together, good for them! [**So please join us, show your support, and stand WITH Taylor Swift and AGAINST the haters!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T750e9959-8d35-4af9-9015-9f095ae20a0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Corporate media is broken beyond repair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Last Country, Inc
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vseRVqKi7N

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oseRVqKi7N

Hey there,

These are wild times, and we've never needed honest
reporting more.

Think about all the generationally-changing stories
unfolding at this very moment. Chaotic global wars. An
unresolvable presidential race. Unprecedented global migration.

We've never seen anything like this, and understanding
what's really happening isn't always easy. Establishment media,
which is supposed to provide clarity, is actually doing the
opposite. Instead of holding the powerful to account, corporate
journalists manipulate the public and hide essential information
to protect the status quo. It's time for change.

Corporate media is broken beyond repair, and the only way
forward is to build something better. That's what TCN is for.
We're committed to covering news with relentless honesty,
unbiased curiosity, and no corporate influence whatsoever.

Our team has spent months creating interviews,
documentaries, analyses, and more about the stories that really
matter, and we're thrilled to have begun unveiling them.

We hope you'll join us.

Best wishes,

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Get “The Federalist Papers”on DVD
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkurmvoc6avvuftu4ema733au2gc9hitnmul5740_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3g61o74sth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zahc5httseiijnnvkiq45ov9f4l3gejib65dndq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3g61o74sth2bs)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z06cj84eeg31c593j603kuca7ihvc52947qnu8no_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3g61o74sth2bs)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’m not suicidal . .
body:
At 39, I've lived a good life. Whether it's complete or not is not up to me. What happens next, I don't know. If there's more to come here, so be it. | | | If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Funsubscribe%2FwJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FRYg7637FYR0R0Muo2w8925vKyQ/1/0100018d64c56751-6bb06c4b-9b21-49b8-aa43-6b0fcf77196b-000000/bPtJwNMFc7mbi0fBLuEPRQAW-xo=359)** to be removed.
* * *
---
| [ ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcD02bnilpIVaKijUgMiJow%2FRYg7637FYR0R0Muo2w8925vKyQ/1/0100018d64c56751-6bb06c4b-9b21-49b8-aa43-6b0fcf77196b-000000/JUc29UuYTAaqplO4kQH5LuExhUY=359)
---
* * *

Please read the message below from our sponsor, O'Keefe Media Group (OMG).
We encourage you to [**visit their site today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcD02bnilpIVaKijUgMiJow%2FRYg7637FYR0R0Muo2w8925vKyQ/2/0100018d64c56751-6bb06c4b-9b21-49b8-aa43-6b0fcf77196b-000000/V1K3qxe4gc-UBXojc_tpHDFJaDQ=359).

* * *
| [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcD02bnilpIVaKijUgMiJow%2FRYg7637FYR0R0Muo2w8925vKyQ/3/0100018d64c56751-6bb06c4b-9b21-49b8-aa43-6b0fcf77196b-000000/YeQioplj8_NPMm7ALolnF3bn30Y=359)

[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcD02bnilpIVaKijUgMiJow%2FRYg7637FYR0R0Muo2w8925vKyQ/4/0100018d64c56751-6bb06c4b-9b21-49b8-aa43-6b0fcf77196b-000000/TsXEiXoBTa5DSL-cgBDXI_oG9QQ=359) Dear Friend,

People familiar with the next investigation I've released keep texting me, asking if I fear for my life. Here is my response:

At 39, I've lived a good life. Whether it's complete or not is not up to me. What happens next, I don't know. If there's more to come here, so be it. I've learned the pursuit of truth requires extreme risk while operating without a safety net. I've experienced so much. I've lived ten lives compressed into a fraction of one.

That's all that a man can hope for. Meteoric highs, extreme lows, and near-death experiences, Jail and jury trials, travels to every state dozens of times, adventures, travails, failures, betrayals, and loves lost and gained, repeated valleys, moving and climbing mountains, enduring multiple rebirths and renewals.

What I learned is written in three books, particularly American Muckraker, and filmed masterclasses, released and unreleased.

I've received love from a balanced family with honest parents and sincere grandparents who raised me to have a manically driven work ethic, all while believing in the best in people. From my vantage point, that last thing is on the verge of extinction unless things fundamentally change.

I built a good organization from nothing, which did good things. I'm taking lessons from the first company and building a better one from nothing, which I know will do more extraordinary things.

**Challenging Leviathan itself is hard enough.**

Leviathan doesn't like being challenged. But as nearly impossible as that is, the enemy and its injustice is no longer what bothers me. An enemy can't betray you. Only people you think are good can do that.

It has been an indescribable hell on earth for me to witness people go against everything they claim to believe in - everything good and right, in service to their love of money and power. I've witnessed envy destroy people whose hearts I thought I knew. I've seen an unhealthy obsession with comfort and safety from countless others. These weaknesses stand between us and what we're "up against."

Which leads me to the video I've released.

I'm not suicidal, but I'm also not afraid to die.

Now, I'm indifferent to the outcome and frankly numb to the consequences of truth-telling. I've adapted to faith over fear.

The mission is to discover other people whose principles are not for sale -- who will do the right thing rather than talk about doing the right thing. I'm tired of seeing 10s of thousands of people sliding into my DMs complaining to my team about how bad things are... and then they make excuses or do nothing.

I'm tired, Boss.

So here I stand; I can do no other. As has been said, "If they're gonna kill me, they're going to kill me." Let's do this. Let's get 2024 started. Let's inspire others to be brave. Let's raise the stakes. Let's expose them all!

Tune in to our recent release and **[please, support OMG by donating today.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcD02bnilpIVaKijUgMiJow%2FRYg7637FYR0R0Muo2w8925vKyQ/5/0100018d64c56751-6bb06c4b-9b21-49b8-aa43-6b0fcf77196b-000000/6Wbi6zwkUUSBbeInKjtq8bLDEyk=359)**

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcD02bnilpIVaKijUgMiJow%2FRYg7637FYR0R0Muo2w8925vKyQ/6/0100018d64c56751-6bb06c4b-9b21-49b8-aa43-6b0fcf77196b-000000/zanKdQaF6Rug9iFmDO99ZsZiB7c=359)

name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682247%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PcjAlMIOVO76M%2bqsqVyKzA&sysid=1 "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it’s time to hold them accountable. Here’s how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here’s how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682248%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aIq85mcBvgbQVeV5RxwaBw&sysid=1 "Donate")

Here’s why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I’ve been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI’s unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It’s why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that’s when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682249%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g92rY9eaI9%2fjQ6RFaLpMBg&sysid=1)

[Donate >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682240%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=344qk4uZqFf%2f2%2bT5MozcYQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the “Lawfare” used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It’s time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682241%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IWmOdHaIXBT7HaLKViSvGg&sysid=1)

Art by [Alyssa Hinton](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXajuU__TyzHKG2uGFWzVhnze1YRo6axCQIHtR9ExsauBRYR6POXR8ueF4kYhbof5QsDQCQNC0s7WY4tg-hg3AsloOnfAm6RgXC44JhlD4Q-6leL7qRFYJqJr1DESdYwe9sjGxmTTbdgttItWueABS_PoqsJuBeK1vekmjpjNtY49GhOyyhccWpbrnrBsQbY70lRsyeGBOBUh4rcFuSrzE0s4Xl4FoTTAiJnJmDGTxLO7RsWLu7PFnLGWT2b63dLWkw/43h/C1UTnelVSfiGvtilk_tRww/h2/ovh2GfS8Ch71zKqIZs7TPDwTJsu3j9lcRtp4rm0xfsU) The Water Walk is an ancient technology to pray for and give thanks to Water or _Mani_ , in the Yesá:sahį language of the Monacan [Monascane], Occaneechi, Sappony, Haliwa Saponi, and the Ohio Band of Saponi. Water Walk specifics differ across Indigenous cultures. **Location and details for the 2024 Water Walk will be provided upon registration. If you need a travel stipend in order to attend, let us know when you register.** _Register at_[ _7directionsofservice.com/water-walk-2024_](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4YjUFc3x4YalhIlWumtQ98J4qZZNMpZU_v9rhUtuSQPkRRxKehrcq0GE7N5eimQogPDWjkX05hKn99xnAuNlDsvhB1Aa2AKviEVs9Rt4AwDK_IU2b9VK3Vq215Bc0VeHH1Xo__R1kHsDCpFJQyW_cNZeoFNnHl0aUonmJUCqV6DnhNuLd484N9rf_MKUcQqFSlJ-eUi5e_sxhUaAdLM0p4Lg6-nurjK7GQ5bSocR59dW8LODCsHXQsLAeWd4Uwhv7Nc/43h/C1UTnelVSfiGvtilk_tRww/h3/lV4F7_XWzRpfrm0J7LlpsYPQeZqvL9OlTvqLDgLn9N4) Resistance and resilience are inextricable from Indigenous and Afro-Indigenous experiences, surviving centuries of continuous land theft, genocide, cultural erasure, and systemic oppression. As we unite across differences and connect the dots between past and present assaults of settler colonialism, fossil fuel expansion, and the climate crisis _worldwide_ , the 2024 Water Walk will highlight some of the fossil fuel expansion projects locally – like the [Mountain Valley Pipeline](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCAJXUoiUXsk687GCWzn8dB7EY_GqCJQ5Cr_NLeTNIKA8Z_JLoytyyGaXsscVByK_ZgMpUd1typQictxdNV1116Hxt66_2Zfvb0Udrua0cOnu09_SZ_zRnqaz6tdPUqrJY3aSeQlE5Fi5mJ7gPspYRE6b4bEDhcxDHfdz1IxzLLxFKRtZMSiwf_QDh7qQ1ewWjOaP8W8W1uupsP4Uv8HUtE1Gp6P_OCH_Rp21dO_fo3Y/43h/C1UTnelVSfiGvtilk_tRww/h4/8iGjWvMDQDhCJAGKW84S-qmlunGr_IqeBQ2YUTSvh0o) [Buc-ee’s](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4YjE9B3RrGt38oysUF_l3MnHwvbjQdwBEL8Ib0gYGA3wNz1jvJzPNeijDrGivFdM4U-mZNWTzqjOnBij_XHq3TS8zAgZ4KThsSlCeB6adBREuEM0WtLAOsDDUAc5mtQ2pmP6gky9veL3Qr-X9wEU_dq7EGVE0N9q-5d7n8ZDgNIePNxbMOFyT-ZhYGYmcqwW-7O4WJS1HyCf5uJpNoUtaB_kVEN174BZuV7Z3gNKzTIBjd7OjxN9HziZyS7JdwQjsq8/43h/C1UTnelVSfiGvtilk_tRww/h7/4zdmrpyMSn7BehXcLA79D7jHxoYATu2V39ohgViOcLo) – putting our communities, _Mani_ , and Sacred Places at risk, as well as uplift actions we can take to stop them. Flow of the day (Subject to change & emergence)
* **10am-12pm Opening event** with speakers, art, free meal and refreshments by Seeds of Peace mobile kitchen
* **12pm-3pm Water Walk** (4.5 miles) along the Dan River and the sacred site of Lower Saur Town, threatened by MVP Southgate
* **3pm-5pm Closing event** with speakers, art, free meal and refreshments by Seeds of Peace mobile kitchen

Write Congress: Refund UNRWA! On the same day that the International Court of Justice found South Africa's claims that Israel is carrying out a genocide against Palestinians in Gaza to be plausible, the Biden administration made the devastating announcement that it would suspend U.S. funding to the United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees, or UNRWA. UNRWA holds the entire UN mandate for serving Palestinian refugees, and is currently the single largest provider of humanitarian assistance to Gaza. More than 700,000 people in Gaza are currently facing life-threatening diseases — which are treatable with medical aid that UNRWA provides. The entire 2.3 million population of Gaza, more than half of whom are children,**** faces the risk of starvation. **Email your member of Congress now[using this tool](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDNoPK2LFR3mkl435UbKsDyq8t8O1lTIFlN6zgFA0-IBY5iI7eqL3Dc67J7lNa8nnaEeKgIrwULZuCZTlqgdFoF1Au7q19boxwrPVUMxR9Qt_Atwy4NQnJ0w0j1YKFSVNjZBqpaY30rD1_zxWJ7C-8XYCvvj0lm2bMODJnwgi1F_cExaN28E9AWgRa2Cml9ehTVpZHxItp7BMR3pYoKEaZ69KLYU1qpHxWRwKP3X68zSzaQFyT1NhgrXq5yyjQVYe7_FlimPetHqnu9mW2LXHfHfcRuaT3mGr7MAYxruv-9xOctWy2En0XsDqs78KyeMfe392L0WU6nqxvEdzSZWGFImztMh0TOm5rfXPpz-SwGh0KFECmo8N4duau0GiKsfXX-n6agMW-ta67yCQr1QQR9WhKeuqaIiMtKPKqSq6FBftOBAdc0q_YiAs3IQCwd4WgRgU45aR1T86Et24BFd8GITLD5gIV8dWha0nMw3HDpHp/43h/C1UTnelVSfiGvtilk_tRww/h17/9FRZnzzkeHGKyHJ6rgiI45Bf6GhhgFAH5h5nAS7Ep2g):** Tell them to demand that the Biden administration immediately reverses this horrifying decision.

clean_body: Sat Feb 17: Walk With Us to Protect Sacred Places & Phase Out Fossil Fuels | | You're invited! | Art by The Water Walk is an ancient technology to pray for and give thanks to Water or Mani , in the Yesá:sahį language of the Monacan [Monascane], Occaneechi, Sappony, Haliwa Saponi, and the Ohio Band of Saponi. Water Walk specifics differ across Indigenous cultures. Location and details for the 2024 Water Walk will be provided upon registration. If you need a travel stipend in order to attend, let us know when you register. Register at Resistance and resilience are inextricable from Indigenous and Afro-Indigenous experiences, surviving centuries of continuous land theft, genocide, cultural erasure, and systemic oppression. As we unite across differences and connect the dots between past and present assaults of settler colonialism, fossil fuel expansion, and the climate crisis worldwide , the 2024 Water Walk will highlight some of the fossil fuel expansion projects locally – like the (MVP), , , and – putting our communities, Mani , and Sacred Places at risk, as well as uplift actions we can take to stop them. Flow of the day (Subject to change & emergence) 10am-12pm Opening event with speakers, art, free meal and refreshments by Seeds of Peace mobile kitchen 12pm-3pm Water Walk (4.5 miles) along the Dan River and the sacred site of Lower Saur Town, threatened by MVP Southgate 3pm-5pm Closing event with speakers, art, free meal and refreshments by Seeds of Peace mobile kitchen Help spread the word by sharing: Event Instagram | Our friends on the MVP frontlines need us NOW: Please sign and ** to demand the Virginia Attorney General do his job to hold MVP accountable to state environmental laws and encourage his colleagues in the Department of Environmental Quality to issue a stop work order to MVP based on numerous environmental violations. The petition is open to anyone in the U.S. to sign. 1,000 signatures are needed ASAP - please widely using ! | Write Congress: Refund UNRWA! On the same day that the International Court of Justice found South Africa's claims that Israel is carrying out a genocide against Palestinians in Gaza to be plausible, the Biden administration made the devastating announcement that it would suspend U.S. funding to the United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees, or UNRWA. UNRWA holds the entire UN mandate for serving Palestinian refugees, and is currently the single largest provider of humanitarian assistance to Gaza. More than 700,000 people in Gaza are currently facing life-threatening diseases — which are treatable with medical aid that UNRWA provides. The entire 2.3 million population of Gaza, more than half of whom are children, faces the risk of starvation. Email your member of Congress now:** Tell them to demand that the Biden administration immediately reverses this horrifying decision. | | Bila:huk 7 Directions of Service | | | Sent via . ## **Supporter Call Tonight at 7:30pm CT**
---
Good morning Peter Willis,Our campaign is off to a fantastic start, and we are excited to launch our first virtual **Supporter Call tonight at 7:30PM CT** to give a campaign update to volunteers, donors, and supporters. You will also hear about opportunities to get involved with the campaign – I definitely need your help connecting with voters across the 14 counties of TX-27, and Early Voting starts February 20th!If you would like to become a volunteer, please fill out this [Skillset Survey](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65bba0fbc07c015269d305b4&u=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fforms%2Fd%2Fe%2F1FAIpQLSc4Hf3jaTO_gTObNZ0j8WIyn4Fuagj5RoXmMLExcJHBDWl2LA%2Fviewform%3Fusp%3Dsf_link&w=658f0ec36f3fe00284167a1e&c=b_65b93e4de54a712d9296311b&l=en-US&s=qqfuyv1JZMILaupwTOs0X5BqzgA%3D). To RSVP for tonight’s Supporter Call, [please click this link](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65bba0fbc07c015269d305b4&u=https%3A%2F%2Fus06web.zoom.us%2Fmeeting%2Fregister%2FtZ0rfuGtpj4sEt0G0tRpqHEf88w6lNeBgFnR&w=658f0ec36f3fe00284167a1e&c=b_65b93e4de54a712d9296311b&l=en-US&s=6oBdBq8BvsB2JP750muD8-3-Kgg%3D)! This will be a recurring 20 minute call on Thursday nights, so if you cannot make it tonight, there will be more opportunities! Thank you,Tanya Lloyd

clean_body: Help Elect A Public School Teacher To Congress! | | | | Supporter Call Tonight at 7:30pm CT Good morning Peter Willis,Our campaign is off to a fantastic start, and we are excited to launch our first virtual Supporter Call tonight at 7:30PM CT to give a campaign update to volunteers, donors, and supporters. You will also hear about opportunities to get involved with the campaign – I definitely need your help connecting with voters across the 14 counties of TX-27, and Early Voting starts February 20th!If you would like to become a volunteer, please fill out this . To RSVP for tonight’s Supporter Call, ! This will be a recurring 20 minute call on Thursday nights, so if you cannot make it tonight, there will be more opportunities! Thank you,Tanya Lloyd | | | | Tanya Lloyd for Congress 1887 FM 672 Lockhart, TX 78644 United States Powered by | ---|---

Peter, From the bottom of my heart, I can’t thank you enough for all of your hard work in these past few days.

Thanks to your support, we were able to CRUSH our first end-of-month goal of the election year.

This campaign is truly a grassroots operation, and we wouldn’t have gotten nearly as far as we have without you.

We’re starting a real movement in Virginia, and I’m so excited to win with you on election day.
---
In Liberty,

body:
Join our cause! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bf5a3d897c6a/trump-dominates-iowa-caucus-12676363?e=c982eb7ad4)

---
| | Peter,

Exciting news! Texans for Toll Free Highways, a leading advocacy organization dedicated to toll-free roadways and the interests of Texas drivers, has proudly endorsed our campaign for Congress in the TX-23 district.

I am honored to have earned the support of an organization committed to promoting efficient and accessible transportation infrastructure. Our shared commitment to toll-free highways aligns seamlessly with their mission to ensure the freedom of movement for all Texans.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=0a26599015&e=c982eb7ad4)

---
| Your support will empower us to continue advocating for policies prioritizing toll-free highways, improving transportation infrastructure, and championing the interests of Texas drivers.

Thank you for standing with us and Texans for Toll Free Highways in our mission to create a better future for our great state.
---
|
---
|
For Texas,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23

**If we're going to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue, we really can't afford to miss big goals like this one. But if everyone reading this email chipped in $5 today, we could close our budget gap in no time.

[So please, will you rush $5 or more now to get us back on track so we can win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats? Every dollar truly does make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78183679/452657706/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3385-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDgzNDJhNS0wYmMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FD37qLZDDilpk_-opLpp09Tx4AITGddf1fZtyPCESGM=)**

name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium--"A More Perfect Union": Restoring America's Global Mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240202_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend, "[The Declaration of Independence] was the first solemn declaration by a nation of the only legitimate foundation of civil government. It was the cornerstone of a new fabric, destined to cover the surface of the globe. It demolished at a stroke, the lawfulness of all governments founded upon conquest. It swept away all the rubbish of accumulated centuries of servitude... ". . . It stands, and must for ever stand, alone, a beacon on the summit of the mountain, to which all the inhabitants of the earth may turn their eyes for a genial and saving light . . . a light of salvation and redemption to the oppressed..." -John Quincy Adams, July 4, 1821 Join us this Friday as our campaign historian Bob Wesser recounts the exciting history of America's uniquely positive historic role in the development of the modern world, something far, far different than we are currently witnessing today. **NB: This week's symposium will be online only, at the live-stream linked below.**
* * *
### [NY Symposium, Friday, February, 8:00 pm – 'A More Perfect Union': Restoring America's Global Mission](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kz4p9z7Bvl86vgkW4LR88-0&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240202_symposium&n=2)

---
\--Diane

## The Election and Commerical
---
Dear Supporters,
Tonight brings a new urgency to our campaign for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, as I have learned of the immediate need to raise funds. While not on the scale of a Congressional race, this crucial election demands financial support to ensure our victory.
Securing this position is an incredible opportunity, placing me at the heart of significant races in California and across the nation. Influence is the currency of politics, and this committee role will grant me substantial leverage.
To kickstart a robust outreach effort, encompassing email, text, and social media campaigns set to launch in a few days, I need your financial support. Every contribution, regardless of size, is invaluable in helping us reach our goal of $2,000.
Your generosity fuels our campaign and propels us toward success. Thank you so much, dear friends, for standing with me in this crucial endeavor.
Contribute here:
PayPal: paypal.me/derrickgates
Cash App: $derrickgatesmin
Venmo: @Derrick-Gates-4
Together, we will make a difference. Paypal www.paypal.me/derrickgates
Cash App $derrickgatesmin
Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4 Zelle 424-244-5206 (Nena Gates)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=164356.220.1.51fb50a0d3d61b5c24b1f9ff16789707) Click to Watch
---
# Take your Health Back!
Alright, everybody, strap in because I've got something absolutely mind-blowing to share with you, especially all my folks in California and the surrounding areas. This is not your average health benefit – we're talking about a game-changer! Now, I've been through the wringer when it comes to health. Yeah, I shed a whopping 500 pounds recently, but guess what? The battle's far from over. My body's still screaming in pain, and I'm staring down the barrel of two knee replacements. Back and hips? They're on a constant pain playlist, and the list of issues just keeps growing. So, what do you do when the traditional pharmaceutical game doesn't cut it? You dig deep, you research, and you look for alternatives. And let me tell you, my skepticism led me to a revelation that's going to blow your minds!
About a month back, my buddy of 20 years, Pastor James Fortune, hit me up with news that changed the game for him and his wife, Canada. They discovered a treatment so good, it sounds too good to be true. But hold on – it's legit! We're talking medical documents, x-rays, blood tests – the whole nine yards. I practically dragged Pastor James Fortune to Los Angeles because I knew you needed to hear this. We're hosting him at not one, but two locations in LA County. Picture this: an amazing catered dinner on us, and all the info you need to make educated decisions about taking charge of your health and living your absolute best life right now. Don't procrastinate until your body breaks down even more. It's time to restore your youth, break free from the pain, and live the life you've been dreaming of. This is your shot, my friends – seize it! Scan the QR Code on the Graphic to register. Register your friends and come enjoy a meal. Pick Beverly Hills or Torrance
---
|
---
|
---
## News and CRA Endorsment
---
|
---
I hope this message finds you well. Building on the recent triumph of our amazing President Donald Trump in the Iowa Caucus, I am thrilled to share the news of securing the highly esteemed endorsement from the California Republican Assembly.
It is indeed an honor to be aligned with like-minded conservative Republicans who share our mission to Save the Nation. Our commitment extends to restoring the nucleus family, preserving parental rights, safeguarding the right to life, and securing our borders for a stronger future.
Amidst the overwhelming support, I am delighted to announce the upcoming release of my own Voter Guide. As individuals from all corners of the nation seek guidance on their voting decisions, this guide aims to provide clarity and insight into the candidates who resonate with our shared values.
For a more interactive engagement, I invite you to connect with me on social media through the links below. Your active participation and support are crucial as we work together to preserve the principles that define our beautiful nation.
Additionally, if you are in the South Bay, I extend a warm invitation to a candidate event on January 22nd. This gathering will provide an opportunity for meaningful dialogue and collaboration. Further details are outlined below.
Thank you for your continued support. Together, let us actively participate and contribute to the betterment of our great nation.
Best regards,
Instagram: [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=164356.221.1.e5ff6f5754111e0c8ce52179f768c74f)
X (Twitter): [X (Twitter)](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=164356.222.1.c522eb03d452e768b623aa1cf6480815)
Facebook: [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=164356.223.1.54ffe3c98d961c012e1a67f2f63828c5)
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/officialderrickgates/
X (Twitter): https://twitter.com/iamderrickgates
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/derrickgatesforcongress
## 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates

clean_body: The Election and Commerical Dear Supporters, Tonight brings a new urgency to our campaign for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, as I have learne | | | The Election and Commerical Dear Supporters, Tonight brings a new urgency to our campaign for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, as I have learned of the immediate need to raise funds. While not on the scale of a Congressional race, this crucial election demands financial support to ensure our victory. Securing this position is an incredible opportunity, placing me at the heart of significant races in California and across the nation. Influence is the currency of politics, and this committee role will grant me substantial leverage. To kickstart a robust outreach effort, encompassing email, text, and social media campaigns set to launch in a few days, I need your financial support. Every contribution, regardless of size, is invaluable in helping us reach our goal of $2,000. Your generosity fuels our campaign and propels us toward success. Thank you so much, dear friends, for standing with me in this crucial endeavor. Contribute here: PayPal: paypal.me/derrickgates Cash App: $derrickgatesmin Venmo: @Derrick-Gates-4 Together, we will make a difference. Paypal www.paypal.me/derrickgates Cash App $derrickgatesmin Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4 Zelle 424-244-5206 (Nena Gates) | Click to Watch Take your Health Back! Alright, everybody, strap in because I've got something absolutely mind-blowing to share with you, especially all my folks in California and the surrounding areas. This is not your average health benefit – we're talking about a game-changer! Now, I've been through the wringer when it comes to health. Yeah, I shed a whopping 500 pounds recently, but guess what? The battle's far from over. My body's still screaming in pain, and I'm staring down the barrel of two knee replacements. Back and hips? They're on a constant pain playlist, and the list of issues just keeps growing. So, what do you do when the traditional pharmaceutical game doesn't cut it? You dig deep, you research, and you look for alternatives. And let me tell you, my skepticism led me to a revelation that's going to blow your minds! About a month back, my buddy of 20 years, Pastor James Fortune, hit me up with news that changed the game for him and his wife, Canada. They discovered a treatment so good, it sounds too good to be true. But hold on – it's legit! We're talking medical documents, x-rays, blood tests – the whole nine yards. I practically dragged Pastor James Fortune to Los Angeles because I knew you needed to hear this. We're hosting him at not one, but two locations in LA County. Picture this: an amazing catered dinner on us, and all the info you need to make educated decisions about taking charge of your health and living your absolute best life right now. Don't procrastinate until your body breaks down even more. It's time to restore your youth, break free from the pain, and live the life you've been dreaming of. This is your shot, my friends – seize it! Scan the QR Code on the Graphic to register. Register your friends and come enjoy a meal. Pick Beverly Hills or Torrance | | News and CRA Endorsment | I hope this message finds you well. Building on the recent triumph of our amazing President Donald Trump in the Iowa Caucus, I am thrilled to share the news of securing the highly esteemed endorsement from the California Republican Assembly. It is indeed an honor to be aligned with like-minded conservative Republicans who share our mission to Save the Nation. Our commitment extends to restoring the nucleus family, preserving parental rights, safeguarding the right to life, and securing our borders for a stronger future. Amidst the overwhelming support, I am delighted to announce the upcoming release of my own Voter Guide. As individuals from all corners of the nation seek guidance on their voting decisions, this guide aims to provide clarity and insight into the candidates who resonate with our shared values. For a more interactive engagement, I invite you to connect with me on social media through the links below. Your active participation and support are crucial as we work together to preserve the principles that define our beautiful nation. Additionally, if you are in the South Bay, I extend a warm invitation to a candidate event on January 22nd. This gathering will provide an opportunity for meaningful dialogue and collaboration. Further details are outlined below. Thank you for your continued support. Together, let us actively participate and contribute to the betterment of our great nation. Best regards, Instagram: X (Twitter): Facebook: Instagram: X (Twitter): Facebook: 66th Assembly Central Committee | Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee. As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member. While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future. I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond. Thank you for your support and dedication to our party. Sincerely, Derrick R. Child Tax Credit until 2025 despite some opposition from Republican
members of Congress. “The Tax Relief for American Families and Workers

Democratic-led Senate Finance Committee and the Republican-led House
Ways and Means Committee, which would reform and expand the credit

| | Today marks the start of Black History Month. It is a time to honor the work of Black advocates and community members both in the past and in the present.
