name: Thomas Fitton
subject: FWD Never More Important….
body:
I simply cannot overstate this...

| Dear Fellow American,

I want to be sure you had a chance to read my recent email...

Because in just a week, the pressure on Judicial Watch to lead the fight for honest elections, pursue our investigations into Biden's weaponization of government against law-abiding Americans, and to challenge the Left's efforts to create new racial discrimination in our country keeps increasing!

[**Please help us with a special contribution today!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

And thank you, as always, for your support and commitment!

Thank you,

Tom Fitton
Judicial Watch

* * *

**From:** Tom Fitton
**Date:** Thur, Jan 25, 2024 at 9:14 AM
**Subject:** Never More Important...
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**I simply cannot overstate this ...**
Support for Judicial Watch by committed patriots like you has _never been more important than it is today!_
**Because****right now we are carrying the largest and most important caseload in our 30-year history ...and making a major impact for the rule of law!**
**[And that's why I ask you to make a contribution to support Judicial Watch today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Here's why we need your help now.

**_We continue to fight for honest elections_ ... **

We have "warned" **Illinois** and **California** that we are ready to sue them if they don't take steps to clean their voter rolls as required by federal law (Illinois) and if they don't live up to all the terms of a previous voter roll settlement with Judicial Watch (California), while we are also in court against **Illinois** over its reckless law permitting ballots to be counted up to two weeks _after_ Election Day...which opens wide the door to voter fraud!

And just a few days ago, we filed (with our friends at the Allied Education Foundation) a "_friend_ _of the court_ " brief in the **U.S. Supreme Court** in support of former President Trump's challenge to the Colorado Supreme Court's unprecedented decision to remove him from the 2024 presidential primary ballot.

The challenges to honest elections are enormous... _and ongoing,_ which is why [your support today is so critically needed!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

**_We are exposing the blatant targeting of traditional Catholics by the corrupt and politically-driven Biden FBI._**

In response to a Judicial Watch lawsuit, the **FBI** was forced to release documents showing that the agency's Office of General Counsel reviewed the targeting of traditional Catholics by the agency's Richmond field office...and that contrary to statements by **FBI Director Christopher Wray** , other field offices were involved in this spy operation!

It also seems that this scheme was approved by top lawyers at the FBI...which makes this scandal targeting law-abiding Americans even more frightening!

[You can count on Judicial Watch to keep fighting to get to all the facts...and to accountability!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

**_And we keep fighting to stop the Left from enacting laws and programs that create discrimination in America_**.

We have been given the green light in our historic lawsuit in **Minnesota** on behalf of a **Minneapolis** taxpayer challenging a teachers' contract that provides discriminatory job protections to certain racial minorities.

Judicial Watch believes that no discrimination means no discrimination!

[Your contribution today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2) will help us keep fighting the Left's efforts to overturn our laws against discrimination based on race, gender or ethnicity to in order to advance their woke agenda!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

_Thanks to our members’ generous support_ , Judicial Watch is doing that the Department of Justice, Congress and the Dominant Media should be doing... _but won 't_!

**And as I said before, we are carrying** the largest and most important caseload in our history... _and your decision to make a contribution and give us your support is vital to our continued success_.

Thank you for your commitment to our shared values, and the rule of law. I hope I can count on [you to to support Judicial Watch with a contribution today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66835&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: Our Black History is made every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Friends,
The history of Black communities in Massachusetts isn’t always told or celebrated.
It was here, in this great Commonwealth, that the first branch of the NAACP was charted. Where Martin and Coretta fell in love; where Melnea Cass organized Black women to claim their right to fully participate in our democracy; where Mel King broke barriers in pursuit of justice; where Frederick Douglass mobilized the abolitionist movement; and where Phyllis Wheatley became the first Black woman to publish a book of poetry.
This month is a celebration of those who came before us – the justice seekers, the freedom riders, the change makers, and the table shakers. This month is for every loved one that packed a brown bag lunch, sang a freedom song, vaselined an elbow, risked their lives, and dared to be themselves.
But this month is also for those who come after us. I often say, we must be better ancestors than descendents. It is our duty to future generations to break ceilings, push boundaries, and make Black history – which is American history. And movements don’t move themselves – we must move them.
With that in mind, the best way to celebrate Black history is in how we show up each and every day. Black history is being made right now, if only we take a moment to see it; if only we have the courage to be it
Black history is made every day by Black entrepreneurs, Black mothers and grandmothers, Black restaurant owners, queer Black activists who are on the frontlines fighting to protect queer youth, Black fathers who are growing old with dignity, Black musicians, Black educators, and Black caregivers – the list is endless, it is revolutionary, it is joyful, and in so many ways it is uniquely Massachusetts. [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/45555038322F35507950485136325A696B6164643874565A2F6F3166666254686A634B6D554D7A36526733664A50786E55547845457776547A5A2F6E4435757A/editor_images/Ayanna%20Pressley%20headshot.jpg]
Black history matters, Black lives matter, and Black futures matter.
We can celebrate Black History Month not with T-shirts or hashtags, but by enacting policies and budgets that save Black lives and allow us to thrive.
That’s why we must elect leaders – up and down the ballot – who are committed to doing just that. Leaders who will fight to preserve the teaching of Black history in classrooms, close the racial wealth gap, advance reproductive justice, and center our joy, dignity, and humanity. From town and city councils, to school committees and city halls, all the way to the halls of Congress and the White House — Democrats who show up for Black liberation will chart the path toward a more just and equitable world.
While we mark Black History this month, I’m grateful for the history we are making together every day. And I’m grateful to have people like you in this fight with me.
In service,
Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley

https://www.facebook.com/MassDems [https://www.facebook.com/MassDems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems]

United States

I'm the Senate's only working dirt farmer. I lost three fingers in a meat grinding accident when I was younger. I get a $12 flattop haircut. Most of my shirts are stained with dirt.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: The Pentagon spends $28,094 in tax dollars every second of every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The United States spends nearly $1 trillion on defense each year. Despite failing six straight audits and spending nearly half of their budget on legacy defense contractors, Congress and the White House continue to rubber-stamp the Pentagon's budget.

True national security requires smart budgets, not big budgets. I was proud to be the lone NO vote on the House Armed Services Committee last year. It’s time for the White House and Congress to exercise our authority to demand smarter defense budgets and invest the savings in better opportunities for everyday Americans to not only survive but succeed.

Sign if you agree: President Biden must cut Pentagon spending. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/biden-cut-pentagon-budget2?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwww-cut-2025-pentagon-budget-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/biden-cut-pentagon-budget2?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwww-cut-2025-pentagon-budget-petition-swap]

President Biden and Congress need to cut waste from the Pentagon budget that rewards legacy defense contractors and start investing in programs that benefit the American people like Medicare For All, $10 a day childcare, and 7 million new affordable homes.

Tell President Biden: Cut the Pentagon budget waste and invest in Americans. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/biden-cut-pentagon-budget2?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwww-cut-2025-pentagon-budget-petition-swap]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78195841/452695849/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGQzN2I1Ni0xOWMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uecM9rqIjZTy2xz5jqXiVIf-sXYfq74sNX2XTtjyg9c=) It’s been just under one month since we launched this campaign for Congress, and I can’t express how grateful I am for this incredible coalition. We raised an astonishing $250,000 in the first 24 hours of the campaign. And last night, you helped us hit our very first monthly fundraising deadline. Hundreds of folks from all across our district have joined our coalition, whether by donating, signing up to volunteer, or joining us at events. I’ve had the opportunity to meet with hundreds of you about how we can work together to restore the Michigan Dream. We have our work cut out for us, but I’ve never been more hopeful that we can win this toss-up race. Together, we’re building a winning team: a team that will ensure every Michigander’s voice is heard in Washington. So thank you for being a part of this movement. Onward to victory! **Press Contact** : Damon Drew
damon@emiliasykesforcongress.com
---
|
# **Emilia Sykes Raises More Than Double Entire GOP Primary Field**
### **Enters 2024 with more than $1 million COH, More Than Doubling GOP Field Combined**
---
| **AKRON, OH** **—** Yesterday, Congresswoman Emilia Sykes reported raising $540,816.79 in the fourth quarter of 2023, more than doubling the entire GOP field combined when not including personal loans. Her campaign heads into the 2024 election year with more than $1 million cash on hand, once again more than doubling the entire GOP field.

“Congresswoman Sykes’ strong grassroots support propelled her to raise more than double the entire GOP primary field in a clear sign that the voters of Ohio’s 13th Congressional district stand with her as she fights to lower costs, protect women’s freedom to make their own healthcare decisions, and keep our communities safe,” **said Campaign Manager Damon Drew**. “While our potential opponents rely on self funding and the millions we know are coming from Washington special interests, the Congresswoman will continue working on behalf of all her constituents.”
** **
Sykes' support came from over 4,500 individual donors with the average online contribution just $29.92, displaying the real grassroots support behind Sykes’ campaign.

Sykes is serving the second year of her first two-year term representing Ohio’s 13th Congressional District. Her top priority is [making government work for her district](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=02a6e4be78&e=7730fa895a). During her tenure, she has brought back more than $100 million in federal dollars to the district, including $42 million to improve public transit in Northeast Ohio. Sykes also helped secure Akron’s designation as a tech hub for polymer development, meaning the region is eligible for hefty federal grants funded from a $10 billion reserve set aside in the CHIPS Act.

Most people buy some stocks and bonds and think they are protected. But protecting your wealth goes far beyond stocks and bonds. You need alternative investments like gold and silver as well. **Reason #2****: All of your savings are sitting in the bank.
** The latest bank shutdown of First Republic Bank is the nation’s second largest bank failure. In fact, three of the four largest bank failures in our history have happened this year! Banks may not be as safe as you once thought. **Reason #3****: You have not invested in precious metals.
** Gold and silver have been a store of value for thousands of years, and they are an excellent way to protect your money during times of inflation and economic uncertainty - just like we’re experiencing today.

name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen
subject: Everything you need to know about the LNG announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
We must protect this important victory
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)
---
| | ** I have some good news to share, Friend.**** Last week, the Biden administration announced it would implement a **pause on approving all pending liquified natural gas (LNG) export licenses** while it reviews the harms to our climate and the public.

This news is getting some buzz—and with good reason.

The importance of this win, for frontline communities and our planet, cannot be overstated. Hard-won, this victory is the direct result of a sustained, powerful campaign by grassroots organizers in the Gulf, who have long led this fight, and climate organizers around the country.

Since the news broke, we've been hearing lots of questions about what this means, why it matters, and how we can push to make this pause permanent. **So, we answered these and other FAQs in our latest explainer blog:******
* **_[_What is LNG, and why can it be just as bad as coal?_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5134?t=3&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)_**

__**
* **_[_What is DOE reviewing in its public interest determination and why does it matter?_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5135?t=4&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)_**

__**
* **_[_If this is a temporary pause, what comes next? What can I do to stand up to polluters?_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5136?t=5&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)_**__**

---
[ **GET THE ANSWERS TO THESE Qs + MORE**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5137?t=7&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)**
---
Right now, the U.S. is the top global exporter of LNG. It's not a title we should be proud of, and **it's come at the cost of predominantly Black, Brown, and low-income frontline communities, our public health, and our climate.**

We've known for decades that transitioning away from fossil fuels and to reliable clean energy is the only way we can truly achieve energy security and a healthier planet. And we also know Big Oil and their cronies are going to fight to block our progress.

[So, it's absolutely critical that we keep the pressure on President Biden and DOE to protect this important victory.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5137?t=8&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)**
---
[READ + SEE HOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5137?t=10&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)
---
Onward,

Mattea MrkusicPolicy LeadEvergreen Collaborative
---
| | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=11&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/338?t=12&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4575?t=13&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/336?t=14&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5133?t=15&akid=14045%2E53494%2EktPSL0)

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Our grassroots campaign outraised Josh Hawley — again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
But it’s not all good news today...
#
We got some HUGE news yesterday, Peter.
Every candidate running for federal office was required to submit the full report of their campaign’s fourth-quarter fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. **And once Josh Hawley filed his report, we learned that Lucas didn’t just outraise him last quarter — our grassroots campaign outraised Hawley for all of 2023!**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43284?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE)
**[KEEP UP OUR MOMENTUM](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43284?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE)**
Last year, Lucas raised $5.4 million to defeat Josh Hawley — with an average donation of $33 and grassroots donors from every single county across the state, setting the record for the most ever raised in an off-year by a Senate challenger in Missouri.
**This is a historic accomplishment for a grassroots campaign in our state, and it wouldn’t have been possible without support from real people like you.**
But unfortunately, it’s not all good news today, Peter:
**Yesterday’s reports also revealed that national insiders are still determined to bail out Josh Hawley.** They transferred nearly $500,000 directly into his campaign and raised more into the Super PAC they funded with $1M+ last summer.
**[FIGHT BACK NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43284?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE)**
At this point, it’s not surprising. The insiders and elites backing Hawley have known Lucas was a threat since the day he got into this race. They’ve acted on it too, with desperate attacks and big investments into Hawley’s campaign quarter after quarter.
But things got worse for Hawley at the end of last year. _Morning Consult_ confirmed that he’s the least popular Republican Senator up for re-election in 2024. Then, multiple polls showed Lucas already in a margin-of-error race with Hawley — making this our best opportunity to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in this election cycle.
**With all that new information and likely lots more to come, we know those insiders are bound to ramp up their spending and attacks against Lucas from here.**
They’ll do anything it takes to make Hawley look strong in this race and they’re hoping their early investments will give him the edge he needs to win.
**That’s why we’re urgently asking for your help today, Peter.** Our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce is entirely powered by real people like you — not shady mega-donors or corporate elites. So when you donate to our campaign, you’re giving us the ability to fight back against the GOP’s desperate attacks, reach voters in every corner of the state with Lucas’ unifying message, and win this race in November.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce right now? With multiple recent polls showing this race in a dead heat, your support today could help us close the gap, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this year.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43284?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43285?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43285?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43285?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43285?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43285?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43285?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43284?refcode=em20240201-4729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE)
---
This is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley and finally take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for everyday people — and we can’t afford to waste it.
Thanks for being part of it,
— Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240201-4729-footer&t=12&refcode2=4729_614464_vZsfOE&akid=4729%2E614464%2EvZsfOE)**

Peter — in March, the Supreme Court is set to hear a _critical_ case that will determine the future of access to abortion medication.
Women across this country rely on mifepristone for medication abortions and miscarriage management. It is safe, highly effective, and critical to reproductive health care. Limiting access to mifepristone would make it even harder for reproductive health care providers to ensure patients get the treatment they need — even in states where abortion remains legal.
It’s outrageous that ideological extremists have been emboldened to challenge an FDA-approved and proven safe drug in the courts, creating chaos and confusion while threatening patients’ health. This is just right-wingers’ latest attempt to ban abortion care _everywhere._
We’ve seen firsthand the danger to women’s health in states that banned abortion after the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ ruling. We cannot allow any further rollbacks to threaten access to care elsewhere. Roy and other Democratic Governors in the Reproductive Freedom Alliance are standing up to urge the Court to act in defense of women’s health care — and he wants you to join him in the fight.
**[Please add your name to Roy’s petition urging the Supreme Court to PROTECT mifepristone>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78198065/452702888/-1035662332?refcode=ea.5d8a2343-1cc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.5d8a2343-1cc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhhMjM0My0xY2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0McdYSomEY_cGBZVKlBM-1JBmyUQ5ojLB71K6T4kW0=&emci=f0f6ef84-80c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=5d8a2343-1cc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=1049176)**
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78198066/452702889/-1035662332?refcode=ea.5d8a2343-1cc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.5d8a2343-1cc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhhMjM0My0xY2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0McdYSomEY_cGBZVKlBM-1JBmyUQ5ojLB71K6T4kW0=&emci=f0f6ef84-80c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=5d8a2343-1cc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=1049176)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: 🇺🇸 Vargas: IL GOP Ignores Will of Voters 💪
body:
President Donald J. Trump is up by more than 56 points nationally, but here in Illinois, GOP Chair Don Tracy chooses neutrality and weakness.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/fd5523f7c0b7/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-9641212?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=a167733ea9) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=a167733ea9)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a167733ea9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
This Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a167733ea9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

As President Trump continues to win the early primaries in historic landslide votes, Illinois Review has posed the question: Will the IL GOP endorse Donald J. Trump for President? As Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas lays out in a national op-ed, we have our answer.

VARGAS: Illinois GOP Ignores Will of the People, Pushes Anti-Trump Agenda (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/vargas-illinois-gop-ignores-will-of-the-people-pushes-anti-trump-agenda.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a167733ea9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Under President Joe Biden, the state of our union is in chaos — leaving the embattled, seemingly confused, (and aging) president desperate to save his failing presidency and low poll standings.

And this should come as no surprise.

Since the very beginning of the Biden administration, the economy has struggled leaving hard-working Americans desperate to cover everyday living expenses; crime is skyrocketing in our major cities and surrounding suburbs; children are struggling in the classroom amid plummeting test scores; the Biden Justice Department is weaponized and targeting political enemies — especially Trump; our military leadership is in chaos; we’re an international embarrassment on the world stage and our enemies abroad, including terrorists organizations, are getting stronger — not weaker.
CLICK TO READ THE FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/vargas-illinois-gop-ignores-will-of-the-people-pushes-anti-trump-agenda.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a167733ea9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://mypillow.com/ir?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a167733ea9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Names Pro-Choice, "Never Trumper" to Co-Chair Gala Featuring Trump Ally (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/il-gop-names-pro-choice-never-trumper-to-co-chair-gala-featuring-trump-ally-us-sen-john-kennedy-on-feb-9.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a167733ea9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On February 9th, the Illinois Republican Party is hosting a Bank Your Vote Gala featuring honored guest, U.S. Sen. John Kennedy – a conservative, pro-life Republican from Louisiana, who will be in town for an event being dubbed: “Save Illinois by making your voice count in 2024.”

But there’s one major problem: the IL GOP’s co-host for the gala is Greg Hart – a pro-choice, “Never-Trumper” who continues to bash the wildly popular former president and leading Republican candidate for President on his social media accounts.
CLICK TO READ THE FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/il-gop-names-pro-choice-never-trumper-to-co-chair-gala-featuring-trump-ally-us-sen-john-kennedy-on-feb-9.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a167733ea9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Dahlstrom=20for=20Alaska?=
subject: Winning for Women PAC Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska]()
body:
Dahlstrom highlighted as one of the top conservative challengers, top House target flip | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/45038eb27f07/ak-al-moves-towards-republicans-after-lt-governor-nancy-dahlstroms-entrance-into-the-race-10226413?e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=14b619521d&e=a20d8ad2ed)
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact: [press@nancyforalaska.com](mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com)

**Winning for Women PAC Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress** _Dahlstrom highlighted as one of the top conservative challengers, top House target flip_
**Anchorage, AK** \- This week, Winning for Women PAC announced their endorsement of Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom in her race for Alaska’s at-large congressional seat. Winning for Women PAC supports conservative women “who share core values of economic freedom and strong national security” and elected to endorse Dahlstrom as one of their first challengers of the cycle.
**“These women are rising stars who will add to the record number of Republican women in the House of Representatives. With a razor-thin majority in the House, flipping these seats is critical to holding and expanding our majority,”** said Danielle Barrow, Executive Director of WFW PAC. **“We are excited to help ensure they have the resources they need as they work to secure their primary and general election victories.”**
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=2f6613329f&e=a20d8ad2ed)
**“Throughout my career, I have always made the choice to step up, rather than back down, when there was a tough fight. Now, I’m running to represent Alaska in Congress and push back against Biden’s agenda that has crushed our state,”** stated Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom, candidate for Alaska’s At-Large Congressional District. **“I am proud and honored to have the support of Winning For Women PAC. Their commitment to electing strong, conservative women across the country is critical and I look forward to working with them to win Alaska and keep the House majority in 2024.”**
This key endorsement comes after Dahlstrom has earned the backing of [Speaker of the House Mike Johnson](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=db6023ce83&e=a20d8ad2ed) and after her entrance sparked Inside Elections to [move](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=7e89fa8f0b&e=a20d8ad2ed) the race towards Republicans.
_Nancy Dahlstrom currently serves as the Lt. Governor for the state of Alaska. The Dunleavy-Dahlstrom ticket was reelected in 2022 on the first ballot with over 50% of the vote. Nancy was first appointed to serve as a State Representative in 2003 and then served as a Senior Advisor for Military Affairs. In 2018, Nancy took on the role to serve as the Commissioner of Corrections and was a leader in cracking down on crime and ensuring criminals serve their time. As Lieutenant Governor, Nancy has prioritized public safety, energy security, and emergency preparedness._
# # #

clean_body: Dahlstrom highlighted as one of the top conservative challengers, top House target flip | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com Winning for Women PAC Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress Dahlstrom highlighted as one of the top conservative challengers, top House target flip Anchorage, AK \- This week, Winning for Women PAC announced their endorsement of Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom in her race for Alaska’s at-large congressional seat. Winning for Women PAC supports conservative women “who share core values of economic freedom and strong national security” and elected to endorse Dahlstrom as one of their first challengers of the cycle. “These women are rising stars who will add to the record number of Republican women in the House of Representatives. With a razor-thin majority in the House, flipping these seats is critical to holding and expanding our majority,” said Danielle Barrow, Executive Director of WFW PAC. “We are excited to help ensure they have the resources they need as they work to secure their primary and general election victories.” “Throughout my career, I have always made the choice to step up, rather than back down, when there was a tough fight. Now, I’m running to represent Alaska in Congress and push back against Biden’s agenda that has crushed our state,” stated Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom, candidate for Alaska’s At-Large Congressional District. “I am proud and honored to have the support of Winning For Women PAC. Their commitment to electing strong, conservative women across the country is critical and I look forward to working with them to win Alaska and keep the House majority in 2024.” This key endorsement comes after Dahlstrom has earned the backing of and after her entrance sparked Inside Elections to the race towards Republicans. Nancy Dahlstrom currently serves as the Lt. Governor for the state of Alaska. The Dunleavy-Dahlstrom ticket was reelected in 2022 on the first ballot with over 50% of the vote. Nancy was first appointed to serve as a State Representative in 2003 and then served as a Senior Advisor for Military Affairs. In 2018, Nancy took on the role to serve as the Commissioner of Corrections and was a leader in cracking down on crime and ensuring criminals serve their time. As Lieutenant Governor, Nancy has prioritized public safety, energy security, and emergency preparedness. # # | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | [Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska]() | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Nancy for Alaska. All rights reserved.

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8a3b58d1b9342d0a94c90b92edfc7ec&_e=CBeqMBKi1Bdc9SkkwaN8yX_L37hRk-pKL6MXVSFsyf66DzjF7ex_Ww6QM3j1wB2wXxAaDrwl9vdxJvXkP8FE8kwW4A7dVVnAJWmDIdzpVcWEb_upmEChDdQYdNPVsSZ_Ul9yYAqpULdv73wbGD0Vfde8OUqOIcaf2DPY8mkHB8aTk3_DLuc_3FcA_vTD4V1ybwIUw_d4Qg415U_M5JlcIb7Mkjztujb9cjs8jw_aoqBhuTt6RF9YCHFautYfI4M042YuT01AqMk5GkVUc_ACElJ-GFvVFDKnLdnZB8Cdme0Q0-rmA08FOoA16fc7e1HIW1hOeprq_gsAWVRRZ9-qpDFykvceVb6LzaglM2qTVtWoI7e_qgDqrv72S-rZWo0KCdsyuMNMSiCboopKlsPNog%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8a3b58d1b9342d0a94c90b92edfc7ec&_e=CBeqMBKi1Bdc9SkkwaN8yX_L37hRk-pKL6MXVSFsyf66DzjF7ex_Ww6QM3j1wB2wXxAaDrwl9vdxJvXkP8FE8kwW4A7dVVnAJWmDIdzpVcWEb_upmEChDdQYdNPVsSZ_Ul9yYAqpULdv73wbGD0Vfde8OUqOIcaf2DPY8mkHB8aTk3_DLuc_3FcA_vTD4V1ybwIUw_d4Qg415U_M5JlcIb7Mkjztujb9cjs8jw_aoqBpzqK4es5s5uLrO9KmWlPQVOuM1IQQOMxU8fikpK9ozjqQ2xFM5swI21aQ_e2xkLwW6ERmaAJCNUlARPJfJaZD5f0Jpd5zB3zilWHwZmzFaBY1qfGrmJ4fXf6qhIwh5d_6NQYb8grJdN_HUxPllJ-nwkz5zOMf2NjoEpz9ZvD6Kw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8a3b58d1b9342d0a94c90b92edfc7ec&_e=CBeqMBKi1Bdc9SkkwaN8yX_L37hRk-pKL6MXVSFsyf66DzjF7ex_Ww6QM3j1wB2wXxAaDrwl9vdxJvXkP8FE8kwW4A7dVVnAJWmDIdzpVcWEb_upmEChDdQYdNPVsSZ_Ul9yYAqpULdv73wbGD0Vfde8OUqOIcaf2DPY8mkHB8aTk3_DLuc_3FcA_vTD4V1ybwIUw_d4Qg415U_M5JlcIb7Mkjztujb9cjs8jw_aoqASOYB0DKpFWIXhPcs4dzP9vcEl_8xlw_HQUu3LLULXzNI0X4XxKFf4gm7XETgk1TH7OQrL8OFqWAjZVERGGX2FNRjtcTQ6zKE5Cb1KFlfNb8HdKapP6YdZR5eVRUiJTopIlQN21oPKaPQBElf6aXnEEJBj5eKBRVchYbNLz7vZJw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8a3b58d1b9342d0a94c90b92edfc7ec&_e=CBeqMBKi1Bdc9SkkwaN8yX_L37hRk-pKL6MXVSFsyf66DzjF7ex_Ww6QM3j1wB2wXxAaDrwl9vdxJvXkP8FE8kwW4A7dVVnAJWmDIdzpVcWEb_upmEChDdQYdNPVsSZ_Ul9yYAqpULdv73wbGD0Vfde8OUqOIcaf2DPY8mkHB8aTk3_DLuc_3FcA_vTD4V1ybwIUw_d4Qg415U_M5JlcIb7Mkjztujb9cjs8jw_aoqAsseLvdgUFh91qC-kRMRtSDQXkZPuV-SSmtRytkoEPPz9WaCAiEn9crx00gSH8lbZSx4XzktVVz9Gh9MRXAo-P92RKlc_11yD5yO2k5dSZfWrixriO0fUOu0oJh_N3-mp1tAZjl2aJiDPppYrVNta33xHw-A89fgP6neVXmBCTAQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8a3b58d1b9342d0a94c90b92edfc7ec&_e=CBeqMBKi1Bdc9SkkwaN8yX_L37hRk-pKL6MXVSFsyf66DzjF7ex_Ww6QM3j1wB2wXxAaDrwl9vdxJvXkP8FE8kwW4A7dVVnAJWmDIdzpVcWEb_upmEChDdQYdNPVsSZ_Ul9yYAqpULdv73wbGD0Vfde8OUqOIcaf2DPY8mkHB8aTk3_DLuc_3FcA_vTD4V1ybwIUw_d4Qg415U_M5JlcIb7Mkjztujb9cjs8jw_aoqBWbeLXGShHqefyN8Jr80Wo5XFFhhzAq8irAi_xqW4mrW8_aXi00-TvTpiO6pTMxwlmZM5-0-l-nV5OXwUaAg66kIpPI5_D6jvRaohtpsshrlKMryQlYEvFGoiDB5jD3Q-GGzT-IT-VKTpJ7fYdEeUzBjylX-PFp6JyvjGhDHpUrQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8a3b58d1b9342d0a94c90b92edfc7ec&_e=CBeqMBKi1Bdc9SkkwaN8yX_L37hRk-pKL6MXVSFsyf66DzjF7ex_Ww6QM3j1wB2wXxAaDrwl9vdxJvXkP8FE8kwW4A7dVVnAJWmDIdzpVcWEb_upmEChDdQYdNPVsSZ_Ul9yYAqpULdv73wbGD0Vfde8OUqOIcaf2DPY8mkHB8aTk3_DLuc_3FcA_vTD4V1ybwIUw_d4Qg415U_M5JlcIb7Mkjztujb9cjs8jw_aoqAWkAN4VXNaMrV1nScJeUe2WHdv8p_eRkFVUX87mJZy7aP-69SBqQcdO-j4ZgrSY-OfrmvfFH0jxDQK66byDRek9NJ-0Svk6my3O96DQLPeVGkcv1dN5w6WdUx1gfaqUS3Meb_WbEx8lFFkP7Udd7dAiMqtUqtV5c5Vff8SmLDuTA%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8a3b58d1b9342d0a94c90b92edfc7ec&_e=CBeqMBKi1Bdc9SkkwaN8yWR24nXdlTKGiuyulb9Lo0KVbc7GFF3Gvu9Et_f9WgCSae5K-b_OY-unVesUq9Hs-PalLKA2uHi1G0zZwjAsubvSvYbLjVK4GxYjxSCQxXCLAKHpc7ZRM5RdsSN72ti1K7xUgsoa3aRhdKLHNL71weZU2OW7ooi4ScCTyiGmTzkyUB6dI0YwHWgg1xTG6avswxzB7HxC9zj1TwVtlaP8j-wxJbB4WuWa7tFNWTk7DeSE)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8a3b58d1b9342d0a94c90b92edfc7ec&_e=CBeqMBKi1Bdc9SkkwaN8yX_L37hRk-pKL6MXVSFsyf66DzjF7ex_Ww6QM3j1wB2wxrcvr7BJFBcvUiWbm89MVkerk0Pd1ohe0jNjOf-l-7kfOPzrZScP0xDWyeY80Sop2DHTPq9goZom-Zs4hPIdP_WdX55BXdj_7UswgIoOH9tA3libmca1GhGdKnolOTosWQBZ9kIAfnFlLJmhTBCeBe4ny9czGDD05f-Q_5rcaQpk7i_ZR_PGiMnqelauc3NsCUzH77qXmQd54JCXn_G96AyWBaCtvEVbtJ_IjyfkO50%3D)
---

It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **** |

name: Debbie
subject: Rick Scott is terrified
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
he's more vulnerable than ever before
| | |
---
Listen, I need you to hear this: My opponent, Rick Scott, has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads.
Not only has he spent more than any other GOP Senate candidate so far, he's calling me a liar every chance he gets. Just last week he went on the record to say that I lied about his stance on abortion.**Listen, let me make this clear:** _Rick Scott voted for a 15-week national abortion ban._ **I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.** His spending and his blatant attempts to smear me and this campaign might look like a sign of strength at first glance. But that couldn't be farther from the truth.
**In reality, Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at CNN just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Scott knows that he's more vulnerable than ever before. Last time around, he had to outspend his Democratic opponent by $50 MILLION to just barely win this seat — that race came down to just 10,033 votes. Now, he's trying to pull the same trick again in a desperate last ditch effort to save his campaign. We can't let him get away with it: **[_So, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78200523/452710066/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk742-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY2ZDE2ZWMtMWZjMS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KhkWuOT_7CvZCcbVMJYmQ5k88_sMxknNsiG4u4hu4k0=)**

Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. He is lying, and he is spreading disinformation.
Rick Scott knows that he can't win this race by telling the truth about his record. He built his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain convicted of what the Justice Department called the largest Medicare fraud scheme ever. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare.
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much, and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins 6 more years.**
**But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:** So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us tell the truth about Rick Scott's record and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78200528/452710071/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk742-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY2ZDE2ZWMtMWZjMS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KhkWuOT_7CvZCcbVMJYmQ5k88_sMxknNsiG4u4hu4k0=)

With immense gratitude,

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78200529/452710072/-31196584?refcode=jtk742-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY2ZDE2ZWMtMWZjMS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KhkWuOT_7CvZCcbVMJYmQ5k88_sMxknNsiG4u4hu4k0=)

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

The GOP still holds control of the Pennsylvania Senate, and they’re using their majority to oppose gun safety measures and other progressive legislation. **Losing this month means Republicans would have full legislative control and the power to put our fundamental freedoms on the line.**

But let’s be real, we cannot let Republicans flip House control so they can continue attacking our communities at the ballot box, in schools, and beyond. The chamber is tied at 101-101 , and we're less than two weeks away from a key special election to defend our majority. That means the support we receive right now could tip the scale and provide more resources for Democrats. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | The GOP still holds control of the Pennsylvania Senate, and they’re using their majority to oppose gun safety measures and other progressive legislation. Peter,
**Imagine someone who brazenly stormed the Capitol, attempting to topple our democracy, now sitting on your child's school board.** It's happening. Kimberly Dragoo, a self-confessed participant in the January 6th insurrection, is not alone. Numerous insurrectionists are now eyeing roles in our children's schools.
Three years have passed since that dark day when our democracy faced an unprecedented assault. Alarmingly, the very individuals involved in that chaos are now quietly positioning themselves in educational roles, seeking to influence and control the future of our nation.
This year, tens of thousands of school board seats across the country are at stake. Right-wing extremists, flush with funding, are backing these insurrectionists' campaigns, aiming to infiltrate and reshape our schools.
Public education is not just a pillar of society; it's the bedrock of our democratic values. We cannot stand idly by and watch these extremists erode the principles we hold dear. We need you, Peter, to step up and join us in this crucial fight.

WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

**Hey friend.**

Listen, I have one simple question for you.

**Are you really on my team?**

My finance team just called and informed me we missed our recent fundraising deadline by - well, to put it bluntly - **a LOT.**

**You can 't blame me for wanting to check on you and confirm your support for conservative values, small government, secure borders, and safe streets.**

In this day and age, who knows what crazy scheme the Dems and Biden could dream up. We need to make sure we're prepared for their attacks this year, and the preparation starts NOW.

Friend, missing deadlines doesn't just make me look bad - it makes our movement look bad. Which is just more ammunition for the Left to outspend us, outraise us, and **BEAT** us in elections.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a23377fa41ce41289422ae8d49f2a878&_e=_8pgFA_fRJ0eEFBY2Gnj8cseDOCfpMmoweK3_sOdgRACmWqN0cXJw9pevlnt6DV7KCpRT60qf1baII0fuZTipv70oGQzkFQ5_lPBy3SxDD8M9KU_0LvXE0Cr8DJ7kIJxdjpEepXYLwxcPiO9N68QpYzFShQQSIpdoHsw_K33MxT-xKZSc-D_lrMxmheCnmZvmJtT03TFPl5JMC73hVdyHj8t9JbWwVaMLImLaxf7oFGMJrVBQ04nhLUhU5sYfoST41aRFmCIdEdGDV34tWFfwqFwyj1On2Z3Q-rB7T9bMmCrmX7-S4TKmKmWV19EubYnVaFqYm8nFqVxXiaylcif_bEmlv7zz91X1ZiNsUMMv13lx_tIV3GdsgRGkzJUvPaUyb1a5d_-zw2-pBh4F41StOcE06r9RBG30mbdzonR3zA%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a23377fa41ce41289422ae8d49f2a878&_e=_8pgFA_fRJ0eEFBY2Gnj8cseDOCfpMmoweK3_sOdgRACmWqN0cXJw9pevlnt6DV7KCpRT60qf1baII0fuZTipv70oGQzkFQ5_lPBy3SxDD8M9KU_0LvXE0Cr8DJ7kIJxdjpEepXYLwxcPiO9N68QpYzFShQQSIpdoHsw_K33MxT-xKZSc-D_lrMxmheCnmZvmJtT03TFPl5JMC73hVdyHj8t9JbWwVaMLImLaxf7oFGMJrVBQ04nhLUhU5sYfoST41aRFmCIdEdGDV34tWFfwkOMz6i448veAtwm461Wf5wS2oIXRz8f47VNliMbGYD-OAjfZW527gXHvSVrXxVSFC-OiP9ppGjW0IfQ9D7pw2WIOXkjoOcD9xqGT-O1WGvq8bjaGdYrCmktjP5gNGLK70yN5Dygfa9v5MNt5VlBqQo%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a23377fa41ce41289422ae8d49f2a878&_e=_8pgFA_fRJ0eEFBY2Gnj8cseDOCfpMmoweK3_sOdgRACmWqN0cXJw9pevlnt6DV7KCpRT60qf1baII0fuZTipv70oGQzkFQ5_lPBy3SxDD8M9KU_0LvXE0Cr8DJ7kIJxdjpEepXYLwxcPiO9N68QpYzFShQQSIpdoHsw_K33MxT-xKZSc-D_lrMxmheCnmZvmJtT03TFPl5JMC73hVdyHj8t9JbWwVaMLImLaxf7oFGMJrVBQ04nhLUhU5sYfoST41aRFmCIdEdGDV34tWFfwiGxd8CczVQqtROjbFznVP9-vOhnOuLqz6gmUAQF89NSAWKeCCeeSk3HaJuIu5BhlEe4kW2lKjEPBhYevDGO27Z-gJQPY14u5c2rLXSZ2CUwdU0sl4qyPuYEiekSBGo_Vgmlsm5AonL8cbdZ13_sgso%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a23377fa41ce41289422ae8d49f2a878&_e=_8pgFA_fRJ0eEFBY2Gnj8cseDOCfpMmoweK3_sOdgRACmWqN0cXJw9pevlnt6DV7KCpRT60qf1baII0fuZTipv70oGQzkFQ5_lPBy3SxDD8M9KU_0LvXE0Cr8DJ7kIJxdjpEepXYLwxcPiO9N68QpYzFShQQSIpdoHsw_K33MxT-xKZSc-D_lrMxmheCnmZvmJtT03TFPl5JMC73hVdyHj8t9JbWwVaMLImLaxf7oFGMJrVBQ04nhLUhU5sYfoST41aRFmCIdEdGDV34tWFfwoghS8zTqrFYBzKwllBf-7PlKDcJeNcW97y55tAtOnbgdLZq40mZVFzrzg5100TWVP0GNam3thCf_AALou-SXetSqhbxCiqmX6t4C8aCY-cPrXpkf_R0UysVFiBJwCtd3hutyvqDm7Xsfv-ywNb82Ts%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

---
Fellow Conservative, Did you see the latest news regarding the Democrats’ 2024 push in Texas?

State campaign finance records reveal that shadowy billionaire George Soros has now _dumped more than $3 MILLION into our state_ , spread among at least five left-wing groups – including the under-the-radar Texas Majority PAC.

This group has not been publicly launched. But here’s what we do know:

**George Soros is single-handedly funding this operation, and according to a recent report it is being run by former staffers of Robert Francis “Beto” O’Rourke’s campaign machine.**

We cannot take anything for granted this year. America’s future is on the line in this race. **_ **[**Rush an emergency contribution to help us FIGHT BACK AND WIN >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._3kYMsWOzedc6Tg)** ****
---
[ **DONATE NOW**](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

We need to fight like hell to come out on top this November. This is a battle for the heart and soul of the Lone Star State and for our great Nation’s future.

**[Take a stand today alongside me to KEEP TEXAS RED and SAVE AMERICA](http://trk.tedcruz.)**.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz **

| | **BREAKING: Congressional Republicans Attack DC Sovereignty as Democrats Renew Push for Statehood**

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20Senate?=
subject: Maryland Sheriffs Endorse Teichert for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | |
---

**Maryland Sheriffs Endorse Teichert for U.S. Senate**

**BALTIMORE, MD.--** Support for John Teichert, a retired Air Force Brigadier General and candidate for the open U.S. Senate seat in Maryland, continues to pour in with another round of law enforcement endorsements — this time from Sheriff Mike Lewis of Wicomico County and Sheriff Craig Robertson of Allegany County.
Sheriff Mike Lewis, who has been serving the residents of Wicomico County as Sheriff since 2006, shared why he supports Teichert for U.S. Senate by saying, "As a 5 term elected Sheriff with over 40 years of law enforcement experience, I appreciate General Teichert's unwavering commitment to service and exceptional leadership. His dedication to our nation's security, including securing our borders to prevent the influx of dangerous criminals and drugs, aligns with Maryland's values. His proven track record makes him the right choice for the Senate, and I wholeheartedly support his candidacy."
Sheriff Craig Robertson, serving Allegany County since 2010, credited his support for Teichert to the general’s outstanding leadership and integrity, saying, "As the Sheriff of Allegany County, I have dedicated my life to serving and protecting the people of Maryland. I know what it takes to lead with courage, integrity, and vision. That is why I am proud to endorse General John Teichert for U.S. Senate. He is fighting for our values, our interests, and our future. He is the leader we need."
The latest round of law enforcement endorsements come just weeks after the launch of Teichert’s law enforcement and veterans coalitions. Read more about the Law Enforcement for Teichert coalition [here.](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=b4d0ddc790&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

| [S.B. 80](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ou62Ddlyks5R2XfWLkimexEWKORH2EPCC28maUGvLHM8ed9FLlNU84hWNy2PWvAGLYR4zhZ09CgfeuGSDe0eaGB_T6A2DViHSt6BXEmwVwX6MFxbmE91vjcgbvQdTt1srzEzERb2Wmtn0t0JROo8JdT81_OxjB_eruvgLjvHVoc0QcVtfwDZJjA-UeUPVxOajarXWYWbdpw=&c=GXSqdacr3nIgLME9_LjBGL35IEttcQiSYcu8Pc8qnjK5wA8hN5ciKg==&ch=U9h1dO6OrGxOJUKlm5-cMecShytgqzg07sJDpCJU2KTYvekX0QNTCw==) Patron: Favola Prisoner reentry; Department of Corrections. Requires the Department of Corrections to develop and implement a certificate of rehabilitation program for the purposes of assisting an inmate's successful transition from prison to society upon the person's discharge. The bill provides that no person who is awarded a certificate of rehabilitation shall have such person's criminal history constitute a barrier to employment.
[S.B. 391](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ou62Ddlyks5R2XfWLkimexEWKORH2EPCC28maUGvLHM8ed9FLlNU84hWNy2PWvAGHRXsj5m9pQViB1ztC3rnM-gw-Vj5K4SgYLAHT1C_EilKeXu37xHcm8gJgISrWv9gjOluyUwPNO4AJYhCSNTHH8uF5m5oOIlLBOxOSIYlpA26EyI916OFWwQEQzf5POtRobagtr7QKEg=&c=GXSqdacr3nIgLME9_LjBGL35IEttcQiSYcu8Pc8qnjK5wA8hN5ciKg==&ch=U9h1dO6OrGxOJUKlm5-cMecShytgqzg07sJDpCJU2KTYvekX0QNTCw==) Patron: Pekarsky Employee protections; medicinal use of cannabis oil. Amends the provision that prohibits an employer from discriminating against an employee for such employee's lawful use of cannabis oil pursuant to a valid written certification issued by a practitioner for the treatment or to eliminate the symptoms of the employee's diagnosed condition or disease, with certain exceptions, by specifying that such use must conform to the laws of the Commonwealth and by excluding the employees of the Commonwealth and other public bodies from such protections.
[S.B. 719](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ou62Ddlyks5R2XfWLkimexEWKORH2EPCC28maUGvLHM8ed9FLlNU84hWNy2PWvAGB4PR5IlBV9lyLzmqnUlvIK0LXmbRgCZhhhieDY6LaUz0Ifcd7Z6JlEZnnWvsxMjMk-XXDQFRe05blEBOF4Ob5uVqviHITPl-Gpot1A3Xd5IZZm1fYQWuis5wGqBZw7OpX_Eaplu9hys=&c=GXSqdacr3nIgLME9_LjBGL35IEttcQiSYcu8Pc8qnjK5wA8hN5ciKg==&ch=U9h1dO6OrGxOJUKlm5-cMecShytgqzg07sJDpCJU2KTYvekX0QNTCw==) Patron: Bagby Restorative housing and isolated confinement; restrictions on use. Prohibits the use of isolated confinement, defined in the bill, in state correctional facilities, subject to certain exceptions.

Requires the Department of Corrections to develop and implement a certificate of rehabilitation program for the purposes of assisting an inmate's successful transition from prison to society upon the person's discharge. The bill provides that no person who is awarded a certificate of rehabilitation shall have such person's criminal history constitute a barrier to employment. == Patron: Pekarsky Employee protections; medicinal use of cannabis oil. Amends the provision that prohibits an employer from discriminating against an employee for such employee's lawful use of cannabis oil pursuant to a valid written certification issued by a practitioner for the treatment or to eliminate the symptoms of the employee's diagnosed condition or disease, with certain exceptions, by specifying that such use must conform to the laws of the Commonwealth and by excluding the employees of the Commonwealth and other public bodies from such protections. == Patron: Bagby Restorative housing and isolated confinement; restrictions on use. Prohibits the use of isolated confinement, defined in the bill, in state correctional facilities, subject to certain exceptions. | | == | == | | == | | | == | == Patron: Subramanyam Joint Commission on Technology and Science; study; advancements in artificial intelligence; report == Patron: Hashmi Study; joint subcommittee; Dillon Rule; report. name: Bill Spadea
subject: The bag ban flopped
body:
Peter, Bill Spadea here, shaking my head at the latest mess our state's gotten into. Remember when Governor Murphy introduce
|
---
| Peter, Bill Spadea here, shaking my head at the latest mess our state's gotten into. Remember when Governor Murphy introduced that ban on plastic and paper shopping bags, touting it as a big win for the environment? **_Well, the results are in, and they're NOT what we were promised.
_** The ban on plastic and paper shopping bags has led to – wait for it – more plastic use. That's right. A study by the Freedonia Group reveals that **plastic use in shopping bags****has nearly tripled since the ban.** New Jersey went from 53 million pounds to a whopping 151 million pounds. Talk about a backfire!

---
|
---
| How did it go so wrong? Those so-called reusable bags, which are supposed to be eco-friendly, are ending up as single-use bags. They're made with more plastic than the old bags, and most are only used two or three times.**This has led to mountains of these bags piling up in homes,****defeating the whole purpose of the ban.** **And let's not forget the hidden "tax" on us, the consumers.** The stores are charging us for these reusable bags – money straight out of our pockets and into theirs. So, what do we do? **As always, we fight back with common sense!** If you miss shopping with plastic t-shirt bags, especially knowing now that they're BETTER for the environment than the garbage they're forcing us to shop with today, [click here to get your own Common Sense Club plastic bags.](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/5fe224ca2485bea3324edf1000550302/eJyNj0sLgkAUhf_LXUvmo5c7ERHRXEStY9JLDuk4TNfIxP_eWOGqoO253_kupwdCwQTFBXhwp4dtO2CAwpxLjoKCRhDLX1d74VqOZUDFxSVSTSvB67-WJ2CMrfVmbgB1EjWy3_lBEmfRMY2zRJOSKf3jP89q6U6ecOvHKQzDTzHWnMKbdl_BI9XiuKjgehUdVKX5kkh6pomioBJP7HxiYpY3tamrTEodf3Yn2L0FwxO_b2AZ) **If you want a couple of our special bags for free,[check out my schedule here and come see me at a meet and greet near you!](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/37fee3f6b711e18853dd04565876c1b0/eJyNj0sLgkAUhf_LXUvio9fsQkREcxG1jkkvNKTjMF4zE_970wNXBW3v-c53OQMQSi4pLoDBje6u64EFGnOhBEoKakk8f6Xu3Hc8x4JSyEuk61YBG76WJ-B5dlZr1wLqFRpkv9sESZxFxzTOEkMqrs2P_zzLhT95wu0mTmEcf4qxEhRejbsBRrrF56JCmFV00KXhz0SK2XbXdbOTKMtG8QL5LK8rG98tC7hSKIvP_gT7t2h8AN7FY4E=)** It's time to take a stand against policies that sound good on paper but flop in reality. Let's bring common sense back to New Jersey. We invite you to continue to make your voice heard and show your support for the movement.
Together, we can make a difference, Bill Spadea

---
|
---

---

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: This tax package leaves behind the lowest-wealth families:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
It’s time to replace the Child Tax Credit with my universal End Child Poverty Act. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvLpx_APzaezUkVoTn_wFZrdh3j0b5dicEuOW7FFjFY_87R9dhc9jT_frZwGsBMAnM9jgTW9ewxucw_JQi3CvNwlo3xYozD1xLekHP7su1gRnY9-_ixjqzh20EUD6c1mV78F0H5r0R8cr-pQ5P9bz--tDorQUe15JGv7HJhvWKIdXTrxjHu6EMN1u2aJugdmbLEBZX43KZ5f0diUjLqmF6z2nKB4x2PHIzjIuYrM_BJhc/43h/zGZWggafST2B6p1z8-pnhA/h0/liXYMQZ3KJgcS4F5nIiGjRVP_3a4cK7mIiczrIThLhE)
---
****Friend, Last night, I voted against a Republican-led tax cut for the wealthy and corporations that would deepen wealth inequality and economic injustice. If this bill becomes law, in the first year, the richest 120,000 households would receive a larger share of the tax benefits than the bottom 88 million families—with the poorest 20% of families receiving just $60 on average. This is yet another handout to corporations that are already dodging paying their fair share in taxes. For example, multi-billion dollar corporation Meta (formerly Facebook) would see its tax rate fall from 25% to -2%. That’s outrageous. Working families should never be paying higher taxes than the richest companies on earth. Republicans and corporate Democrats got their corporate tax handouts in exchange for modest changes to the Child Tax Credit. **Unfortunately, those modest changes leave behind millions of the very poorest families.** That’s why it’s time to replace the Child Tax Credit with my universal _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would lift millions of people out of poverty, providing families with a monthly child allowance of $428 per child until the child’s 19th birthday. In 2021, when Congress expanded the Child Tax Credit to reach all families with young kids, we cut child poverty nearly in half, which was life changing for millions of families, allowing them to afford basic necessities such as food, utilities, and housing. **My bill would cut child poverty by 61% and the deepest child poverty by 93%.** It would provide more robust benefits than the Child Tax Credit or the Earned Income Tax Credit—and would cover the lowest-wealth families in the country, who are left out of the current tax credit system. [**Add your name today to become a grassroots co-sponsor of my**** _End Child Poverty Act_****, which would dramatically cut child poverty by providing families with a universal benefit from children’s birth through their teenage years.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qe4hUUUDrFIVikoYCvH929nwsUb7XqZQUDGRQN_hpQcny1wh4izYpcl6GjRR7j9UEbPHaPzwIc0ME2SGVBAIAVhDPdfCM4zEwQs07uEIcdOf7wjVDI3vm1vNjL07WMBoB58p8MDpFZaB-Fe8YUbsWF1MU0Rz4VjOVPSffiHGVB0u9rEH0Y6W1Nh9hPCDWRcrFw83yuYlN_sUynK41gueQOBmSSjoRRsBGoAXOjFNFYRYZnTTzstBn7XXCw-XrMsL-z_pSJbBzpf2862x0EJKWSqtZ9Z7hSwJY9MgQdgWfssbQMfpJ675RQnHBh1YpEhSA3hvgsyhpetZzhCieKllI2bPrJZ1VihGwdhyXOOoR_86fhQ3SYLLUEr9iLaCtXn7hO/43h/zGZWggafST2B6p1z8-pnhA/h1/dOwaHFKsaDKV3DhGrzldJSXdVn345YeCh59nwUMy1oM) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qe4hUUUDrFIVikoYCvH929nwsUb7XqZQUDGRQN_hpQcny1wh4izYpcl6GjRR7j9UEbPHaPzwIc0ME2SGVBAIAVhFitO79fiLFr3XZx9VOhHrDOIvgoJuRKEKhgrH1yi-BsAA11fxuUA6E0HtfKMIz2LOYPr2vHjEHf8BQUAZ8lUK7cO7mac8fJ_Xkj_bXDMsqh8mMNr7GKct6RX23vPxKe86VxNorzOY6tkY5l32L8LjYO06aRSnuMv1DaSa1IINZbzcLaSYu7AzSXzM7fDRfRoaB8z7naOt4UOel-gL_Kd0cdwpx4X_g1Z34uGQM-_a10Jxk9QMwvJPstHV3bj9Y-cygT1B3Q3Crk5BWAuINjGegFGk7ckPLo_lEvYQQBzehJ/43h/zGZWggafST2B6p1z8-pnhA/h2/XsOVts-kj3Xde0VSJrxb7yegFpU_VBsqX8vjSGdME4w)
---
Together, we’re challenging the unjust status quo and pushing for the bold, transformative policies that our communities deserve. Thank you for joining me in demanding Congress put the needs of millions of vulnerable families above the greed of millionaires, billionaires, and large profitable corporations.
Always serving you,

clean_body: It’s time to replace the Child Tax Credit with my universal End Child Poverty Act. | | | **Friend, Last night, I voted against a Republican-led tax cut for the wealthy and corporations that would deepen wealth inequality and economic injustice. If this bill becomes law, in the first year, the richest 120,000 households would receive a larger share of the tax benefits than the bottom 88 million families—with the poorest 20% of families receiving just $60 on average. This is yet another handout to corporations that are already dodging paying their fair share in taxes. For example, multi-billion dollar corporation Meta (formerly Facebook) would see its tax rate fall from 25% to -2%. That’s outrageous. Working families should never be paying higher taxes than the richest companies on earth. Republicans and corporate Democrats got their corporate tax handouts in exchange for modest changes to the Child Tax Credit. Unfortunately, those modest changes leave behind millions of the very poorest families. That’s why it’s time to replace the Child Tax Credit with my universal End Child Poverty Act , which would lift millions of people out of poverty, providing families with a monthly child allowance of $428 per child until the child’s 19th birthday. In 2021, when Congress expanded the Child Tax Credit to reach all families with young kids, we cut child poverty nearly in half, which was life changing for millions of families, allowing them to afford basic necessities such as food, utilities, and housing. My bill would cut child poverty by 61% and the deepest child poverty by 93%. It would provide more robust benefits than the Child Tax Credit or the Earned Income Tax Credit—and would cover the lowest-wealth families in the country, who are left out of the current tax credit system. | Together, we’re challenging the unjust status quo and pushing for the bold, transformative policies that our communities deserve. Thank you for joining me in demanding Congress put the needs of millions of vulnerable families above the greed of millionaires, billionaires, and large profitable corporations. Always serving you, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via .
