subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a84219df00c94557b2ba18bd989376d8&_e=8BfprsFje3T7JvxfMx4icyfc408dQS7FIrGzclxAHb5Z4WRfozBltqWq3BVh0odzFKyCwqDpfWkhKyUFx1NYIHUNmm75Lsp9KSnzrCUVKGlPjdiSVTKG1qHk6lW9rA2JmPgGevx0ciD778zpNjexqvncFNjyG0wF5lrpE8Y5xZCN7zYhJ8Yd7REOptvayfdAGbOHqml_CZRIQz4rNQrCCKN6_apaV5RNIHWo7UZ4DpySiwHC01DBlGo713-J5jAC2TvJgpdnHFGbTlxGvgOHonxGI0sjVuw9At5-IeRTia7iOytWX_BIiV_5iOK7VUNNJ1aWxpSDTnvqja6AZkCXfkoJ7NRVHJqqyrjc0sHzUXlZaLRgwRpiYGJ8l8FDPP0FZcb-F45ruwxF3PIjbaji2FLwMj4EnDSe7_n6YWaLv1M%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a84219df00c94557b2ba18bd989376d8&_e=8BfprsFje3T7JvxfMx4icyfc408dQS7FIrGzclxAHb5Z4WRfozBltqWq3BVh0odzFKyCwqDpfWkhKyUFx1NYIHUNmm75Lsp9KSnzrCUVKGlPjdiSVTKG1qHk6lW9rA2JmPgGevx0ciD778zpNjexqvncFNjyG0wF5lrpE8Y5xZCN7zYhJ8Yd7REOptvayfdAGbOHqml_CZRIQz4rNQrCCKN6_apaV5RNIHWo7UZ4DpySiwHC01DBlGo713-J5jAC2TvJgpdnHFGbTlxGvgOHophJyv4BsLfrTL1gnw7E9hBLSvaMXvBT4PQIMzEP2PJWDlJNA6bZXBC39gBCuVeXDKbJNdn5d5_4bmXpnqHYEHBzdj5v20Tc0K1DSWlfyQ0IfNhT_vzB9nRxulcCevpJhw-FuBC7BA5X-E4OIgdvLeQ%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a84219df00c94557b2ba18bd989376d8&_e=8BfprsFje3T7JvxfMx4icyfc408dQS7FIrGzclxAHb5Z4WRfozBltqWq3BVh0odzFKyCwqDpfWkhKyUFx1NYIHUNmm75Lsp9KSnzrCUVKGlPjdiSVTKG1qHk6lW9rA2JmPgGevx0ciD778zpNjexqvncFNjyG0wF5lrpE8Y5xZCN7zYhJ8Yd7REOptvayfdAGbOHqml_CZRIQz4rNQrCCKN6_apaV5RNIHWo7UZ4DpySiwHC01DBlGo713-J5jAC2TvJgpdnHFGbTlxGvgOHopDzlabFrVE3kOUB5d8pb5WK7_0r1oA2D6VSeKPvDr4z1HVSjO-t-Fmb-yN8wHotm_6elkH94a-ChaBjocqMv4O4K1oARIvWfgdEa64qoOFNDlXuzhLqROJPRLCVpjiuLd5bnyvWiPAy3Q3LTySu_K0%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a84219df00c94557b2ba18bd989376d8&_e=8BfprsFje3T7JvxfMx4icyfc408dQS7FIrGzclxAHb5Z4WRfozBltqWq3BVh0odzFKyCwqDpfWkhKyUFx1NYIHUNmm75Lsp9KSnzrCUVKGlPjdiSVTKG1qHk6lW9rA2JmPgGevx0ciD778zpNjexqvncFNjyG0wF5lrpE8Y5xZCN7zYhJ8Yd7REOptvayfdAGbOHqml_CZRIQz4rNQrCCKN6_apaV5RNIHWo7UZ4DpySiwHC01DBlGo713-J5jAC2TvJgpdnHFGbTlxGvgOHomt3jyQEZfd5MSlW0Gr1UJRfASIp056mjFtZfOEH0tmTCXVmkiKCYCm9yfou8Et_ZqMZe0yb4sznrehjNttMWUjPmOlbqG8VWHFhpIgyQ74a4bGwm-aHL9G_bMotM56owmba7CbW4YEv6-dmC-CTgDM%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Warning
subject: Magnesium: The nutritional conspiracy of the century
body:
Good news...there's a miracle that occurs when your body gets ALL the magnesium that it needs.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtOwzAQRb9msms0Gb_ShReFygiQKtEFgqWJHWKwSeqkTcvXo5bCdh7nHl2bhhjakwZ1A0RdcCMQAVsB0e51Tnn_kR7vFuJ5Oyx2cpPEeUu3QDSdBv9_eqWUPtkQz1O1LpxmrUNeeF0plDXWNbKi0y26Jb0JEpWQfimFq7gSXPhaOFtzpoqgCYkjYVUpxghL0ZInt-TSN0pJj8DxklPa5HNobDVOs82571PZ9KmIupumYbyIGSAz57782jfR78fft6ZPQOaqDGQOQObTHdzm-6k7roCZSwtsrfBB3W_n40uRtRvmEGMYpQKO73-YnwAAAP__69dfrA)
Magnesium deficiency could be one of the greatest health conspiracies in history...

First, let's be clear: magnesium is THE single most studied mineral in existence.

It powers over 300 critical, life-saving reactions in your body. ([including dozens of shockers mentioned here](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jr1OwzAUhZ_G2Ro59_onHTwAVRiQGBiQGJ3rm8RgN6mTqOrbo1aI9ZxP5zs-LykONyfsswCYYlgFgMAnAXD5uuayf-e314P-_FgOF_Oe9b2FFwGw3Rb-R_9Was4-pntqT1VwOASpKnaNlaaVbSuxmhyi0oR4ZBWQyDM1Gpl61fYciFqqogMJSoJsGosIstYDMISjMkzWGpZCyYen9plLJN-s29WXMs-5pjlXyU3btqyPY52ALvvxzGvcc1_Y_2xTmfdxupMCuvNOiX0R2I1J4Mno3hIS46CDkeqose2VNrYqLizXmFJcjRVKjg89zfk3AAD__1tZYIg "including dozens of shockers mentioned here"))

To date, thousands of studies have proven it to be beneficial for the heart, energy, metabolism, immunity, sleep, pain, and more.

The only two-time Nobel Prize winner, Linus Pauling, recommended daily supplementation of magnesium (at least 350mg per day).

So do over 100,000 courageous doctors--including top MDs from Harvard.

**BUT THERE 'S A PROBLEM... **

While modern agriculture has stripped our soil and diet of magnesium (and up to 80% of the population is deficient)...

The food and nutritional supplement industries have fed us "magnesium" that **DOESN 'T FIX THE PROBLEM** -- because:

1. Most fortified foods/products use SYNTHETIC (chemical-made), low-grade magnesium the body can't absorb... AND...

2. Most ONLY CONTAIN 1-3 forms of magnesium (at best); when the reality is your body needs ALL 7 FORMS OF MAGNESIUM

Given how much magnesium helps with stress, sleep, heart health, energy and more...

_It 's easily one of the most dangerous health hoaxes ever._

THE GOOD NEWS: **there's a miracle that occurs when your body gets ALL the magnesium that it needs,** in all the forms that it needs, at the optimal dosage.

Just remember -- if you're *only* taking one form of magnesium -- **YOU ARE STILL DEFICIENT**!

===>> **[Why Getting ALL 7 FORMS Of Magnesium Lowers Stress, Fixes Sleep, and Boosts Healthy Metabolism](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jr1OwzAUhZ_G2Ro59_onHTwAVRiQGBiQGJ3rm8RgN6mTqOrbo1aI9ZxP5zs-LykONyfsswCYYlgFgMAnAXD5uuayf-e314P-_FgOF_Oe9b2FFwGw3Rb-R_9Was4-pntqT1VwOASpKnaNlaaVbSuxmhyi0oR4ZBWQyDM1Gpl61fYciFqqogMJSoJsGosIstYDMISjMkzWGpZCyYen9plLJN-s29WXMs-5pjlXyU3btqyPY52ALvvxzGvcc1_Y_2xTmfdxupMCuvNOiX0R2I1J4Mno3hIS46CDkeqose2VNrYqLizXmFJcjRVKjg89zfk3AAD__1tZYIg "Why Getting ALL 7 FORMS Of Magnesium Lowers Stress, Fixes Sleep, and Boosts Healthy Metabolism ")**

Enjoy!
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 300
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Bring The Federalist Papers to your home
body:

| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KyQk6VZSjLVrXd0-RH54oQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnnUqP0S-aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtZmVkZXJhbGlzdC1wYXBlcnM_c2M9MDA0NzBOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDIwMVcDc3BjQgpluhTZu2WRf5FNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Adam Schiff is running ads to boost our GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
This is self-serving, DC corruption at its worst.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37192%2E3422442%2Ezy1E8q)
Derek, first off, thanks so much to this team for helping us hit our January fundraising goal. Unfortunately, we got some disappointing news this morning that I need to share:
1. **Adam Schiff is running TV ads to *boost* our Republican opponent, Steve Garvey.** Running an ad that highlights another candidate in a way that boosts their credibility with a certain sect of voters is a way politicians try to game the system to get an opponent they have the best chance of defeating.

Adam Schiff is doing this because he knows he will lose to us in November if we beat Steve Garvey and advance to the general election. That's what this brazenly cynical ad is about—furthering Adam’s own political career, boxing out qualified Democratic women candidates, and boosting a Republican candidate to do it. We need honest leadership, not political games.

2. A new USC poll released today, conducted right after last week’s debate, **showed us completely tied with Steve Garvey for second place.** Even after Steve Garvey’s refusal to take a single solid policy position in the debate, we’re still in a dead heat.

Derek, to make it to the general election, we just need to place second in the primary, but today’s news shows we’re at real risk of coming in third. **[Is there anything you can give right now to help us ramp up our ads and reach the voters who will decide this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240201-1?refcode=em20240201-37192&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37192_3422442_zy1E8q&akid=37192%2E3422442%2Ezy1E8q)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240201-1?refcode=em20240201-37192&refcode2=37192_3422442_zy1E8q&akid=37192%2E3422442%2Ezy1E8q)
This is going to be an incredibly close race, and every dollar counts. Thanks a ton.
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240201-37192&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37192_3422442_zy1E8q&akid=37192%2E3422442%2Ezy1E8q)**
---

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f53f6ccf3c7402c9d04fb0d2e67f8fa&_e=wQ-o1dEwxb0M6qFRhFUKMZ3-tAcg9SzBaoMtLziwrye9pdkLcwr6VoSkyWkLbvtLljg50R0gzTu35ggczd8qqfPFFJ0F6I7ekRDI3FTJauAoh7pVilB3oaUQCzVBIhKWHsCvMEEPu6D9WUmCKOYrxLFicb9JWSbAhhXd9NXoI8FmtetAd5YfRDkVXvybrRHaxdYYgZ_9AGg-JhZA10A_abOaz7JU-gQNahUNQ8Hx-7cfhaXp1D2XRTJ5wY5JrF_E_4oVAosot2l1Goooct9CcAuKk8np7ds6kLVtAj01TMcemmi8L6vvDKQSnbubVCyuvzVkB8elG3yAWvITGHUCD7daueyxc6MCRxgMx9ITt-IxnYuR9Et1ofg4V7EEPZa4hIsyyG2zolrsrAaVbCKPiZvWwFUNOYONN-Dskoe5irU%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f53f6ccf3c7402c9d04fb0d2e67f8fa&_e=wQ-o1dEwxb0M6qFRhFUKMZ3-tAcg9SzBaoMtLziwrye9pdkLcwr6VoSkyWkLbvtLljg50R0gzTu35ggczd8qqfPFFJ0F6I7ekRDI3FTJauAoh7pVilB3oaUQCzVBIhKWHsCvMEEPu6D9WUmCKOYrxLFicb9JWSbAhhXd9NXoI8FmtetAd5YfRDkVXvybrRHaxdYYgZ_9AGg-JhZA10A_abOaz7JU-gQNahUNQ8Hx-7cfhaXp1D2XRTJ5wY5JrF_E_4oVAosot2l1Goooct9CcBUSFAGJuJx0N7kU6HBuhC_JYW8n9uVqQD7nG4FWneSjumlQ1UzBUhTLA10OTDzQxpN4y4UW4Ta365V0rVluwY2qLbNG0r8TGXRPoUZ_bmRSKUlJbp7TI_3eVCM5vl-CXcn0UeSlUKxQlUDQqNyfTjw%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f53f6ccf3c7402c9d04fb0d2e67f8fa&_e=wQ-o1dEwxb0M6qFRhFUKMZ3-tAcg9SzBaoMtLziwrye9pdkLcwr6VoSkyWkLbvtLljg50R0gzTu35ggczd8qqfPFFJ0F6I7ekRDI3FTJauAoh7pVilB3oaUQCzVBIhKWHsCvMEEPu6D9WUmCKOYrxLFicb9JWSbAhhXd9NXoI8FmtetAd5YfRDkVXvybrRHaxdYYgZ_9AGg-JhZA10A_abOaz7JU-gQNahUNQ8Hx-7cfhaXp1D2XRTJ5wY5JrF_E_4oVAosot2l1Goooct9CcPmjWOus1e20OdTAyCyAom24jn_J1wqfnC-34QKZ_CVx23LXtrQimeljcJv9OYl64luTtQArCcElOrewyuBHCSCI8EMuyWr0DdG2IephuKjavbJXoAe59nQ1m9sabZeGq0hkk0vKwcMhxHd5hJMssiA%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f53f6ccf3c7402c9d04fb0d2e67f8fa&_e=wQ-o1dEwxb0M6qFRhFUKMZ3-tAcg9SzBaoMtLziwrye9pdkLcwr6VoSkyWkLbvtLljg50R0gzTu35ggczd8qqfPFFJ0F6I7ekRDI3FTJauAoh7pVilB3oaUQCzVBIhKWHsCvMEEPu6D9WUmCKOYrxLFicb9JWSbAhhXd9NXoI8FmtetAd5YfRDkVXvybrRHaxdYYgZ_9AGg-JhZA10A_abOaz7JU-gQNahUNQ8Hx-7cfhaXp1D2XRTJ5wY5JrF_E_4oVAosot2l1Goooct9CcC8LynnCkYC0ouiBJTr6gXJo2CrL4ptKGTNG12barepGtv-ggOLEuyqTD4xZykkywnj3iDvTFHaXlvcCT4kbisPQ_yWDJnWG570OPagq3f_w2RO5gyMNBPOtqLvuTKKz9YtwhWGAFj8aAQQ2CDJH7VE%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

subject: It needs sealed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate
body:
While we stepped up to help, Joe Biden and the Left in Washington fought back against protecting our nation by refusing to enforce the law. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=18f1d4704b1643cca1bde1bd3bfa5e1b&_t=BD1cjUnR_Vq2vUokRBkkM2ZDT8K_IuGQSsWvu1gAcmlrBza0etZ3hNRMAZvXBPwnhTwdFOdcldyKoegLJQVTYyZWDT-5eg0pW5WAZK1W9i8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=18f1d4704b1643cca1bde1bd3bfa5e1b&_t=BD1cjUnR_Vq2vUokRBkkM2ZDT8K_IuGQSsWvu1gAcmlrBza0etZ3hNRMAZvXBPwnhTwdFOdcldyKoegLJQVTYyZWDT-5eg0pW5WAZK1W9i8%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=18f1d4704b1643cca1bde1bd3bfa5e1b&_e=yFVKReigVZR7J0evPEIORM-02sR2mpwwAvShUUzWWo6egQR3xABqynx1-MN-KAnhAXrHY4IK5rbgnlpEKkW9Yw21u-6eF3atvZhQVDa7TXY0kv2plDz_XadfC8DrrkEBVzmTnyNjvwvi_0hw1yE3tOnJlYseBnBd8Y-SOk8KWhkgDDAwhYkypIYvgn4xpuGUUtXuC-GHOV5k5xKNnIw9Ja8GEKOfY5KBzPLYBfKdDf2_8akDKed4PX9u-eeErHmfEOdpsI3ckXgFCGPTGbNJ1lOGn4JP-7zKmC0diZU-eRN6Qw0ht-3EkUjl_c-bYyOLXDBtmR-0LhU2fle3cLfbZ1SE6wCCuVmxcxkkbmM1Ka1zwmNjtn3f91a3heYq4xDTRq9LQG4tBN-LcvXqQxNbhg%3D%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

**My message here is simple: It's time to SEAL THE SOUTHERN BORDER.**

The chaos at the southern border is out of control, and just when I think it can't get any worse, a grim new record is broken.

As Governor, I have done everything in my power to support Texas Governor Greg Abbott and stop the flood of illegal migrants, drugs, and cartels from coming into our country.

I stepped up and supported ‘Operation Lone Star' by sending members of our state's National Guard to support our brave border control agents.

[**SEAL THE SOUTHERN BORDER**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=18f1d4704b1643cca1bde1bd3bfa5e1b&_e=yFVKReigVZR7J0evPEIORM-02sR2mpwwAvShUUzWWo6egQR3xABqynx1-MN-KAnhAXrHY4IK5rbgnlpEKkW9Yw21u-6eF3atvZhQVDa7TXY0kv2plDz_XadfC8DrrkEBVzmTnyNjvwvi_0hw1yE3tOnJlYseBnBd8Y-SOk8KWhkgDDAwhYkypIYvgn4xpuGUUtXuC-GHOV5k5xKNnIw9Ja8GEKOfY5KBzPLYBfKdDf232piij4rhSsu-dlTzBHfo4E4JgdZMp3JczLRqC9RE_Uh7mmQloVTtE3k8mE-JPXrYeRpxRf3gCbi1SkiFxFzv1WzYMHT4T8gocRZPW17KO-ekoDb8IuRe7mOvKB87dh0L4iZxLLAIeEIAC8Hf9ZvM5bgB40twlS15dvxWhe4BbQ%3D%3D)
[**While we stepped up to help, Joe Biden and the Left in Washington fought back against protecting our nation by refusing to enforce the law.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=18f1d4704b1643cca1bde1bd3bfa5e1b&_e=yFVKReigVZR7J0evPEIORM-02sR2mpwwAvShUUzWWo6egQR3xABqynx1-MN-KAnhAXrHY4IK5rbgnlpEKkW9Yw21u-6eF3atvZhQVDa7TXY0kv2plDz_XadfC8DrrkEBVzmTnyNjvwvi_0hw1yE3tOnJlYseBnBd8Y-SOk8KWhkgDDAwhYkypIYvgn4xpuGUUtXuC-GHOV5k5xKNnIw9Ja8GEKOfY5KBzPLYBfKdDf2O-7fjCmSeojsfikhpamI8-R3uDTNM2nzHf8d1kvxsmJSzLA6QIUUS-YL3JqeUI7WPLsGEDkhZQN2ix1WKFFXT79SNC_v4PNTYrY4GvhfvYC1IQvrYZ5WMPkcMLW75kcZ-UbyRXCYF696YIyWY4te9KTve_1AT2Zo9Q3CzcSGNvQ%3D%3D)

As a result, this disaster has turned every state into a border state. In West Virginia, we have seen how illegal drugs smuggled across the border deeply hurt our state. | **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: While we stepped up to help, Joe Biden and the Left in Washington fought back against protecting our nation by refusing to enforce the law. | | Fellow Conservative, My message here is simple: It's time to SEAL THE SOUTHERN BORDER. The chaos at the southern border is out of control, and just when I think it can't get any worse, a grim new record is broken. As Governor, I have done everything in my power to support Texas Governor Greg Abbott and stop the flood of illegal migrants, drugs, and cartels from coming into our country. I stepped up and supported ‘Operation Lone Star' by sending members of our state's National Guard to support our brave border control agents. As a result, this disaster has turned every state into a border state. In West Virginia, we have seen how illegal drugs smuggled across the border deeply hurt our state. I'll be a force in Washington on the southern border - standing up for our national security and the rule of law. Thank you, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018

Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011

Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [] Find your local Registrar's office here: [] [] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC Learn More [] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs. This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education! CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT [] Karen Jenkins for HB-89 Donate Here [] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia. She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth. name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa566994f0004d7fb937ad463747379c&_e=W72jmvrBnuEGtvuOZsJvjuWLp9sJfb6Ep5kexpScOxXA1gKK9PktZnSwAdpsGUpVGR4Na8XqUcLb5m_GLD35MELEeIaPzAuvPQ5f61U5tctc36Hw-7Q-lHtCYKteTBXt2Yj2pj8f6HjjcV_iOZ9PP5Ft1GKTDTIGq497YlZcSHe6Togrda5HdfT4aUsnEA4sPs5UJdE-TvEN1vQrl4npYHMw-ZFJswPOJHwpANtChGkFoBiAf24_d_41hdt2-xOU "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa566994f0004d7fb937ad463747379c&_e=W72jmvrBnuEGtvuOZsJvjuWLp9sJfb6Ep5kexpScOxXA1gKK9PktZnSwAdpsGUpVGR4Na8XqUcLb5m_GLD35MELEeIaPzAuvPQ5f61U5tctzezeFet7JKqRIumFhVc1emmF9wiNm3KMWWnWHCwQymdHtcJc6qsaNARcTET7L1qnmZf9We5cxquylx0W6XbI56fGbcQB2KJ-_K0LAmfuvkyEAka4--GnzcvBh2EpmZQLIBZb6T8sjp2o6D2boa9n_ "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa566994f0004d7fb937ad463747379c&_e=W72jmvrBnuEGtvuOZsJvjuWLp9sJfb6Ep5kexpScOxXA1gKK9PktZnSwAdpsGUpVGR4Na8XqUcLb5m_GLD35MELEeIaPzAuvPQ5f61U5tcvAtGHEPoJC0GwVBYI_hoT60J326YF02wvmR5EYEcbABUVkP7s7zKHSkqN1Dzm2TS7fM-YRYlH9OEAG6BYTzr70_GpcLXLetithrlR1dxpGkPGdk_MAXpUa40JR13l9B3mrUVRkp1qM7jh4QR1uJ2l4)

[Donate >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa566994f0004d7fb937ad463747379c&_e=W72jmvrBnuEGtvuOZsJvjuWLp9sJfb6Ep5kexpScOxXA1gKK9PktZnSwAdpsGUpVGR4Na8XqUcLb5m_GLD35MELEeIaPzAuvPQ5f61U5tcs7wR9OWSeSD_A_6XD4q_TEPSNA1a9nfrAOEqMMPaTyFcA2YoKEUsauEnEcISGw3sEz2CTQTFVEtXdfJ4JdUxE1e6OL802flZDS4nHo7Bz2w8eUrSp1SAQvLffP3GvSUB-hHVv-Ox_dyPR_HpuS1139)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa566994f0004d7fb937ad463747379c&_e=W72jmvrBnuEGtvuOZsJvjuWLp9sJfb6Ep5kexpScOxXA1gKK9PktZnSwAdpsGUpVGR4Na8XqUcLb5m_GLD35MDe4yYIOglh6mTOGk9q52Wk-GIpzu-og0_OkTp0RBQZSXf2Lbg3A7HF4Tn0Wq1coypNwWcQskO9E-F8ogN_XlIsfweArmniUaNOqziYOJOWFQFN4LCkaVd10PmnRQzcXzLjA6DyOTDe1t0se26ETq9bG_jachRqm5gnHBRhlUnoGphdg-4RhbGy5zYYYiRGeYg%3D%3D)

[Donate $35 ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa566994f0004d7fb937ad463747379c&_e=W72jmvrBnuEGtvuOZsJvjuWLp9sJfb6Ep5kexpScOxXA1gKK9PktZnSwAdpsGUpVGR4Na8XqUcLb5m_GLD35MDe4yYIOglh6mTOGk9q52WnoqO3SMUrcjQ-GMbc2rOla_BWLWkQAImPm9OtfYvGd_gOBbJe7MyKVjHiaeuioMbnpiPLUwdCrpRoCSMf22ab7a8zhzKo1SS0U5G7aOn0pQ8FmnlRocUUwZ1szhpytNRj9-Cl9Cm1YTqmNvqB3KUfKL5MeIO1-9IX4rvMdusY2EA%3D%3D)

[Donate $50 ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa566994f0004d7fb937ad463747379c&_e=W72jmvrBnuEGtvuOZsJvjuWLp9sJfb6Ep5kexpScOxXA1gKK9PktZnSwAdpsGUpVGR4Na8XqUcLb5m_GLD35MDe4yYIOglh6mTOGk9q52WkYFyBNdat1CaqvEl7z2ANLW8-9bMagMbyXp6SPJxmu7I_fE_0TpnRL5D4Px8ZshFNg_EN3HKUzkEO_kIkZ282UINCItZK_QywoM_lXtsEmgPN_A_ZaVj68RdIKaG2g2n_1R9nOPe3FEx-m7Dw-4csBbBnJaIoTcC2-Q213iWum1A%3D%3D)

[Donate $500 ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa566994f0004d7fb937ad463747379c&_e=W72jmvrBnuEGtvuOZsJvjuWLp9sJfb6Ep5kexpScOxXA1gKK9PktZnSwAdpsGUpVGR4Na8XqUcLb5m_GLD35MDe4yYIOglh6mTOGk9q52WmtYS0AdBF9k08uB297FfuoZcfkhbqZJlpO0GTFUXzCvb3voxs16bZ2xxp2JtRhjqzQf5rPNjerWG2E1iNzBqsLGUUZWHIWgEALvYOHxDvhP4pLbTgFEIx-dRjPolvDTZUuUJ9xLsQZIQFEJAVbp4DUApiDIj13Gh9dis3yIPQ29Q%3D%3D)

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=79b2d98f30e641c6ae77c9d406e558eb&_e=kg_hIIznTlMziF_DR3caf2oJW3j4TVAZ6C4ximNvCYqHYJIu-3yR8gwjJRlFp315WoQJHSuQBijvmFkHmpQop_zj01Kk5blDJOQmJo1IjZ1_7ojVjLWsSA7N0uq1DBSxL_joaMW1xvu-eoje04vcSp_Rum9dl08Saykr5XikaDAUpuFEm9uWTT-OB83S37B-Y1sJCZoPMp_32VereaWqBmakVHdUfpJEKnZLs7o2-gWkCUIuAaQtkQv-CmWJUucTDiJR6YwAbfjRBUivc9zoV3EXPtLwclly2pUYKu-wuffl28TJBwApjtCj3b9HZVaiYWIvbe5-M4GM6L33WUS__dXyQr00buL_fgVcAW3MeJK66VAX8ZEqAt-B04w_HRjBsV5h2EaRYlXDY23cYR8XXA%3D%3D)

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

[The Democrats are going at me with everything they've got, and I'll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. name: Juanjo at United We Dream Action
subject: unfit to govern
body:
It’s time for Greg Abbott to answer for his human rights abuses at the border. | | | Peter, Governor Greg Abbott is planning on IGNORING specific orders from the Supreme Court to remove the razor wire barriers used to harm migrants at the border. In fact, new reports suggest Governor Abbott has actually INCREASED the presence of Texas troops along the border and added more razor wire barriers since the Supreme Court decision came down. This is just further proof that Governor Abbott is unfit to govern. He is prioritizing endangering migrants to win political points over obeying the orders of the highest Court in the land — let alone human rights. **The time has come for Abbott to go. clean_body: It’s time for Greg Abbott to answer for his human rights abuses at the border. | | | Peter, Governor Greg Abbott is planning on IGNORING specific orders from the Supreme Court to remove the razor wire barriers used to harm migrants at the border. In fact, new reports suggest Governor Abbott has actually INCREASED the presence of Texas troops along the border and added more razor wire barriers since the Supreme Court decision came down. This is just further proof that Governor Abbott is unfit to govern. He is prioritizing endangering migrants to win political points over obeying the orders of the highest Court in the land — let alone human rights. The time has come for Abbott to go. Will you pitch in any amount today to support UWDA’s demands to impeach Governor Abbott for his human rights abuses and gross negligence? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Governor Abbott is a disgrace to Texas who will stop at nothing to push for his personal, anti-immigrant, white supremacist agenda. Thanks for being part of the team that’s going to get him out. Juanjo, United We Dream Action

subject: Non-citizens voting in U.S. elections?!

body:
Only American citizens should be allowed to vote in American elections!

| | | **BREAKING 2024 ELECTION UPDATE ****
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gghgehx0Ei3i_LS_TN5ylQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Individuals who are not U.S. citizens may soon be able to influence the outcome of the most significant election in recent history. The consequences of this scenario would be nothing short of disastrous... In a shocking move, Arizona's Democratic Secretary of State has opened a perilous path for non-citizens, whether legal or not, to participate in the 2024 election. **This includes the pivotal Republican primary in March.**
**
---
[ **DONATE NOW TO FIGHT AGAINST IT**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gghgehx0Ei3i_LS_TN5ylQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
Federal law explicitly forbids non-citizens from voting in federal elections, under threat of fines and imprisonment. However, Arizona's radical Secretary of State found a sneaky loophole.

Those who register using the federal voter registration form, distinct from the state forms we're familiar with, become "federal-only" voters. These voters can participate in federal races, like the March 2024 primary, without having their _U.S. citizenship verified by any state authorities._

**This issue transcends politics – it's about ensuring every vote cast in 2024 is legitimate. It's about protecting the sanctity of our elections.**

As the nation's premier organization dedicated to upholding the security of America's elections, we refuse to sit idly by while our electoral process is brought to its knees. **Only American citizens should be allowed to vote in American elections! **

We urgently need your support to prevent this from happening. By donating to our cause, you become a crucial part of this mission to safeguard our elections.
****_
---
[SECURE ELECTION INTEGRITY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gghgehx0Ei3i_LS_TN5ylQ~~/AARclAA~~~)

Your contribution, no matter the amount, makes a real difference. We are committed to using your donation responsibly and effectively.

Time is of the essence, and your support is invaluable.

Thank you,

Voter Reference Foundation

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: HEAR ME: The weak Senate deal is dead-on-arrival in the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
All I’m asking of you is this: Will you sign the dotted line and ENDORSE our border security plan today?

| |

---
| | | What Joe Biden is doing to our southern border is a joke.
He **HALTED** construction on The Wall, selling off its materials to the highest bidder.

He released **MILLIONS** of illegal immigrants into our country by resuming catch-and-release.

He **TERMINATED** Remain-in-Mexico, ending one of the most successful Trump-era border policies.

He **SUED** Texas for putting up razor wire along its border.
**And now the Senate is trying to ram a weak border deal through. Hear me: It's DOA in the House.**

Nothing is more apparent than this: House Republicans are the only ones taking this crisis seriously. We passed our border plan _(dubbed H.R. 2)_ MONTHS ago. It slashes illegal immigration, ends catch-and-release, staffs up Border Patrol, and builds The Wall.

Would you be surprised to know ZERO House Democrats voted for it, and Chuck Schumer is stonewalling our bill in the Senate?
---
| | | [*** ENDORSE OUR BORDER SECURITY PLAN ***](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3155832e57454366bfba639c52765f48&_e=VePZaSh6w9vVzGFoJaU8p3Ms5a6AXMFIqZZ9UoXi-rrJi-CIYlq0TnSJVJJsrtwaoLXXkxUFcJb2OKr5cRIvX7B_OJ4NX6d9b7eRtLiG4Ixy0FU4lM12vc2Myg8DETLXlPYL0WeLWVmFAa71-LvhRfVf2coe6zPRpc_uEppVbTJiMPZdpdwIj4Ep6mVRTB9j1fW6j6EdhS1zw6zhCn1s4P99znb8yjpkm-AY_PJsBxB5_FuEpbyTPbINZDtXigK7B_xPiw5f47rVC2ffc1VrDxN9qPto3dYzjQIdavrS9wnKvVIaxbbBACohwc-BlVtORzivAcB4WSwnVNRRepC_FLzo3-fv-mmsET5T_-phqfAZo9vAjGYzVDq-VcXOZRCJMfO2CfBf2nTyk1YKIip1_SICcAkCWDg7KTtm2FfXT_Pp4lTb9b7qRuzv3oQITWF68OoZPyl-WXPG-35nvyOG8g%3D%3D "*** ENDORSE OUR BORDER SECURITY PLAN ***")
---
That's why I'm coming to you - the American People. If we want REAL change at the southern border, we need to come together and put PRESSURE on Joe Biden and open-border Democrats.

_**[All I'm asking of you is this: Will you sign the dotted line and ENDORSE our border security plan today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3155832e57454366bfba639c52765f48&_e=VePZaSh6w9vVzGFoJaU8p3Ms5a6AXMFIqZZ9UoXi-rrJi-CIYlq0TnSJVJJsrtwaoLXXkxUFcJb2OKr5cRIvX7B_OJ4NX6d9b7eRtLiG4Ixy0FU4lM12vc2Myg8DETLXlPYL0WeLWVmFAa71-LvhRfVf2coe6zPRpc_uEppVbTJiMPZdpdwIj4Ep6mVRTB9j1fW6j6EdhS1zw6zhCn1s4P99znb8yjpkm-AY_PJsBxB5_FuEpbyTPbINZDtXigK7B_xPiw5f47rVC2ffc1VrDxN9qPto3dYzjQIdavrS9wnKvVIaxbbBACohwc-BlVtOZQ73gKKIX8Eoza5RBqxk7xF8fEzGnxdEQPgm8ctUeLbUhgHiFwSvwa-kn21Fj5eYfUwQLYl293da4afDAz4rwEsKixvhyYVK0p_HrRwXSSY2-W9tI82ymvjxfQP9biD10d5sXF353XSLbguQBtQSWA%3D%3D "All I’m asking of you is this: Will you sign the dotted line and ENDORSE our border security plan today?")**_

Look:

We can't allow this humanitarian and national security crisis to go on anymore. President Biden can act with the stroke of his pen, but he REFUSES. It's up to the American People to send him a message he can't ignore anymore: _Secure. Our. Border._

_**[I'm pleading with you to add your name right here, right now.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3155832e57454366bfba639c52765f48&_e=VePZaSh6w9vVzGFoJaU8p3Ms5a6AXMFIqZZ9UoXi-rrJi-CIYlq0TnSJVJJsrtwaoLXXkxUFcJb2OKr5cRIvX7B_OJ4NX6d9b7eRtLiG4Ixy0FU4lM12vc2Myg8DETLXlPYL0WeLWVmFAa71-LvhRfVf2coe6zPRpc_uEppVbTJiMPZdpdwIj4Ep6mVRTB9j1fW6j6EdhS1zw6zhCn1s4P99znb8yjpkm-AY_PJsBxB5_FuEpbyTPbINZDtXigK7B_xPiw5f47rVC2ffc1VrDxN9qPto3dYzjQIdavrS9wnKvVIaxbbBACohwc-BlVtOX1rWUzfk_KvcQnPfRKKI9WYhMCXDwRLMslylasrwoaSxnjovOPu4pLLn0k7GIFmpCGKZD5Jj6bw3YY9Cb_zndpRzzicaJ0iYejsPCGDRJBkYE40ukj-00ZtgRuvHDTBOquxKGdYU94Tng0PGQ-Q5-Q%3D%3D "I’m pleading with you to add your name right here, right now.")**_

For America,

Steve Scalise
House Majority Leader

clean_body: All I’m asking of you is this: Will you sign the dotted line and ENDORSE our border security plan today? | | | | | What Joe Biden is doing to our southern border is a joke. He HALTED construction on The Wall, selling off its materials to the highest bidder. He released MILLIONS of illegal immigrants into our country by resuming catch-and-release. He TERMINATED Remain-in-Mexico, ending one of the most successful Trump-era border policies. He SUED Texas for putting up razor wire along its border. And now the Senate is trying to ram a weak border deal through. Hear me: It's DOA in the House. Nothing is more apparent than this: House Republicans are the only ones taking this crisis seriously. We passed our border plan (dubbed H.R. 2) MONTHS ago. It slashes illegal immigration, ends catch-and-release, staffs up Border Patrol, and builds The Wall. Would you be surprised to know ZERO House Democrats voted for it, and Chuck Schumer is stonewalling our bill in the Senate? | | | "* ENDORSE OUR BORDER SECURITY PLAN " That's why I'm coming to you - the American People. If we want REAL change at the southern border, we need to come together and put PRESSURE on Joe Biden and open-border Democrats. "All I’m asking of you is this: Will you sign the dotted line and ENDORSE our border security plan today?" Look: We can't allow this humanitarian and national security crisis to go on anymore. President Biden can act with the stroke of his pen, but he REFUSES. It's up to the American People to send him a message he can't ignore anymore: Secure. Our. Border. "I’m pleading with you to add your name right here, right now." For America, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | | " ENDORSE OUR BORDER SECURITY PLAN " | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | | "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. body:

---
**Did you see the BREAKING news!?!**
**MAGA Republicans’ plan to destroy the USPS _is working!!_** | [1,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: PLEASE, TAKE OUR EMERGENCY POSTAL WORKER APPROVAL POLL SO WE CAN HAVE THE DATA WE NEED TO SAVE THE USPS! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20713%2E4449941%2ESQSWA9)

* * *
Look, MAGA Republicans saw the power the USPS held in keeping our democracy functional during the pandemic. ⬇

So they hired Trump-fan and MAGA donor, Louis DeJoy, to destroy the USPS _and their plan is working!!!_

**Now the USPS is at the risk of COLLAPSE, so we need 1,000 Democrats like you to take our emergency poll so we can have the data we need to see our successful Save USPS Strategy through!**

name: Serve America
subject: Honored and Inspired: A Message from Peter Dixon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hey friend,
My name is Peter Dixon - Marine Corps veteran, father of three, entrepreneur, and Democratic candidate for California’s 16th Congressional District . I am writing with excitement to announce that Congressman Seth Moulton and his organization Serve America is endorsing me in the race for CA-16, and to take a moment to introduce myself to his incredible network of supporters.
Like Seth in his first race, I’m in a fierce primary for the Democratic nomination in a critical and tight race.
Can you chip in to help Serve America elect a Marine to represent Silicon Valley? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dixon]
I am a career public servant running against a field of career politicians. Like Seth, I served in the Marine Corps after 9/11 because I could not ask anyone else to go in my place. After deploying to Iraq and Afghanistan, I served in the Obama Administration’s State Department, combating cartels and gender-based violence. I have real-world experience defending our democratic values and institutions.
After my service, I came home to CA-16 to found a public benefit company, helping speed up the adoption of essential technology by the American government and especially our military. I know what it’s like to sit at the kitchen table and worry about making payroll. At the same time, I co-founded With Honor, a non-profit whose mission is to elect servant-leader veterans to Congress, and ensure they work in a bipartisan manner to get things done in Washington.
Today, our very democracy is under threat, and I hope to serve again in Congress to protect the fabric of our nation. I’m humbled and grateful to have an endorsement from Serve America, and for our shared vision to transform Congress by electing leaders who know what it means to serve.
California’s primary election is on March 5 – only 33 days away – and if we’re going to ensure that the next generation of service-led and people-first leaders are elected to Congress, I need your help, friend. This is a critical race, and the time is now to protect our democracy from the extremists who threaten it.
Please split a donation between Peter Dixon’s campaign for Congress and Serve America to bring service-focused leadership back to Washington. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dixon]
With Gratitude,
Peter Dixon
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dixon]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=0%2FYK28HjeVZ%2BAet5i5I9lsyuO%2Fg7xTYkA1laQ5xLUlzo34mL2Oh%2FoBjo2btArkjc4CzYnZFHveaUqdoVOIsAx4u%2BmahxnOlNbpPMbem%2BisGTtA4v6wDKz63gfvU88aCkGRV6uxGFTEuHrz6NK7YXJdC5e8JQzbNtOap3Q%2Bg%2FPLsHAeVp893MwZrgJpdnlMyR6UDf0tFuhAQc4yT5mOtBvmYsN44m8SVoJG4sxzAxHAyO%2FzVkylrx93fshEc3O9xw21nEaeul1o6aOTGPDi0D8bLfHKeSlDn3f1mSTX%2B%2FwMekBY%2F9kRz%2B0sy5kSPvrtgiDx4M0UIzomCbLCqp1WnWbdeVomMS0Nh2kYx2RadAOFEbHN5z%2BQSoWiNfABjFvOy1B17mcdd59YBmip%2BmwTam03l7gsaY0ufneSPpMbc%2FEq8%3D .
Paid for by Serve America PAC
Serve America PAC
PO Box 2013
Salem, MA 01970
United States

Peter,

**My message here is simple: It's time to SEAL THE SOUTHERN BORDER.**

The chaos at the southern border is out of control, and just when I think it can't get any worse, a grim new record is broken.

As Governor, I have done everything in my power to support Texas Governor Greg Abbott and stop the flood of illegal migrants, drugs, and cartels from coming into our country.

I stepped up and supported ‘Operation Lone Star' by sending members of our state's National Guard to support our brave border control agents.

[**SEAL THE SOUTHERN BORDER**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=43e8a8a0b8744b0089223ba761bf1501&_e=ejn82j8kuwJl2s_GrOwfuGNiOIXkXUJ6FjF0Gj6xE_dH2R6obc5tMlI8Hq2MNkrAvxM8Vjtp9Zd7fztQ1GxbIqJgjCZRdvSQ_F0AP1aFHKL5jUsYXuPlEwnSSKh5XFGgc-3-hq6NVBR1X7dnIvEKoq-cccNltd2WXGiM-2ePuf6bJv1fpJEUFUMn_Q3KlNNwqVp1WoXcieZ0wAHLC8PP6hIi6Z1r6EyXDKEBoozB0WrxfStxJYqsO-NGQQoPwwlrFj0HrxQfQoWyPB8UA0RPupiFqPNvE22kyhWWpGo17SyVgaXrMCo7EmEcJVdjbTh21zFKoWAWPaTo-PoFGdnvo4NdmQcUdeTEJgtn7YosEh0-HftrzHzFETEbftXAQbW00vvJOcRNGSF1SRL_CwaIDA%3D%3D)
[**While we stepped up to help, Joe Biden and the Left in Washington fought back against protecting our nation by refusing to enforce the law.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=43e8a8a0b8744b0089223ba761bf1501&_e=ejn82j8kuwJl2s_GrOwfuGNiOIXkXUJ6FjF0Gj6xE_dH2R6obc5tMlI8Hq2MNkrAvxM8Vjtp9Zd7fztQ1GxbIqJgjCZRdvSQ_F0AP1aFHKL5jUsYXuPlEwnSSKh5XFGgc-3-hq6NVBR1X7dnIvEKoq-cccNltd2WXGiM-2ePuf6bJv1fpJEUFUMn_Q3KlNNwqVp1WoXcieZ0wAHLC8PP6hIi6Z1r6EyXDKEBoozB0WoDqzwmgjAX3S6CJbrDCLcwQRyE6UUINz9EUJzc4ymhXqxJzVqEz2kNOuvaJF8Vj1tnE5u2MPV5JTyG-qfuNpTjJUTS25CxU5KbTtsxE4pm28vX7ptPzpi2Z0DolOHmmqz4e6fmfPAlfuZ0xe_9iWzbJxFBeLW_LcVFMcHCezI0cQ%3D%3D)

As a result, this disaster has turned every state into a border state. In West Virginia, we have seen how illegal drugs smuggled across the border deeply hurt our state. [**We must stop the flow of fentanyl, human trafficking, and criminal activity and SEAL THE BORDER NOW!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=43e8a8a0b8744b0089223ba761bf1501&_e=ejn82j8kuwJl2s_GrOwfuGNiOIXkXUJ6FjF0Gj6xE_dH2R6obc5tMlI8Hq2MNkrAvxM8Vjtp9Zd7fztQ1GxbIqJgjCZRdvSQ_F0AP1aFHKL5jUsYXuPlEwnSSKh5XFGgc-3-hq6NVBR1X7dnIvEKoq-cccNltd2WXGiM-2ePuf6bJv1fpJEUFUMn_Q3KlNNwqVp1WoXcieZ0wAHLC8PP6hIi6Z1r6EyXDKEBoozB0WqDDpj5vPWudhGL-R-tX2QfgF7iRUy0GDU-o2rWFNqAXsCI3PrsdMJtPV6p--MbCyIsSWzTzIjjyNGSZjyQF2lOHt-liv1c21pVPuVFFtwXdGYvgRqO_IVptstvMu0k6M5u2Z91SzW1XFnyvNwl40HSL1sDIOH7DbuHSCF3r_6tXQ%3D%3D)

[**SEAL THE SOUTHERN BORDER**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=43e8a8a0b8744b0089223ba761bf1501&_e=ejn82j8kuwJl2s_GrOwfuGNiOIXkXUJ6FjF0Gj6xE_dH2R6obc5tMlI8Hq2MNkrAvxM8Vjtp9Zd7fztQ1GxbIqJgjCZRdvSQ_F0AP1aFHKL5jUsYXuPlEwnSSKh5XFGgc-3-hq6NVBR1X7dnIvEKoq-cccNltd2WXGiM-2ePuf6bJv1fpJEUFUMn_Q3KlNNwqVp1WoXcieZ0wAHLC8PP6hIi6Z1r6EyXDKEBoozB0WpdYZYtC4nfnIDWuQuhcQWgP5dXkEtGPThtOAiRLJx_yTR6H-mor3XOvD9JSjCO7Ju3SMRzGCfDFqQz-ZVD8uPERTGhRVIU_j2OgcwisU6WphOgLyO1vKY8Mas43Q0J2Rh_P1auWkz2i1qCNFSieYdxHsvUtT2OYvLEpWbMwPMuXg%3D%3D)

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: Joe Pereles
subject: The "Chaos Caucus"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pereles for Missouri, Rhonda West, Treasurer
body:
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
Peter,
The “Chaos Caucus.”
That’s the new term for a rogue group of extreme conservative state senators in Missouri. But I didn’t come up with this nickname: this comes from the Republican leader of the senate, Senate Pro Tem Caleb Rowden.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=chaos_pic [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=chaos_pic]
The Missouri Senate has been in session since the first week of January, and nearly three weeks into a 5 month-long session, they have failed to do even the most basic procedural tasks. The Chaos Caucus has held up all official business with pointless filibusters and media fights in an effort to force every other senator to give in to their ridiculous demands.
Their demands? Put an end to the initiative petition (IP) process through which Missouri citizens get to decide important policy by simple majority vote; and privatize education with a destructive and wide-ranging taxpayer-funded voucher program.
“The beginning of the 2024 legislative session in the Missouri Senate has been nothing short of an embarrassment,” Rowden said. “A chamber designed to be occupied by civil, principled statesmen and women, has been overtaken by a small group of swamp creatures who all too often remind me more of my children than my colleagues. ”
And now that four of the six members of the Chaos Caucus—one of which is outgoing-Senator Andrew Koenig from my district, who I am seeking to replace—have been punished by having their committee assignments taken away from them, they’ve spent most of their time complaining that they lost their prime parking spots .
Senator Rowden is right: this is embarrassing. And it illustrates just how extreme so many of today’s elected Republicans really are. The number one priority over which they will grind the government to a halt is dismantling democracy itself in Missouri.
The stakes don’t get much higher than that.
It’s time to end the dysfunction, quit the petty name-calling, and get down to the business of making our state and our region a great place to call home— because we can do better.
I am running this campaign to flip a state senate seat because we all deserve better than the Chaos Caucus. And when we win, we will finally be able to deliver on the issues that matter to Missourians instead of wasting the taxpayers’ time and money on nonsense.
Sincerely,
Joe Pereles
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=wchaos_footer]

**WOW! I just got off the phone with President Trump...**
**You won’t BELIEVE what he said to me.**
_“Ronny Jackson took on the Swamp with me from Day One...he has my Complete and Total Endorsement!”_
I wish I could give him a **KISS** through the phone right then and there!
But instead, I want to return the favor **BIGLY.**
I want to give President Trump a list of his **TOP** grassroots supporters.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=56ec42ea247b423ab420cb8f821cceb9&_e=8SwB9tCNh2gKUPmoHLUuD73ldcnMDRFXwEqWvyzI2VEU0BcR-EzPEG7pUR49bD3eQdX74OweamtMf6mT9o56zz_pAfaauQSHuXBnrCryS7Fkg2aYcfDsNiJyQcr2ZjcG6FuLpFV3oX3o6emkurMMxQolHd_C0C-NRjqpRto08eueyKfKUAG210GpqOI8kjy9Npb-Ox7GuJ7pyM-11VgCeqiv8RBGXUFBKcmJAkXRvaFIVx50ebyRSC2lNpW6Jr0T6Z6-g8iSyygpBy0OlD_wUgsdUzNt-ZKXS_rlKR_EVO5QVItAO3Dekc3cpqE49Zg3Qch7IKgfecM-JlTtJsUmMnS0pkJTMZrpyuBdLjW2q0hY9YnAKWtrBZEcKe8B3dsOAWa5QRk0iw_8Xs3biAQ3K1FwjGQQ8y4NYR0tC0YMRQc%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=56ec42ea247b423ab420cb8f821cceb9&_e=8SwB9tCNh2gKUPmoHLUuD73ldcnMDRFXwEqWvyzI2VEU0BcR-EzPEG7pUR49bD3eQdX74OweamtMf6mT9o56zz_pAfaauQSHuXBnrCryS7Fkg2aYcfDsNiJyQcr2ZjcG6FuLpFV3oX3o6emkurMMxQolHd_C0C-NRjqpRto08eueyKfKUAG210GpqOI8kjy9Npb-Ox7GuJ7pyM-11VgCeqiv8RBGXUFBKcmJAkXRvaFIVx50ebyRSC2lNpW6Jr0T6Z6-g8iSyygpBy0OlD_wUvTl26mwTcHI6DZXhK4EW6541sDslGaL3nOSX0sxcxJY4gFNpzksV9Y6Hy_xMtzUEIqa_YtaHSoYEN2Qxzq0EMw2wm7_v9S3fywa5D66redzz1ODUn5hgG1JMG__oHVSGcS6rqS5jEjgeqCeJy2TYvg%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

subject: The narrowest of margins

body:
| Let us know if you’re voting in this year’s elections:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1943%2E35263%2ElmR7_v)
| | **Do you plan to vote in this November’s elections? Take our flash poll to let us know if you’ll be voting in the elections that determine which party controls the Senate and White House:** | [YES, I’M VOTING](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2402_voting/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240201_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1943%2E35263%2ElmR7_v)
---

Peter — Wisconsin is going to be one of the most hotly-contested states this November, with toss-up Senate and presidential elections on the ballot.
**Wisconsin elections are won and lost by the narrowest of margins** — with just 1% of the vote separating our state’s last Senate race and _even less than that_ deciding the last presidential election.
Now that it’s the election year, we’re polling our top supporters to gauge who’s planning to vote in this November’s pivotal elections.
**[Take our flash poll to let us know if you’re voting in this year’s elections:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2402_voting/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240201_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1943%2E35263%2ElmR7_v)**

Team Baldwin

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Alfonso?=
subject: Happy Black History Month from Team Alfonso
body:
This Black History Month, we recognize the rich tapestry of stories, achievements, and contributions that Black Americans have woven.... | | | | |
---

Dear Friend,
This Black History Month, we recognize the rich tapestry of stories, achievements, and contributions that Black Americans have woven into the history of our nation. Let's take a moment to honor these stories and recommit ourselves to the work of inclusivity and security for all.
At Team Alfonso, we believe in the power of diversity and the strength that comes from unity. Our campaign is built on the pillars of inclusivity and security for all, and we are committed to ensuring that every voice is heard and every person feels safe in our community.
This past fall, Joseph was endorsed by the Collective PAC, who traditionally have endorsed Black and Afro-Latino candidates. As the only 100% Hispanic identifying candidate supported by the Collective PAC, this endorsement underscores Joseph’s commitment to bridging the gap between Black and Brown communities.
Thank you for your continued support. Together, we can show the nation that MI-04 is committed to building an inclusive, diverse, and equitable future for everyone in the West Michigan community.
Best,Team Alfonso

Best,Team Alfonso | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Alfonso for Congress P.O Box 1375 Holland, MI 49422 * USA or |

name: Team Moore Updates
subject: Wes’s priorities for Maryland
body:
Friend,

We recently asked you to share your priorities with our team — and Wes and Aruna are sharing their focus this legislative session to bring results to Marylanders.

Their agenda for the 446th legislative session lays out a plan that leaves no one behind. They are laser-focused on the issues that matter the most to Marylanders.

To accomplish this, we’re supporting a package of 16 bills during the session that will accomplish four goals. This session, the Moore-Miller administration is focused on making Maryland:

➡️ Safer
The Victim Compensation Reform Act
The Growing Apprenticeships and the Public Safety Workforce (GAPS) Act
The Center for Firearm Violence Prevention and Intervention

➡️ More Affordable
The ENOUGH Act
The Housing Expansion and Affordability Act
The Housing and Community Development Financing Act
The Renter’s Rights Stabilization Act
The Mental Health – Emergency Evaluation and Involuntary Admission Procedures and Assisted Outpatient Treatment Programs

➡️ More Competitive
The Pava LaPere Legacy of Innovation Act
The Critical Infrastructure Streamlining Act
The Transparent Government Act

➡️ The State that Serves
The Maryland Road Worker Protection Act
The Protecting Election Officials Act
The Caring for Public Employees in Safety Professions (CAPES) Act
The Families Serve Act
The Time to Serve Act

This legislative package will move Maryland forward and position us to win the decade. We must continue working in partnership to get these bills across the finish line.

Wes and Aruna are ready to fight tooth and nail for all of us — and we're grateful you’re on this journey with us.

Team Moore

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

| |

| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf8c4427065a4d4d83c2c80a99f50c03&_e=MLIdtgF3lKqjezFKEzFjZrbKsy6EhOzPUU3MGJC5Sf-BuhfYp47ghWiXC_S4WobTOeN2LP3x0ntmpr6BOYSXutTmwubDPN14kfS-O3PMkTRzM639jT7Tb-0rASCggEdU0bowv6CER6MVVHux0J9dn6dRxPSSSxTNqBrdAscC9Rb-UC7DUiFA3d1LE9hsFnRDO5RH_VAimRQB53vKvinrNYdi-YUaCGTrL8QI-1jVi1-3PT9MjBLeIT5R_nsPh3rv5HKZMYYIxPtnCUcySaG2d81t04La8d4ZnKgLtM2BuY5xXmMiPX_MruNyjFkZsEmcgK-Naox72TmlaeVN8WDCurUgBMHxdohYLK-nrwJgk7UE7kb0GEJyGhSI7NWzoe5g-ht_pVNHaQzypUJLBvyxLBwYBKbfRqc8crDTwmMAkvFVc7cmTQpAz1cRg6h-9jLqiIQrFwwt4ou987UZO0toZolNhCAK8cJduJo1bExzM8guP0xcFQyN6_Ueum229sZK)

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf8c4427065a4d4d83c2c80a99f50c03&_e=MLIdtgF3lKqjezFKEzFjZrbKsy6EhOzPUU3MGJC5Sf-BuhfYp47ghWiXC_S4WobTOeN2LP3x0ntmpr6BOYSXutTmwubDPN14kfS-O3PMkTRzM639jT7Tb-0rASCggEdU0bowv6CER6MVVHux0J9dn6dRxPSSSxTNqBrdAscC9Rb-UC7DUiFA3d1LE9hsFnRDO5RH_VAimRQB53vKvinrNYdi-YUaCGTrL8QI-1jVi1-3PT9MjBLeIT5R_nsPh3rv5HKZMYYIxPtnCUcySaG2d81t04La8d4ZnKgLtM2BuY5xXmMiPX_MruNyjFkZsEmcgK-Naox72TmlaeVN8WDCurUgBMHxdohYLK-nrwJgk7V2sK4MNJPGCG1UyGR66NVaf3xKYs0FCceC_Niog2y9vkGq4dRs1v0O3PGE-x_q1m4mj6HT8NwzuTqQ8DXka559SVMeTsPLHjSY8hX1EmR52iq_tFKlU88f6ODL7q27nnmHXQQu8FI7tu5lXHKCtGWd)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf8c4427065a4d4d83c2c80a99f50c03&_e=MLIdtgF3lKqjezFKEzFjZrbKsy6EhOzPUU3MGJC5Sf-BuhfYp47ghWiXC_S4WobTOeN2LP3x0ntmpr6BOYSXutTmwubDPN14kfS-O3PMkTRzM639jT7Tb-0rASCggEdU0bowv6CER6MVVHux0J9dn6dRxPSSSxTNqBrdAscC9Rb-UC7DUiFA3d1LE9hsFnRDO5RH_VAimRQB53vKvinrNYdi-YUaCGTrL8QI-1jVi1-3PT9MjBLeIT5R_nsPh3rv5HKZMYYIxPtnCUcySaG2d81t04La8d4ZnKgLtM2BuY5xXmMiPX_MruNyjFkZsEmcgK-Naox72TmlaeVN8WDCurUgBMHxdohYLK-nrwJgk7VIfVBtpxCPCT7v2VWEgnCkdUQNi_TZ9Sj3ABE0SXG2uHZHtzcfDHRVkjbzDKb9clFDmFTCHMjA9HxKE2A_ecfYKyEkA6xTINVG35eR4ATXfjuNSdimD_Gzf73ZsxVIPnXCACcQNHkkpCzpCGTVB1wz)
---

Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf8c4427065a4d4d83c2c80a99f50c03&_e=MLIdtgF3lKqjezFKEzFjZrbKsy6EhOzPUU3MGJC5Sf-BuhfYp47ghWiXC_S4WobTOeN2LP3x0ntmpr6BOYSXutTmwubDPN14kfS-O3PMkTRzM639jT7Tb-0rASCggEdU0bowv6CER6MVVHux0J9dn6dRxPSSSxTNqBrdAscC9Rb-UC7DUiFA3d1LE9hsFnRDO5RH_VAimRQB53vKvinrNYdi-YUaCGTrL8QI-1jVi1-3PT9MjBLeIT5R_nsPh3rv5HKZMYYIxPtnCUcySaG2d81t04La8d4ZnKgLtM2BuY5xXmMiPX_MruNyjFkZsEmcgK-Naox72TmlaeVN8WDCurUgBMHxdohYLK-nrwJgk7VSFhi1wbbEYj1UtVgFruQNGGWo5ur6TnAFVic4r3asB-y8TRUrXRDWPkuKFDdvd6pZ0qO40LOTMWigsRIWB6YPCIY47lLys89hPc1flcCvs1S851W61pZo2p5_8lfdHc9i58uAjxti8G8jCDd4Fowg)

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

| Fellow Conservative,

It looks like your name is still missing from my petition. Would you please take a moment to complete the very brief questionnaire now?

[**COMPLETE QUESTION 3 ->
**](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=a8d05307632b416ba1ffe13bcfc1adc9&_e=0izesvItodN0JHnACoQ670Oy0mSG7pI5xswKab8HFE98pNfwVdXNMQ-mMnanMw9pv8uTeAD-joxEqrKc6uzHpJ2mt-o0NeimdleqfISYhv7JOIwirxpMnP0Ori7g07orhIf4rxb-KvI0MlTYvksWXsbpUYUhUmsV8qYiXpFkATmHkEVVvTxSGGOgDUPkfzuJXu6gsKy9db32cLSGXlM6gQhtAhXvyrXybgvN38HIH6FZWFpRsdfEx28A0mUQTrvW2f5E0P0lZoy5x7s5BsCch3Z0WDXasvbxTimbnp4TnAdfy1kHLTqhzKJHva7oAc5Fx9eZ_tD6qp45j041Dkiajh6VYn8Yz8bE0n8Gn56ruxrrG9QUmxRwZcLfd_DWlAvAltVB3fGTw_e8R3E9Hf0Vbb-Xq5miUnusJ-d8sr2vFCdF-XoewFnPddMYY6ESoSJBr7lG9OHVAYHxNpccKm6ade60TuBFC4SO9k82EGTZ-xqy9G5ilQUGW1qOZb7mIhUNC68n9zLajt1FXHkxL3NkTQ%3D%3D)

**Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election** ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him.

They are pulling out ALL the stops.

But clearly, it’s not working. **New polls show President Trump is ahead in 5 out of 6 swing states.**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

Christmas, Inc. The number of positions cut by employers in January
jumped 136%, with 82,307 positions cut compared to the 34,817 cut in
