name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I’d love to hear from you, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
A quick message of gratitude.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78221736/452758887/-849459103?refcode=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU2NTEzZS0zZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MubrPcCR9lA-7uz7JJKFQqiE38pPjXeU0gVooMGVJXo=&emci=0917b117-20c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=46764483)
---
Peter, I can’t tell you how grateful I am to this grassroots team. Your support in January was absolutely essential to our work building a movement that can take on Marsha Blackburn — and I know that I can count on you to hang in this fight with me as long as it takes. **I ask so much of you, Peter. I want you to know that I’m on YOUR team, too.** The first responsibility of _any_ elected official is to represent the interests _of the people_. That means listening to what you and your communities need — from more funding for the public school system to protections for reproductive health care access. Whatever you’re concerned about, hope for, or want to share with me: I want to hear about it. It’s critical to me to know what priorities Tennesseans want to see addressed when I’m in Congress. **_[So please, start off February by filling out our Feb. 2024 Priorities Survey (it should only take a minute or two of your time) — I can't wait to hear from you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78221739/452758897/-362712357?refcode=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU2NTEzZS0zZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MubrPcCR9lA-7uz7JJKFQqiE38pPjXeU0gVooMGVJXo=&emci=0917b117-20c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=46764483)_** | [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78221740/452758899/-362712357?refcode=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU2NTEzZS0zZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MubrPcCR9lA-7uz7JJKFQqiE38pPjXeU0gVooMGVJXo=&emci=0917b117-20c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=46764483)
---
All my best,
Gloria
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78221741/452758901/-362712357?refcode=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU2NTEzZS0zZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MubrPcCR9lA-7uz7JJKFQqiE38pPjXeU0gVooMGVJXo=&emci=0917b117-20c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=46764483)
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78221742/452758904/-849459103?refcode=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU2NTEzZS0zZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MubrPcCR9lA-7uz7JJKFQqiE38pPjXeU0gVooMGVJXo=&emci=0917b117-20c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78221743/452758905/209297649?amount=25&refcode=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.59e6513e-3dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU2NTEzZS0zZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MubrPcCR9lA-7uz7JJKFQqiE38pPjXeU0gVooMGVJXo=)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Maura Healey is taking away your community center...
body:
To house illegal immigrants
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jr_Bbt2jtpvla6lifkVIKtBMkRrl72OreQzrGit_Eh1k_QVPnTeOYr4Fo9Sy1TF7FeTigbQsKefjL1WuTGHjRyfeMMgJu5wdGf2fJqBImSvFOr1vXOv__non8p4zrf0BkJEoRq363WjmZN8ZG0af6agrhI9gi76oG505_P_6gusThnXrPmAG4pzZlMShIs8dyA2b0U_lhL0YORVtPNzrIw==&c=QA3ycjw-rkskRIyHvMwYEAJKh_9-I81qNM9JWEABdkYWeFcsx3Yygw==&ch=ZNzJKsOBaGq3oTRA3pCqMCXYMOKBRNuEYXmUUv0vYXPyWVDaQ_4GLg==)
---
| January 31, 2024
Friend,
As you remember, I ran for Governor in 2022 with a clear plan for how to manage the Commonwealth and to be ready to handle any crisis that may arise.
Today my former opponent, Governor Maura Healey, was on the news for closing a Roxbury community center, for the purpose of housing more illegal immigrants. Around 400 more to be exact!
In a time where costs such as housing, groceries, and daycare are at record highs; our Governor thought it was a good idea to close a community center that plays such an important role in the greater Boston area.
Her excuse, in her exact words, "We're here today because we really don't have a choice,"
Really? We don't have a choice?
Imagine being the Governor of the Commonwealth, with your party holding a supermajority in the State House and Senate, and holding every Congressional and US Senate Seat in the state, and claiming that you don't have a choice.
Governor Healey and every elected Democrat in Massachusetts has a choice. They have the majority necessary to take the votes to resolve this crisis, but they are choosing not to.
When Governor Healey said "We really don't have a choice," she really meant "YOU really don't have a choice!"
YOU really don't have a choice if your community center closes to house illegal immigrants. Say goodbye to your children's after-school programs, your children's daycare, and your family's community pool.
YOU really don't have a choice if the hotel near your house closes down to house illegal immigrants. Say goodbye to those tourist dollars.
YOU really don't have a choice if you or a loved one is a homeless veteran. Those free hotel rooms are only available to illegal immigrants.
What happens when they run out of hotels and community centers? There are plenty of senior centers and public libraries they will likely "utilize" next...
Enough is enough. The reality is, right now, you really don't have a choice in this issue. However, we have an opportunity to change this!
We need to rebuild the Massachusetts Republican Party. We can no longer allow the Democrats in power to put our Commonwealth in a crisis, and then cry on TV claiming there is nothing they can do to fix the crisis. We also need Republicans in office who will fight for us.
KathyJo and I need your support. Together, we will fight for a Republican Party that gives YOU a choice. A Republican Party that elects Representatives and Senators who will fight for your voice. A Republican Party that will be YOUR party.
You DO have a choice. We have a choice.
Join our team, [consider donating to our campaign,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jr_Bbt2jtpvla6lifkVIKtBMkRrl72OreQzrGit_Eh1k_QVPnTeOYr4Fo9Sy1TF7FeTigbQsKefjL1WuTGHjRyfeMMgJu5wdGf2fJqBImSvFOr1vXOv__non8p4zrf0BkJEoRq363WjmZN8ZG0af6agrhI9gi76oG505_P_6gusThnXrPmAG4pzZlMShIs8dyA2b0U_lhL0YORVtPNzrIw==&c=QA3ycjw-rkskRIyHvMwYEAJKh_9-I81qNM9JWEABdkYWeFcsx3Yygw==&ch=ZNzJKsOBaGq3oTRA3pCqMCXYMOKBRNuEYXmUUv0vYXPyWVDaQ_4GLg==) and encourage your friends and family to vote for Diehl and Boss for Republican State Committee on March 5th.
As always, thank you for your support
Geoff Diehl
Donate here: [https://secure.winred.com/diehl-boss-for-state-committee/donate-today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jr_Bbt2jtpvla6lifkVIKtBMkRrl72OreQzrGit_Eh1k_QVPnTeOYr4Fo9Sy1TF7FeTigbQsKefjL1WuTGHjRyfeMMgJu5wdGf2fJqBImSvFOr1vXOv__non8p4zrf0BkJEoRq363WjmZN8ZG0af6agrhI9gi76oG505_P_6gusThnXrPmAG4pzZlMShIs8dyA2b0U_lhL0YORVtPNzrIw==&c=QA3ycjw-rkskRIyHvMwYEAJKh_9-I81qNM9JWEABdkYWeFcsx3Yygw==&ch=ZNzJKsOBaGq3oTRA3pCqMCXYMOKBRNuEYXmUUv0vYXPyWVDaQ_4GLg==)

clean_body: To house illegal immigrants | | | | == | January 31, 2024 Friend, As you remember, I ran for Governor in 2022 with a clear plan for how to manage the Commonwealth and to be ready to handle any crisis that may arise. Today my former opponent, Governor Maura Healey, was on the news for closing a Roxbury community center, for the purpose of housing more illegal immigrants. Around 400 more to be exact! In a time where costs such as housing, groceries, and daycare are at record highs; our Governor thought it was a good idea to close a community center that plays such an important role in the greater Boston area. Her excuse, in her exact words, "We're here today because we really don't have a choice," Really? We don't have a choice? Imagine being the Governor of the Commonwealth, with your party holding a supermajority in the State House and Senate, and holding every Congressional and US Senate Seat in the state, and claiming that you don't have a choice. Governor Healey and every elected Democrat in Massachusetts has a choice. They have the majority necessary to take the votes to resolve this crisis, but they are choosing not to. When Governor Healey said "We really don't have a choice," she really meant "YOU really don't have a choice!" YOU really don't have a choice if your community center closes to house illegal immigrants. Say goodbye to your children's after-school programs, your children's daycare, and your family's community pool. YOU really don't have a choice if the hotel near your house closes down to house illegal immigrants. Say goodbye to those tourist dollars. YOU really don't have a choice if you or a loved one is a homeless veteran. Those free hotel rooms are only available to illegal immigrants. What happens when they run out of hotels and community centers? There are plenty of senior centers and public libraries they will likely "utilize" next... Enough is enough. The reality is, right now, you really don't have a choice in this issue. However, we have an opportunity to change this! We need to rebuild the Massachusetts Republican Party. We can no longer allow the Democrats in power to put our Commonwealth in a crisis, and then cry on TV claiming there is nothing they can do to fix the crisis. We also need Republicans in office who will fight for us. KathyJo and I need your support. Together, we will fight for a Republican Party that gives YOU a choice. A Republican Party that elects Representatives and Senators who will fight for your voice. A Republican Party that will be YOUR party. You DO have a choice. We have a choice. Join our team, == and encourage your friends and family to vote for Diehl and Boss for Republican State Committee on March 5th. As always, thank you for your support Geoff Diehl Donate here: == Checks can be mailed to: Geoff Diehl & KathyJo Boss 10 Village Way Whitman, MA 02382 | | == | PS Do you live outside of our district? name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Biden's "Strategic Plans" for Election Interference
body:
( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=354101.87.1.488253db60b17766030c2425e302d83c )

Fellow Patriot,

_As you well know, the Biden Administration has weaponized nearly every part of the federal government to advance its radical agenda. \*\*And now time is running out for us to ensure that Biden’s Deep State apparatus doesn’t interfere with the elections in 2024...\*\* _

That’s why my team at America First Legal is in federal court fighting to force the government to release the “Strategic Plans” of fourteen different federal agencies that describe their secret efforts to prepare for the elections in 2024.

\*\*Quick Recap:\*\* President Biden’s Executive Order 14019, titled “_Promoting Access to Voting_,” called for each agency to submit to a “Strategic Plan” to promote mail-in voting schemes, expand multilingual voter registration and election communication, and distribute voter registration and mail-in ballots among many other suspicious preparatory moves.

_ \*\*We must expose and stop these nefarious plans!\*\* _

_ \*\*DONATE NOW TO HELP US FIGHT BACK >>\*\* _ ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=354101.88.1.8e7ac0fc77efeeed5c32d889c9eb7562 )

In this crucial fight, we continued our urgent legal action in the Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit this past week. This case stems from our lawsuit against the 14 federal agencies for concealing their “Strategic Plans” for implementing Biden’s executive order (EO. 14019) which clearly paves the way for their interference in elections as described above.

If we fail, Biden and the far-left Deep State may gain even more power to interfere with and rig our elections for their own benefit. America First Legal is absolutely committed to exposing the government’s scheme to rig the next election to prolong the current leftist dystopia.

\*\*We are one of the only conservative groups aggressively targeting the most serious threats from the Deep State without fear or hesitation - when you support us, the impact is immediate and efficacious -\*\*\*\* please consider supporting us strongly again right now\*\*( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=354101.89.1.b729f24e7919715f991a479cab8f723a )\*\*.\*\*

_Thank you!_

\*\*DONATE NOW >>\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=354101.90.1.e28834721232a5074fb310b2afd683a5 )

Stephen Miller

_President, America First Legal _

America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

name: INDems
subject: Jim Lucas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This week, Republican State Rep. Jim Lucas thought it would be a great idea to flash his handgun at a group of Hoosier high school students. Lucas opens his coat to reveal his gun to students who were there to push for more gun safety legislation. The students say they were shocked and frightened by the incident. _**[Jim Lucas has been convicted of a DUI in the last year, and here he is carrying a handgun in the Statehouse. Chip in if you think this double standard for Republican legislators should be repealed.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78223943/452762836/405560545?refcode=240201Lucas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2UxMzc3MC00MWMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXpW4YpEq4nVs57OOTK93CbmgILgtSrMYeRzR60dly8=)**_ The incident shows just how far the Republican supermajority will go to protect and defend the gun lobby, even against the wishes of Hoosier children who want to be safe in the classroom. name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: I'm respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?refcode=em20240201-1&recurring=1&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa)
Hi Peter, it's Tammy Duckworth.
**[I’m respectfully asking if you’ll make a contribution to support my friend Bob Casey’s re-election campaign. Let me tell you why.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?refcode=em20240201-1&recurring=1&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa)**
Bob is a fierce advocate for working families in Pennsylvania and across the country and, right now, he’s facing the toughest campaign of his career. **This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of 2024, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.**
Mitch McConnell and national Republicans have zeroed in on Pennsylvania as a must-win Senate race in their mission to take back the majority. They’re preparing to do everything they can to regain Senate control by coming after Bob and flipping Pennsylvania red.
Not only that, but Bob’s opponent, David McCormick, has the ability to self-fund. That means PA could see even more political spending than it did in 2022 -- _and I don’t think you need me to remind you that they spent a record-breaking $381 million in PA last time around._
**[We need to stand with Bob to keep a real Pennsylvanian in the Senate, and defend our Democratic majority. Bob is relying on this team to have his back, so I hope you’ll chip in a few dollars to support him today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?refcode=em20240201-1&recurring=1&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240201-1-el&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240201-1-el&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240201-1-el&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240201-1-el&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240201-1-el&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240201-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240201-1&refcode2=1873_552475_UUgawa&akid=1873%2E552475%2EUUgawa)

Tammy Duckworth

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bob=20Christian?=
subject: Groundhog Day All Over Again
body:
It's time for Groundhog Day, a time for do-overs. Help me do-over my run for Congress. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us17.campaign-archive.com/?e=3d27610f3d&u=377cebd307a6b880bd19996d8&id=3fcdbf314a)
---
| |
## It's Groundhog Day All Over Again
It has been one hell of a month for the United States of America. The kind of month that finds itself in the history books. In fact, so much has happened this month that it is hard to understand how it is all related. “How is that?” you may ask. It is simple. We have entered the final phase of GOP power politics. The “it's my way or the highway” crowd is at its apex, and it is very possible that our nation will once again bleed as a result. By linking Israeli and Ukrainian aid to a border deal and then backing out on both is the clearest sign yet that the members of the Republican Caucus have chosen their party over their people and are no longer interested in solving the problems of the nation. This paralysis has led directly to the strengthening of Russia in Europe and prolonged Israel’s struggle against Hamas. Allowing a private citizen, no matter his past positions, to not only influence but to completely derail national policy decisions is a further sign of a party whose sacred oath has replaced the word “constitution” with the word “Trump.” Finally, for the second time in 162 years the State of Texas sent a letter to the United States Government demanding their “right” to treat human beings like chattel. This time in direct defiance of the Supreme Court of the United States. Supposedly, the final arbiter in our nation of laws. So much for the party of law and order. What is the answer if SCOTUS is not? Is open rebellion, such as Texas supporting the answer? Is it a “national divorce” (secession is a bad word in the south) as Marjorie Taylor Greene is advocating? Or is it allowing serious national issues to fester in the hopes of securing future political power, as the entirety of the Republican party seems willing to do? None of these answers feel right to me, and I suspect that none of them feel right to you either. There is no denying that something is wrong. But what do we do when one side simply walks away from the table? \- It has been over 100 days (about 3 and a half months) since the Biden administration asked Congress for financial and military aid for Israel and Ukraine \- The first truly bi-partisan border deal Congress has considered in 42 years is in danger because a private citizen, who has been found guilty of rape, found guilty of fraud, and is facing an additional 91 indictments is running for President. \- The government has been under constant threat of shutdown with the next deadlines just over a month away and there appears to be very little desire by the members of the far-right to find a compromise. It wouldn't surprise me at all if the GOP shut down the government just to rile their base. \- A Republican governor has openly defied the authority of the Supreme Court of the United States. Essentially questioning the very foundation of our nation. If there is no recognized supreme authority, then what? Seriously, then what? Do we all just willy-nilly do what we please? Can the federal government go ahead and eliminate all student debt although the Supreme Court has ruled against that idea? Should the Biden Administration start opening federally funded abortion clinics in states that have passed laws otherwise, again, ignoring the Court? Where does this chaos end? And what is the end game? The end game for the Republican party is the same as it has been since Trump descended the golden stair and declared his will manifest and peddled his hatreds as policy. The GOP desires power, pure and simple. The power to dictate what you read, the power to dictate what you can learn, the power to prevent you from making personal medical decisions, especially if you are female or LBGTQ. They want the power to ensure that they and their friends will not be held accountable for misdeeds or crimes. They want the power to destroy anything they don’t agree with or that makes them uncomfortable. Ultimately, they just want power. The only things that we can do to stop it is to elect more Democrats and re-elect Joe Biden. The first two years of his administration featured the most productive congressional session in history, passing 362 proposals including: The CHIPS Act, the Infrastructure Act, the American Rescue Plan, the Inflation Reduction Act, the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, along with numerous laws to protect our children from human traffickers, improve the lives of our veterans and expand the rights of workers. By comparison, the first year of the Republican controlled Congress was damn near the least productive congressional year in history, passing only 34 items. Two of which were continuing resolutions to prevent a government shutdown. Seriously, the split is that drastic. And it is not Democrats that are getting in the way. It is Republicans. Whether they are fighting with their brethren in the Senate or fighting each other in the House, the far-right of the Republican party has managed to hold its leadership, the House itself, and the nation at large hostage to their increasingly unrealistic demands. The GOP quite literally reminds me of a hysterical child, pitching a public fit, knowing that their parents can’t or won’t do anything so long as they are still in public. Well, ladies and gentlemen, we are the parents. We are the people. It is up to us to solve these problems and the most powerful tool we have is our voice. The only practical solution to this current mess is to elect more Democrats. So, please, find a candidate in your area and give them your support! Give them your money, give them your talent, and give them your time. It is going to take all of us to win this election! We are in this Together!
---
|
---
| | |
---
**Legislation**

Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act of 2024 - Raises the Child Tax Credit through 2025 while also providing small business tax breaks and incentives. Passed the House Jan. 31, 2024

Bi-Partisan Senate Immigration Reform - Provides specific guidelines and authority for the POTUS to close the border; reforms asylum and parole laws. Negotiations continue in the Senate; bill appears to be non-starter in House due to GOP/Trump influence.

Israeli and Ukranian Aid Packages - over 100 days since submitted for consideration. No action pending.

Continuing Resolutions regarding the government - Both deadlines moved to early March. Background negotiations continuing, but no true deals seem to be emerging.

[Gold Dome report on GA Congress](https://christianforga6.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=377cebd307a6b880bd19996d8&id=fee420cd13&e=3d27610f3d)
[Georgia's new voting maps](https://christianforga6.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=377cebd307a6b880bd19996d8&id=60a4f81976&e=3d27610f3d)

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene is introducing a resolution to censure Ilhan Omar today.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Once again, progressive Rep. Ilhan Omar is facing racist, xenophobic
attacks from the GOP. Right-wing extremist Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene is
planning on introducing a resolution in Congress today to censure Ilhan.

This comes days after Florida Governor and Republican presidential
drop-out Ron DeSantis called for Ilhan to be “expelled, denaturalized and
deported” from the United States.

Why are they rabidly attacking her this week? Republicans are smearing
Ilhan over a mistranslation of a speech she gave in Somali while speaking
about the recent election in a region of Somalia, in which she called for
unity. The GOP are using a faulty translation to falsely claim that Ilhan
proclaimed allegiance to Somalia but not the United States — a flat-out
lie.

These bigoted attacks against Ilhan are nothing new, but with her primary
election coming up in just a few months, it’s critical we have her back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240201-io.FnzR0y&refcode=em20240201-33120&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=33120%2E1203867%2ELZdJHc ]Will you split a grassroots contribution of $3 or more
to show Ilhan your support and help Justice Democrats protect her
vulnerable seat this year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240201-io.FnzR0y&refcode=em20240201-33120&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=33120%2E1203867%2ELZdJHc ]Contribute $3

Right-wing Republicans like MTG continue to waste their time and resources
in Congress attacking their progressive, women of color colleagues, while
leaders like Ilhan and Rashida Tlaib focus on working for the people they
were elected to serve.

Let’s do everything in our power to keep Ilhan in Congress fighting for
justice and bold progressive change for our communities.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240201-33120-footer&t=1021&refcode2=33120_1203867_LZdJHc&akid=33120%2E1203867%2ELZdJHc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=33120%2E1203867%2ELZdJHc

| | Friend, we stand at a critical juncture in our nation's history. It's apparent that the current leadership in Washington, D.C. is jeopardizing America's national security through misguided economic decisions and a divisive approach to governance. Now, more than ever, we need leaders who prioritize the strength and security of our nation over partisan politics. I recognize the urgent need for a change in leadership to address the threats posed by poor economic decisions, dismissive attitude towards state and local governments, and a political climate that often puts self-interest ahead of the nation's welfare. **THAT’S WHY I’M RUNNING FOR OFFICE**
Americans are crying out for leaders who will place the good of the nation above the size of their bottom line, and I want you to be part of the change.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Dave Min Leads Democratic Field In Fundraising In CA47
body:
Joanna Weiss Faces Increased Scrutiny Over Personal Financing Of Her Campaign | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2851d92ebe35/dave-min-leads-democratic-field-in-fundraising-in-ca47-15669776?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** February 1, 2024
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com) **Dave Min Leads Democratic Field In
Fundraising In CA47 **
_Joanna Weiss Faces Increased Scrutiny Over Personal
Financing Of Her Campaign_
**IRVINE, CA** — State Senator Dave Min remains the highest raising Democrat in the contest for California’s 47th Congressional District, raising $1,551,362.70 and reporting 835,374.77 cash on hand and no self loans through 2023, heading into the March primary. Joanna Weiss, who is running a negative campaign attacking Dave Min, is under [increased scrutiny](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=3198f2ed5f&e=7017cc100e) over the $231,600 of her own money that she has used to prop up her campaign.

As the Daily Beast [reports](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=98d91e7475&e=7017cc100e), the Weiss’ family has built a personal fortune defending the Catholic Church in Orange County from multiple sex abuse scandals involving pedophile priests.
**“Again, at no point in her statement did Weiss deny funding her campaign with money that the Catholic Church used to try to deprive sexual abuse survivors of restitution.”
\- _The Daily Beast, 1/18/24_**
This work on behalf of abusers is in addition to the millions the Weiss’ have made representing Corporations found guilty of employment violations, discrimination, wrongful termination, smuggling illegal immigrants, and violating Fair Labor Practices.
**“Joanna Weiss is trying to distract from the fact that she is self-funding her campaign with money earned from a career working against the labor movement and hard-working California workers.”
\- _The Huffington Post, Oscar Lopez, Political Director of SEIU California _**
“Dave Min has long been a champion for abortion access, gun violence prevention, the environment, and abuse survivors,” said Dan Driscoll, Min’s campaign manager. “Weiss’s positives don’t carry water, so their campaign is leaning on millions in out-of-district dark money and personal loans to tear Dave down. Luckily, voters in CA-47 aren’t so easily fooled.”

Min is endorsed by outgoing Rep. Katie Porter, as well as the California Democratic Party, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the National Education Association, the American Federation of Teachers, California Environmental Voters, and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions, and he is the only candidate endorsed in this race by the California Labor Federation or the AFL-CIO. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=10d6bf85b5&e=7017cc100e).
###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: ⏰ Clock is ticking on impeachment - you in?
body:
I want to be clear that I would absolutely vote to impeach. Are you with me on this? |
---
| | Peter, did you see the news yesterday?

Republicans just voted to send articles of impeachment against Biden's Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to the floor of Congress.

**_That means that Congress will soon vote to defend Mayorkas' failed record ... or vote to remove him from office._**

Here's a brief excerpt:
* _"Alejandro Mayorkas, in**violation of his oath** to support and defend the Constitution of the United States ... **has willfully and systemically refused to comply with Federal immigration laws** ... and **thereby acted to the grave detriment of the interests of the United States."**_

I called on Congress to impeach Mayorkas months ago and I want to be clear: I would absolutely vote for these articles without hesitation.

Anyone who so flagrantly prioritizes the Far Left's Open Borders agenda over our country's security _**can't be allowed to stay in office.**_** ** We have to put America First.

**Here's what scares me though: Washington Democrats - including our own radical liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter - will vote to protect Mayorkas!!**

They are content to sit around and do nothing while Joe Biden lets millions of illegal immigrants break our laws and enter our country!

It's truly twisted and sickening that our leaders would allow this to happen.

_**That's why we absolutely have to win this Election.**_

Securing our border is my top priority. I even visited the border myself to learn how we can fix it. If we don't have a border, we don't have a country.

**I will be more than a Republican vote for border security in Congress. I will be a FIGHTER for it. **I will work with anyone in Washington who believes, like I do, that we have to secure our border by any means necessary.

[**> >> If you're with me on this, please ADD YOUR NAME and endorse my campaign for Congress today. **](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=4f26a5a827&e=86e91e802d)

We have to start putting America First. That requires bold leadership.

I hope I can earn your support and your vote,

\- Max Ukropina
---

name: John Fetterman
subject: Can't believe this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey folks,
I feel silly for even *thinking* that DC Republicans might do ANYTHING that would help working families.
This week, the House passed a bipartisan bill that would expand the Child Tax Credit and bring as many as *400k* kids out of poverty.
Slam dunk, right? ...wrong.
**_“Passing a tax bill that makes the president look good -- mailing out checks before the election -- means he could be re-elected, and then we won't extend the 2017 tax cuts.”_**
One of my Senate GOP colleagues *actually* said this *out loud* about a bill that would HELP KIDS.
Look, I came to DC to help people and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families -- _and our kids._ I’ll never back down from that fight.
**[I need you in my corner to stand up to this sort of nonsense. So will you make a donation of any amount today to support my work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240201-1?refcode=em20240201-1-8778&refcode2=8778_434096_DWKEGl&akid=8778%2E434096%2EDWKEGl)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240201-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240201-8778&refcode2=8778_434096_DWKEGl&akid=8778%2E434096%2EDWKEGl)**
THANK YOU! 🙏
💛 John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240201-8778-footer&t=1&refcode2=8778_434096_DWKEGl&akid=8778%2E434096%2EDWKEGl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8778%2E434096%2EDWKEGl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8778%2E434096%2EDWKEGl)

name: Mark Mullet
subject: We're already feeling the effects of the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Whether it's hotter summers, colder winters, more extreme weather events, or tougher seasons for farmers– we're already feeling the devastating effects of climate change on our community. At the same time, I know many Washingtonians are struggling with higher prices at the gas pumps and at the grocery store. I believe it’s possible to tackle the climate change crisis head on, while also making life more affordable. In the legislative session right now, we are debating what to do about the Initiative to repeal the Climate Commitment Act (CCA). **I was proud to vote in support of the CCA to put a price on Carbon, tackle climate change, and make crucial investments in our community.** But now we’re faced with a choice: do we acknowledge that the CCA needs to be fixed this session to keep Washington affordable, or do we let the current version of the CCA go to the voters and risk the entire program getting repealed? I have proposed a bill to fix the CCA so we can continue to fight climate change while keeping Washington affordable. The Olympia insiders are one thing but who I'm really interested in hearing from is you.

[**Will you reply to this email and share how this issue has affected you personally?**](mailto:info@mulletforgovernor.com?subject=My%20thoughts%20on%20CCA) **As Governor, I'll always make decisions by weighing the perspectives from diverse stakeholders and constituents like you.**

So, please take a moment and let me know what you think, how higher prices at the gas pump have affected you, and how you'd like to see our state address the climate crisis in a way that keeps Washington affordable for the average working family. Thank you for your advice on this critical issue, – Mark

---
|
* * *
---
Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78226154/452766708/1328794144?refcode=ea.0c8bba38-45c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.0c8bba38-45c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjOGJiYTM4LTQ1YzEtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-JzSys0a1nHVLD_A_NNidMR_ULpUEALA1Nap7WgmZzE=&emci=436e7bf1-7ec0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=0c8bba38-45c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4823105)

Mark your calendars for **Tuesday, February 13th** , because we're turning Galentine’s Day into a **Grace and Frankie** live reunion celebrating laughter, friendship, and the power of collective action. **That’s right. The Grace and Frankie family is getting back together for a virtual table read of some of your favorite episodes that promise to spark a laugh-out-loud moment or two in your living room.**
Being a part of that show with my dear friend Lily Tomlin was one of the great joys in my career, and I hope you can join us for a trip down memory lane. But, oh, it’s so much more than that!
**Every ticket purchased and every dollar you donate will support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC’s critical mission to elect true climate champions at every level of government.**
So, what's the plan?
**_[Grab your best friend, your sister, your colleague — heck, grab anyone who lights up your world — and hit this link to secure your virtual spot. Tickets are only $24 each! Warmly,
Jane Fonda

clean_body: Mark your calendars! | Hi there. It’s Jane Fonda reaching out with an exciting invitation for you! Mark your calendars for Tuesday, February 13th , because we're turning Galentine’s Day into a Grace and Frankie live reunion celebrating laughter, friendship, and the power of collective action. = | = That’s right. The Grace and Frankie family is getting back together for a virtual table read of some of your favorite episodes that promise to spark a laugh-out-loud moment or two in your living room. Being a part of that show with my dear friend Lily Tomlin was one of the great joys in my career, and I hope you can join us for a trip down memory lane. But, oh, it’s so much more than that! Every ticket purchased and every dollar you donate will support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC’s critical mission to elect true climate champions at every level of government. So, what's the plan? = = I can’t wait to share this evening with you. Warmly, Jane Fonda | = | = Follow the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: US Destroys Houthi Drones, Operations Site And Anti-Ship Missile
body:
And Job Cuts Soar As Employers Look For Ways To Lower Costs

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682320%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0Uj6F%2bzmsV4wViphNgZCWQ&sysid=1 US Destroys Houthi Drones, Operations Site And Anti-Ship Missile

The U.S. military took out more than a dozen Houthi drones, a drone operations site and a missile in two separate incidents overnight, U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) said in statements. The U.S.S. Carney guided-missile destroyer shot down an anti-ship ballistic missile the Houthi terrorist group launched into the surrounding waters at 8:30 p.m. Wednesday before destroying three Iranian attack drones less

The number of job cuts by American employers surged in January as companies looked to lower operating costs to adjust to harsh economic conditions, according to outplacement firm Challenger, Gray and Christmas, Inc.

Presidential candidates end-of-year financial reports released Wednesday reveal which remaining campaigns have staying-power through the November general election. Joe Biden’s reelection campaign brought in the most during the fourth quarter of 2023, followed by former President Donald Trump and former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley’s respective White House bids, according to Federal Election Commission (FEC) filings.

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: The GOP is ATTACKING the postal service!!
body:
Ever since mail-in voting became a more accessible and convenient way to exercise voting rights, Republicans have been committed to defunding the Postal Service.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78226484/452767879/444630146?refcode=2-1-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYjM3MmViLTQ1YzEtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cF09GO_XHWe8kh_fqcBIUVCon15xgxTL281-8pCeokg=)
---
| | Friend, Ever since mail-in voting became a more accessible and convenient way to exercise voting rights, Republicans have been committed to defunding the Postal Service. They know that the USPS is _crucial_ to voting-by-mail, and they want to destroy it._ It’s bad enough that the GOP is threatening mail-in voting by attacking the Postal Service, but they’re doing more than that! The Postal Service is _crucial_ for people to receive medications, not to mention keeping in touch with loved ones and shipping important items across the country._**[**The USPS is a crucial part of the government, and something that every single one of us uses. It should be free from these partisan politics being pushed by the GOP. If you support vote-by-mail and the Postal Service, chip in $10 today so we can keep protecting it from Republican attacks and fighting for pro-voting rights legislation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78226485/452767880/444630146?refcode=2-1-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYjM3MmViLTQ1YzEtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cF09GO_XHWe8kh_fqcBIUVCon15xgxTL281-8pCeokg=)****** Trump made his hatred of mail-in voting a cornerstone of his campaigns, saying that it caused fraud. But we know better. Mail-in voting is a cornerstone of our democracy that allows folks all across the country to exercise their right to vote, and there’s _no_ __ proof that it causes any sort of fraud.__**[Mail-in voting is necessary for a robust 21st century democracy, and the GOP is threatening the Postal Service to prevent us from exercising our rights. It is a transparent attack on our democracy and they must be held accountable. We know that you don’t agree with these ridiculous attacks, and by contributing $10 today, we can keep working to protect it as hard as we can.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78226486/452767881/444630146?refcode=2-1-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYjM3MmViLTQ1YzEtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cF09GO_XHWe8kh_fqcBIUVCon15xgxTL281-8pCeokg=)** **The continuous attacks on mail-in voting are proof that the GOP doesn’t care about democratic principles and our right to the ballot box. These attempts to destroy the Postal Service are just another example of Republicans trying to prevent mail-in voting by any means necessary. **[**These attacks are wrong and need to stop. Please chip in $10 today so we can continue to fight any more attacks on our Postal Service and voting rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78226487/452767882/444630146?refcode=2-1-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYjM3MmViLTQ1YzEtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cF09GO_XHWe8kh_fqcBIUVCon15xgxTL281-8pCeokg=)****** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

These attempts to destroy the Postal Service are just another example of Republicans trying to prevent mail-in voting by any means necessary. =**** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action | | United States Postal Service is not associated or affiliated with End Citizens United Action Fund and has not sponsored or approved of this communication. | | Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund 100 M Street SE Suite 1050 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Applause for my opponent?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Applause for Bipartisanship
Remember last week when I said it was necessary — even if you were on the opposite side of the aisle — to applaud decisions that benefit us all? Let's be that example today.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I need your help getting to the House to pass more bipartisan legislation.
CONTRIBUTE TO BIPARTISANSHIP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
The bipartisan tax relief bill passed by the House by 357-70 demonstrated collaboration and negotiation between a Republican leader of the House and a Democratic leader of the Senate.
The biggest story is how it benefits you and your family, but this also shows it's possible to work together. Is it perfect? No, but it is a start.
Although I applaud my opponent's vote yesterday, Bergman's overall 'Common Ground Score' evaluating bipartisanship is 4 out of 30 . He ranks two zeros in "communications" and "commitments", and he has never proposed meaningful legislation that ever made it to the House floor for a vote.
Today, I'll offer credit where credit is due, no matter its rarity. As a result of Congress's bipartisanship, here's what you get:
Child tax credit
*
A
single
working
parent
earning
$15,000
with
three
children
would
receive
a
tax
credit
of
$5,625
yearly
instead
of
$1,875.
*
Reduces
child
poverty
by
5%
compared
to
35%
previously
achieved
during
the
pandemic.
*
It
ends
after
2025
and
cost
$33
billion.
Business tax cuts
Friend, don't get me wrong, we desperately need to replace Jack Bergman through democracy.
S ome families in our district are spending nearly half of their income on childcare . Many parents can't afford to go to work, which should be economically illogical. This bump in the tax credit helps, but may not be enough, and universal pre-K is also critically important.
I support universal pre-K,
and my opponent does not.
Your donations are going a long way [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] to send me to Congress. I'm committed to passing more bipartisan legislation that helps the American people every day , not with just one vote.
Onward,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for U.S. Congress
Northern Michigan / UP
Democrat, MI01
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

Will you endorse President Trump with me?

|

| | |

name: Sean Feucht
subject: We have not forgotten you, Lahaina.
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=323dd4787d7b4d6e95aa08bf9d762e36&_e=_Ce5En7RyfxComWXaQXNAkquYDETRKp0Cg1jXfJU5SdlexTdzSwvy66YrMYuKqavJfl8tqPRHa_qDPw2GfRQLU4sC7v_PRQ56uF-WzPIcqQ3uP0Z_RgclvEnM9qlAj-37vdXVHKRK08uDMVSLZWCQvkxvLbne-RQUxAekpnjrGIOiutL6NBWnZ4oO4uiqQ_-s7FUJocauJARD-x_7x8i32QYt1u5gbaNgZIeJ3LMq9D-ZtTM7tA3od3K0KpbrDn5-i3dWOD3lvE2SCijjXsW1n_o3k6yHO2GeL_ZVhdtifNrU0wle67PUrjs2mBZvX0Z)
---
Dear Friend,
---
This weekend we kick off our FIRST STOP of the Kingdom to the Capitol 2024 tour!! On Saturday, we will be worshiping in Honolulu, HI at the state capitol, but before that, we have another special worship time planned.

Tomorrow at 5:30 pm local time, we will be gathering in Lahaina, the site of the tragic and deadly fires that raged last year. God has not forgotten Lahaina, and neither have we!

name: NextGen America
subject: Black History has ALWAYS been youth-led
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78227099/452769813/119682553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc5YzZiNS00OGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10mGXY8BGpAEoYscV79wTbhOordEGmNTvyKrqptXDCU=&emci=658c999b-61c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bf79c6b5-48c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78227100/452769814/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc5YzZiNS00OGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10mGXY8BGpAEoYscV79wTbhOordEGmNTvyKrqptXDCU=&emci=658c999b-61c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bf79c6b5-48c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) Team, from boycotting buses to demanding clean water in Michigan, Black history has always been pushed forward by the youth. This month, we’re doing more than saying empty words about how grateful we are for the history-makers who came before us. We’re amplifying the history that young Black Americans are making _right now_. Here’s our list of Black history-makers making waves in the present day. Think we missed anyone? **[Let us know about Black activists making history where you are.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78227101/452769815/-1802631748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc5YzZiNS00OGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10mGXY8BGpAEoYscV79wTbhOordEGmNTvyKrqptXDCU=&emci=658c999b-61c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bf79c6b5-48c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78227102/452769816/926251607?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc5YzZiNS00OGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10mGXY8BGpAEoYscV79wTbhOordEGmNTvyKrqptXDCU=&emci=658c999b-61c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bf79c6b5-48c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)** Best known to the world as Little Miss Flint, **Mari Copeny** has spent her formative years fighting to bring awareness to the water crisis in Flint, Michigan. Mari’s used her platform to bring politicians on board to solve problems that have cost people their lives. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78227103/452769817/-639832334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc5YzZiNS00OGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10mGXY8BGpAEoYscV79wTbhOordEGmNTvyKrqptXDCU=&emci=658c999b-61c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bf79c6b5-48c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) **Justin Pearson** represents Tennessee’s 86th district in the Tennessee House of Representatives. He and his colleague Justin Jones were unjustly expelled from the Tennessee House just last year for participating in a protest for gun control on the House floor. Since being reinstated to the Tennessee House, Rep. Pearson has continued to fight for common sense gun control laws in Tennessee, as well as advocate for other issues like affordable housing and voting rights. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78227104/452769818/2089051021?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc5YzZiNS00OGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10mGXY8BGpAEoYscV79wTbhOordEGmNTvyKrqptXDCU=&emci=658c999b-61c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bf79c6b5-48c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) **Amanda Gordon** is the youngest inaugural poet in U.S. history. Her poem _The Hill We Climb_ , which she recited at President Biden’s inauguration, calls for unity and togetherness while also celebrating her heritage as a Black woman in America. **[Want to highlight a Black activist in your area? Let us know about someone doing great work in your area today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78227105/452769819/166736720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc5YzZiNS00OGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10mGXY8BGpAEoYscV79wTbhOordEGmNTvyKrqptXDCU=&emci=658c999b-61c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bf79c6b5-48c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)** | [**Uplift a Black activist →** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78227106/452769820/-1399347221?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc5YzZiNS00OGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10mGXY8BGpAEoYscV79wTbhOordEGmNTvyKrqptXDCU=&emci=658c999b-61c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bf79c6b5-48c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)

NextGen America

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A quick note to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5311%2E5257348%2ExfZ9xY)
Hi Derek —
I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support as we kicked off 2024.
And what a start to the election year it was:
We had our first televised debate of this Senate campaign — and Steve Garvey personally attacked me for being censured for standing up to Donald Trump.
Donald Trump attacked me at a campaign rally in New Hampshire, and his attacks were amplified endlessly on _Fox News_.
We released detailed policy proposals to let voters know my plans for the Senate.
We celebrated the one-year anniversary of this Senate launch.
And we released new ads highlighting my record of defending our democracy and getting things done.
Through all the work and all the travels across our great state, I am reminded of the support of this team — because you make this all possible.
I’m inspired by how this team comes together to support our movement, and how hard we are fighting to protect our climate, build an economy that works for everyone, and defend our democracy.
With just over a month until our primary election on March 5, I’ll be relying on your support again.
But for now, once again, thank you for all your help.
All my best,
Adam

body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3281a1f448d34e24a12610a1a260ba48&_e=VeoGCiNB5Z7IqwsbYS19TemuKDDdGnUD6__rpy1K2yEZxgEE9kfCi2b9Z73mJ_5dNLOqZJz96DsIYrYUSZ6dfbDvztqinHvUGjQmyIEfRp3Vif3ZwIVL2yN1qZ4XxQmBrj8bEp5Hkrcr2NeNI8Sp33lyz7SF6JI6b7ksrajobwrlJv4B5c-VxxeP6DH6juaxRGHu3IjokXbH6rF9Udhqo-AlM86j-iMFGvr-k-P-ENZpDJudTVQ_CfNxXyQkeX_haiRXn30W5CuMwLP7FE_CkUG0TviqH6aR0PRBVhe-Lv51c0YlIQrni3hGnh_Li7q1Vyoniv3KWCEfEmARpyy8hH8Bh-16j74VwWNX5rM45dKhLujktyteqXklJg67Mjnx)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3281a1f448d34e24a12610a1a260ba48&_e=VeoGCiNB5Z7IqwsbYS19TemuKDDdGnUD6__rpy1K2yEZxgEE9kfCi2b9Z73mJ_5dNLOqZJz96DsIYrYUSZ6dfbDvztqinHvUGjQmyIEfRp3Vif3ZwIVL2yN1qZ4XxQmBrj8bEp5Hkrcr2NeNI8Sp33lyz7SF6JI6b7ksrajobwrlJv4B5c-VxxeP6DH6juaxRGHu3IjokXbH6rF9Udhqo-AlM86j-iMFGvr-k-P-ENbGBxTqPZ9MnxIrJbiBILAN2DWLryL1zApA2KdJd4OgasMHZeWisx8pmbTXIyiNhJK4QjWrKl4fbtKiM30bC7OyDlYFxBeUeq2KAOsZR5Mo-flWkhsfyyCDy3b0NUskTjULfxX9uQV9DHOWmFs31pD4)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3281a1f448d34e24a12610a1a260ba48&_e=VeoGCiNB5Z7IqwsbYS19TemuKDDdGnUD6__rpy1K2yEZxgEE9kfCi2b9Z73mJ_5dNLOqZJz96DsIYrYUSZ6dfbDvztqinHvUGjQmyIEfRp3Vif3ZwIVL2yN1qZ4XxQmBrj8bEp5Hkrcr2NeNI8Sp33lyz7SF6JI6b7ksrajobwrlJv4B5c-VxxeP6DH6juaxRGHu3IjokXbH6rF9Udhqo-AlM86j-iMFGvr-k-P-ENZXxmq74ISZzbAESBvIJqvLP2JIjDyTq6oAAv3ZFSaNkeDTRdW133r7PizHNTwSMyF3BgsNuDg2BxAsQwxYiqPKoB0jlxUrkNjTBuPK3Gg4qlIM3ecJUzROwAzkkiDlGHMt0rO-_zEPuBdRgkPFxNjw)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3281a1f448d34e24a12610a1a260ba48&_e=VeoGCiNB5Z7IqwsbYS19TemuKDDdGnUD6__rpy1K2yEZxgEE9kfCi2b9Z73mJ_5dNLOqZJz96DsIYrYUSZ6dfbDvztqinHvUGjQmyIEfRp3Vif3ZwIVL2yN1qZ4XxQmBrj8bEp5Hkrcr2NeNI8Sp33lyz7SF6JI6b7ksrajobwrlJv4B5c-VxxeP6DH6juaxRGHu3IjokXbH6rF9Udhqo-AlM86j-iMFGvr-k-P-ENaS4iv81yFIIcevPUtuBkZU3uVX8V06Xy4y1Mz25qGzd47PyN5-9F0BZVzB41_L4mbM1SvYDq0kN15ffDd8yHsAEvcUi3e-8yF-guO-mE2gfuvwcpbd0OMLbBJi9I5qtT7ek_TzAFHDFgMCTxRF6KwV)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3281a1f448d34e24a12610a1a260ba48&_e=VeoGCiNB5Z7IqwsbYS19TemuKDDdGnUD6__rpy1K2yEZxgEE9kfCi2b9Z73mJ_5dNLOqZJz96DsIYrYUSZ6dfbDvztqinHvUGjQmyIEfRp3Vif3ZwIVL2yN1qZ4XxQmBrj8bEp5Hkrcr2NeNI8Sp33lyz7SF6JI6b7ksrajobwrlJv4B5c-VxxeP6DH6juaxRGHu3IjokXbH6rF9Udhqo-AlM86j-iMFGvr-k-P-ENYdvuOa2LWOPEWX0HQG2KPwX4ZQ112ue9ofOIZI7U241r-6Q-R6OvMK4YkYRJQOQ21xG6pOEZG37NIUcAwuGl8U5WyWgOE3TyC9q9lvdw-nAU1bOFfLDmXUXsX_0XgrMzm4H1tOXfBQRV5zy78HeY-2)
---
_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: Criminals Over Citizens 😡
body:
All New Episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com | No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1b0abcacd2&e=567664f14c)

We're really excited to share the newest episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast featuring Mark and Krysty Ronchetti. [In this episode](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=50b2556814&e=567664f14c) we delve into issues that need our attention.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=88c14b090b&e=567664f14c)
During our discussion we address the border challenges. Place the responsibility squarely on the Biden administration. While President Biden tries to shift blame onto Republicans we thoroughly analyze the situation and highlight a concerning possibility; there may be terrorists, among the 8 million people who have entered the country illegally.
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0538f50944&e=567664f14c)
---
We also take a look at events in the New Mexico State Senate. They recently rejected a bill aimed at keeping criminals behind bars. We question their decision. Explore why it seems like they prioritized criminals over law abiding citizens.

Lastly we examine the decline of American media outlets. We attribute this trend to a combination of bias and sheer incompetence. The media landscape is changing rapidly. We discuss why this is happening.
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1afe4a0096&e=567664f14c)
---
Please consider supporting us by liking, subscribing, and leaving a review on your preferred podcast platform. Don't forget to [subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4ad5dcf749&e=567664f14c) for more content.
For those who want to contribute financially or grab some exclusive podcast gear, visit [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9c99cc6e44&e=567664f14c).

We sincerely appreciate your involvement, in the No Doubt About It community. We're excited to bring you thought provoking conversations in the days ahead.

Warm regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9e1578bbf7&e=567664f14c)

# Because of YOU: Dan Cox leads in raised cash on hand last quarter.
---
|
---
| Friend,

We are leading the GOP field in _raised cash on hand_ for the last quarter \- thanks to you. In our first sixty short days we raised $71,000 and have $60,000 cash on hand.

The DC establishment is so far tepid towards a proven fighter and only winning candidate that is America First in this race (yours truly) - and so as of today one of the inexperienced ones they support is out of district (and raised nearly all his money from out of state or district), but spent more than he raised by nearly $10,000. That's not good for campaigns, nor is it good for our country.

Contrast that with our campaign leading the way with the most raised for the least amount spent in our short first 60 days of this race - that's good for all of us. And with you helping me with [your immediate support](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=c56f6b6a87&e=5bb5efcda7), we will march on to victory with a war chest to beat the Democrat this fall.

We face so many challenges and one of them is ensuring our country's economic security is your security. Without the ability to dream and pass on a heritage from our labor and property, we will have lost our way as a nation. That is why we simply must win and beat the Democrats this fall with a war chest large enough to communicate to the voters and ensure an overwhelming vote for us.

Please help me keep up this momentum. I need any amount you can chip in today to keep us on track to win.

Remember the future. Remember our children. Let's fight for them together. Thank you and God bless you, and God bless America.

Humbly yours, for freedom and victory,

Dan Cox, Candidate for Congress (MD-6)

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin – and the “defund the police” mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark’s reputation.

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QQHPS5-mmqR03U4L3fBicQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnp7EP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZbr4ELxlgc-do1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QQHPS5-mmqR03U4L3fBicQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnp7EP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZbr4ELxlgc-do1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QQHPS5-mmqR03U4L3fBicQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnp7EP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZbr4ELxlgc-do1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QQHPS5-mmqR03U4L3fBicQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnp7EP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZbr4ELxlgc-do1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QQHPS5-mmqR03U4L3fBicQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnp7EP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZbr4ELxlgc-do1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QQHPS5-mmqR03U4L3fBicQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnp7EP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZbr4ELxlgc-do1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

American Freedom Report
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ECzs_SpV5qYRHk-CoPKkDw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnp7EP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuYW1lcmljYW5mcmVlZG9tcmVwb3J0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1EYWlseS1BbGVydHMmZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTI1NDBnbWFpbC5jb21XA3NwY0IKZbr4ELxlgc-do1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/h1EWoQmWsVB8wZwtm7NPUg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnp7EP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbmZyZWVkb21yZXBvcnQuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpluvgQvGWBz52jUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_
