| | Fellow Patriot, Individuals who are not U.S. citizens may soon be able to influence the outcome of the most significant election in recent history. The consequences of this scenario would be nothing short of disastrous... In a shocking move, Arizona's Democratic Secretary of State has opened a perilous path for non-citizens, whether legal or not, to participate in the 2024 election. **This includes the pivotal Republican primary in March.**
**
---
[ **DONATE NOW TO FIGHT AGAINST IT**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkbvO2zAMhZ9G3mzo5tvgoUDgLR26dDQYmnZYWJIhyymapy-UJuj6j_wOcQ4vP6_TFXhjv34HR0N0UzwmditNC5Y-eOTET_LHpKW2pdSlVJMq5qHpddupggbVyqbTrZZdcR8k6qbte7A1oDY3Wd8WUranZjZoEKngIftILZVWtjayqmVLUlvqwKquIy2sjLSft40RvINfIXL6U3lKxTbcU9oPYb4JPQo9PkKiWEZaKJJHKpdw-hkSB19FejwqDEKPgBmUOZQ2-lfskA3MeCY3HeGMSMJcMmwyQXA78OqFubxGVUa-FUczny73xnDsb5goZgSRn8HD_4N9ZBTm8uNafrb-hASfyKdXbhGHef_N28ZH0worVwe8VRhckb74jr8BAAD__3nUklA)**
---
Federal law explicitly forbids non-citizens from voting in federal elections, under threat of fines and imprisonment. However, Arizona's radical Secretary of State found a sneaky loophole.

Those who register using the federal voter registration form, distinct from the state forms we're familiar with, become "federal-only" voters. These voters can participate in federal races, like the March 2024 primary, without having their _U.S. citizenship verified by any state authorities._

**This issue transcends politics – it's about ensuring every vote cast in 2024 is legitimate. It's about protecting the sanctity of our elections.**

As the nation's premier organization dedicated to upholding the security of America's elections, we refuse to sit idly by while our electoral process is brought to its knees. **Only American citizens should be allowed to vote in American elections! **

We urgently need your support to prevent this from happening. By donating to our cause, you become a crucial part of this mission to safeguard our elections.
****_
---
[SECURE ELECTION INTEGRITY](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkbvO2zAMhZ9G3mzo5tvgoUDgLR26dDQYmnZYWJIhyymapy-UJuj6j_wOcQ4vP6_TFXhjv34HR0N0UzwmditNC5Y-eOTET_LHpKW2pdSlVJMq5qHpddupggbVyqbTrZZdcR8k6qbte7A1oDY3Wd8WUranZjZoEKngIftILZVWtjayqmVLUlvqwKquIy2sjLSft40RvINfIXL6U3lKxTbcU9oPYb4JPQo9PkKiWEZaKJJHKpdw-hkSB19FejwqDEKPgBmUOZQ2-lfskA3MeCY3HeGMSMJcMmwyQXA78OqFubxGVUa-FUczny73xnDsb5goZgSRn8HD_4N9ZBTm8uNafrb-hASfyKdXbhGHef_N28ZH0worVwe8VRhckb74jr8BAAD__3nUklA)

clean_body: Only American citizens should be allowed to vote in American elections! | | | BREAKING 2024 ELECTION UPDATE | | Fellow Patriot, Individuals who are not U.S. citizens may soon be able to influence the outcome of the most significant election in recent history. The consequences of this scenario would be nothing short of disastrous... In a shocking move, Arizona's Democratic Secretary of State has opened a perilous path for non-citizens, whether legal or not, to participate in the 2024 election. This includes the pivotal Republican primary in March. Federal law explicitly forbids non-citizens from voting in federal elections, under threat of fines and imprisonment. However, Arizona's radical Secretary of State found a sneaky loophole. Those who register using the federal voter registration form, distinct from the state forms we're familiar with, become "federal-only" voters. These voters can participate in federal races, like the March 2024 primary, without having their U.S. citizenship verified by any state authorities. This issue transcends politics – it's about ensuring every vote cast in 2024 is legitimate. It's about protecting the sanctity of our elections. As the nation's premier organization dedicated to upholding the security of America's elections, we refuse to sit idly by while our electoral process is brought to its knees. Only American citizens should be allowed to vote in American elections! We urgently need your support to prevent this from happening. By donating to our cause, you become a crucial part of this mission to safeguard our elections. ** Your contribution, no matter the amount, makes a real difference. We are committed to using your donation responsibly and effectively. Time is of the essence, and your support is invaluable. Thank you, Voter Reference Foundation | | | | | | | | Paid for by Voter Reference Foundation | | | | | Republican Majority PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78227991/452772416/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWI3ODlkMDUtNGRjMS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aOAOilkJgidw99j4kOm4XWOw2KqFqoOwCLf7dyv58Vo=&emci=9cae9bff-4cc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=5b789d05-4dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
We’re reaching out with a tough update:
**We came up just short of our $15,000 end-of-January fundraising goal. **
It’s a worrying sign because the 2024 election will be the most important of our lifetime. Our newsrooms in 10 battleground states are already working 24/7, and they need your help to stop right-wing lies and provide critical local election coverage to _**the**_ communities that will swing this year’s election.
**[Please, can you chip in $7 to help us start 2024 on the right foot? We only have $1,490 left to close our fundraising gap. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78227992/452772417/-593472309?refcode=20240201_Courier_EM_MissedJanuaryGoal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWI3ODlkMDUtNGRjMS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aOAOilkJgidw99j4kOm4XWOw2KqFqoOwCLf7dyv58Vo=)**
To read more about COURIER’s role in preventing misinformation and providing free, factual news in battleground states, read our email from yesterday below.

Thank you so much,
— COURIER
* * *
Peter,
In a moment, we’ll explain why tonight is no ordinary fundraising deadline, but before we do, [_**we’re humbly asking for a contribution of any amount before midnight tonight. It’s our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2024, and we urgently need to start this year on the right foot. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78227993/452772418/-593472309?refcode=20240201_Courier_EM_MissedJanuaryGoal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWI3ODlkMDUtNGRjMS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aOAOilkJgidw99j4kOm4XWOw2KqFqoOwCLf7dyv58Vo=)
2024 is no ordinary election year – just think about everything that’s happened already in the first month:
After big wins in Iowa and New Hampshire, Donald Trump (a former President facing 91 criminal charges) has all but locked up the nomination. Incredibly, the entirety of the Republican Party, Fox News, and the rest of the right-wing propaganda machine are rallying behind him.
After having almost a decade to figure it out, mainstream media outlets are still struggling with how to cover Trump without helping him spread hate and misinformation.
The reality is that **Donald Trump is a fascist demagogue who has openly broadcasted his desire to initiate a “retribution tour” should he retake the White House. **
There’s no “both sides” way to cover that – only the truth.
At COURIER, our ten battleground state newsrooms aren’t afraid to tell that truth in the communities that need to hear it most. Unlike mainstream media, we put our belief in rigorous, fact-based journalism first. We don’t spread hate, and we don’t chase profits.
Simply put, Peter **COURIER was born for this moment. **
We’re ready to take on frauds like Donald Trump, but to do that, COURIER needs resources to keep our newsrooms running and our content freely available in the online spaces where right-wing misinformation spreads.
So what do you say? [_**Can we count on you to pitch in what you can so we can hit our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year? **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78227994/452772419/-593472309?refcode=20240201_Courier_EM_MissedJanuaryGoal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWI3ODlkMDUtNGRjMS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aOAOilkJgidw99j4kOm4XWOw2KqFqoOwCLf7dyv58Vo=)

subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9b75421f97004ca79334e221442f2464&_e=cZB86YdcOazbcJ92FK_7JH0Y0Lfp17RxFFQQSHtGEtqo-0Zq_8SxX93DsEfGxPXIIjVVQltlr8sbEFmgBTy4QcrSE5VC7MzHYduKlSFc0HSoHbqR4nAXAR44s_OLq2NudPgpx6EhKiE6CLJ1Bo4imPb_2jQQBOeeZzT8ujFFnNzPswLT8SrMSaj8A2Jp_KevblUnnhh3wd68vqZehYqkNZrpxBl0gmraAp3mZuDFE7TCXsN8IIMnz5Fhf8fFPFqdYyiMLWDxnDHQeDsHQH_a0SJT3rcHOdjb1pwnaN6fBe5Yzc2edjJ_8xMfzcFDRWnNUdr-ppG5XPqihz79EzBT5Hw42D5vWxfDkM71p2Y9LwYI26iTJhEmXuljPOTarchu7rLMb7HRMTNgOKwL_CBBGZYpLZQoJ8G7ve4Pj-nhV3ADvRNAcFUr3MwlxPqvR9oecaOJwyNMUcYSSsGJtp9AS7sqXwPaNyLmM5cYwwJTKko%3D)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9b75421f97004ca79334e221442f2464&_e=cZB86YdcOazbcJ92FK_7JH0Y0Lfp17RxFFQQSHtGEtqo-0Zq_8SxX93DsEfGxPXIIjVVQltlr8sbEFmgBTy4QcrSE5VC7MzHYduKlSFc0HSoHbqR4nAXAR44s_OLq2NudPgpx6EhKiE6CLJ1Bo4imPb_2jQQBOeeZzT8ujFFnNzPswLT8SrMSaj8A2Jp_KevblUnnhh3wd68vqZehYqkNZrpxBl0gmraAp3mZuDFE7TCXsN8IIMnz5Fhf8fFPFqdYyiMLWDxnDHQeDsHQH_a0SJT3rcHOdjb1pwnaN6fBe5Yzc2edjJ_8xMfzcFDRWnNUdr-ppG5XPqihz79EzBT5Mz-vRjQZhgjmZCWSoI--QSsqZ2xgiKQedNLW84HdIdu7AsE5a0IUE8XzJhBOp5joK3cBN9BwfRn-NqmR2MZEBzj23TZbawLeiOWIrt9wQrGRz9hOKYhtgCBpvLqYnaIxGwTV1c06kqWU3d96N8iG34%3D)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9b75421f97004ca79334e221442f2464&_e=cZB86YdcOazbcJ92FK_7JH0Y0Lfp17RxFFQQSHtGEtqo-0Zq_8SxX93DsEfGxPXIIjVVQltlr8sbEFmgBTy4QcrSE5VC7MzHYduKlSFc0HSoHbqR4nAXAR44s_OLq2NudPgpx6EhKiE6CLJ1Bo4imPb_2jQQBOeeZzT8ujFFnNzPswLT8SrMSaj8A2Jp_KevblUnnhh3wd68vqZehYqkNZrpxBl0gmraAp3mZuDFE7TCXsN8IIMnz5Fhf8fFPFqdYyiMLWDxnDHQeDsHQH_a0SJT3rcHOdjb1pwnaN6fBe5Yzc2edjJ_8xMfzcFDRWnNUdr-ppG5XPqihz79EzBT5CbEyAxK73Pwwrp34s_5eVBLy7d2da6kFTJION30N7U3SPz9P5AAIKFrOrdfPVLMbV_Z-qfzH79jPvo3VKy5ASlyndR_4359ma9HGpnHpje4JLdpOiBu9_b0wGO87o7Bt7e8_6rRMj03EBWoc02oAGs%3D)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9b75421f97004ca79334e221442f2464&_e=cZB86YdcOazbcJ92FK_7JH0Y0Lfp17RxFFQQSHtGEtqo-0Zq_8SxX93DsEfGxPXIIjVVQltlr8sbEFmgBTy4QcrSE5VC7MzHYduKlSFc0HSoHbqR4nAXAR44s_OLq2NudPgpx6EhKiE6CLJ1Bo4imPb_2jQQBOeeZzT8ujFFnNzPswLT8SrMSaj8A2Jp_KevblUnnhh3wd68vqZehYqkNZrpxBl0gmraAp3mZuDFE7TCXsN8IIMnz5Fhf8fFPFqdYyiMLWDxnDHQeDsHQH_a0SJT3rcHOdjb1pwnaN6fBe5Yzc2edjJ_8xMfzcFDRWnNUdr-ppG5XPqihz79EzBT5FQIOXLS3mWVyhi5nOUdO4bxp4bCN85ght5D6GtaqNZxh-cEdXl-nmEeX005FxpoEiiVaDD8ygrMkq4WyZM5lzl4kwHzzbqgDg7tchhgoG6tWHoIXGg2r2vE0Ky-1_3A4ISJ6IgeGaQPDeAx8qTL-4A%3D)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee

clean_body: My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election | | | | | | Friend, I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress. My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Del. Jazz Lewis
subject: Honoring Black History Month: A Celebration of Resilience and Contribution
body:
Dear Friends and Fellow Marylanders,

As we step into February, we mark the beginning of Black History Month, a time dedicated to recognizing and celebrating the profound contributions, achievements, and resilience of African Americans and people of the Black diaspora in the United States. This month serves as a reminder for us to reflect on the rich tapestry of stories, struggles, and triumphs that have significantly shaped our nation's history and continue to influence our society today.

Maryland, in particular, holds a unique place in the annals of African American history, having been the birthplace of monumental figures such as Harriet Tubman, Frederick Douglass, and Thurgood Marshall. Each of these individuals not only left an indelible mark on our state but also on the entire nation, championing the causes of freedom, equality, and justice.

Even today, the state of Maryland is leading in addressing racial equity, through having the wealthiest predominantly black county in the nation in Prince George's County, our first and only in the nation black governor in Wes Moore, our Speaker Adrienne Jones, Attorney General Anthony Brown, and Treasurer Derek Davis, and the largest legislative black Caucus in the country, led by my good friend Del. Jheanelle Wilkins.

As we commemorate Black History Month, let us not only celebrate these remarkable individuals but also make a concerted effort to recognize and honor the countless African Americans and Black diaspora people whose contributions have often gone unrecognized. Let us commit to learning more about their stories, understanding the challenges they have faced, and acknowledging their role in building and shaping our nation.

This month, I encourage each of you to take part in local events, educational programs, and discussions that highlight the significance of Black history and culture. Together, let us reflect on our collective past, consider our present, and work towards a future where the contributions of all Americans are valued and celebrated.

In solidarity and with respect,

Jazz Lewis

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip of the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife and two kids.
By AUthority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

clean_body: | | Peter — Brian will never compromise on keeping our communities safe from gun violence. But Brian’s primary opponent, Julie Johnson, already has. Called a “gun industry hack” by Brady PAC, one of the nation’s leading anti-gun violence organizations, Julie Johnson has shown she’s willing to cave when faced with the choice to keep our communities safe. Here are the facts: Julie Johnson voted with the NRA six times to weaken TX gun laws. She helped Republicans pass a law that lets Attorney General Ken Paxton sue local leaders trying to protect their communities from gun violence. No matter how Johnson tries to spin it or how hard she tries to outright deny her record – it speaks for itself. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- As a trauma surgeon, Brian has pronounced too many children dead due to gun violence. He sat across from grieving families and told them they'd never see their loved ones again. He operated on seven officers shot in action and lost three during surgery. He’s lost members of his own family to this epidemic. Brian is no stranger to the toll gun violence has on our communities. Solving gun violence isn’t a political talking point for Brian; it’s a deeply personal commitment. While Julie Johnson votes with the gun lobby when convenient, Brian will be relentless in the fight to take down the NRA and pass common-sense reform. = Thank you, Team Williams = = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. subject: THANK YOU!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter,
It’s officially an election year — and starting 2024 off right is critical for our campaign.
We set a big fundraising goal for January, and because of your grassroots support, we passed it. So we wanted to say: THANK YOU!
We know that this work is just getting started. Juan Ciscomani and his Republican donors will pour millions into this district. They’re determined to ban abortion nationwide, and that means they need to keep control of the House.
Our people-powered campaign lost by just one percentage point in 2022. This November, we can win.
Thank you for being part of this fight with us. Together, we can make a difference for Arizona.
Onwards,
Team Engel

Friend, there's some things that no matter how real they are and how much you see them, they are just too difficult to believe.

That’s how I feel watching Joe Biden’s DOJ in action.

How could this be?

How could the agency that I was so excited to serve in transform into something so backwards and broken?

I joined the FBI in my 20’s — and to say I was bright-eyed and bushy-tailed would be the understatement of the year.

I couldn’t wait to get to work — to serve and protect.

But when I see today’s FBI, I can’t help but ask: Who is it serving? And what is it protecting?

Violent crime is on the rise all over the nation, criminals are getting off scot-free, lawlessness is all but encouraged from the highest levels and parents at school board meetings are being targeted.
**[But Friend, I can’t just sit back and watch as the FBI — and the nation — go to hell in a handbasket. And I believe that damage may have been done, but we are not yet to the point of no return.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=aa26029384334775bd1f905f77185a0a&_e=eacRMrAJJLUoUsoFb5j0LyBx8DA7wqwXx08tqgoMT-T_wuqM9KUEmLe03u6ICcoZkoV3OWDQ5fpELxEjzFFtrwDPSa4trT347yzV2uq-4wnkpg2WShGfXS22xJn0fzStQ1r2keXozUn7lXaxdRcwsxMfCZYY5ury3LkJkbuQIUo2I9oR_sVhfaaHX5icOw6ixKniS44XysooQbre9CAO827tPmYqcuvjXYP8qYC3P_iWIwvkBdyrn4HNpB6Nbet7ZW-oFbAXTs0Vhv_E1-7vvcX1RgcsB4Mqu5GUUlPjjq1ozXXRlFVQRnbPxGW_iBMeTmquBPixJJqEXRpnhg4IExsUyWD3iepkWeVp2vndAppUVpmY6zc3zb-PZ8sAfH2Ae_izk3lcVzvA4zkxQ7LcAkH6UIa7rea2qNUEFXtRd8dKfeKG6jPTBGPScNfUQmZk) ** I’m running for the United States Senate because I was raised that if you notice a problem, then you propose a solution.

And that’s just what I’m doing.

Our country might be bent, but she is not broken.

When I get to the Senate, I’ll get to work on DAY ONE to get America back on track. Here’s how we start:
1\. We have to hold unelected bureaucrats accountable for the destruction they’ve caused. **[Whether it’s Alejandro Mayorkas or Christopher Wray, one-by-one we need to line them all up and hand them their pink slips. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=aa26029384334775bd1f905f77185a0a&_e=eacRMrAJJLUoUsoFb5j0LyBx8DA7wqwXx08tqgoMT-T_wuqM9KUEmLe03u6ICcoZkoV3OWDQ5fpELxEjzFFtrwDPSa4trT347yzV2uq-4wnkpg2WShGfXS22xJn0fzStQ1r2keXozUn7lXaxdRcwsxMfCZYY5ury3LkJkbuQIUo2I9oR_sVhfaaHX5icOw6ixKniS44XysooQbre9CAO827tPmYqcuvjXYP8qYC3P_iWIwvkBdyrn4HNpB6Nbet7ZW-oFbAXTs0Vhv_E1-7vvcX1RgcsB4Mqu5GUUlPjjq1LRHE3oPZF79tj1Eef5Tq4LXcRO1PZSzvi37HX66ifwaNizow74IV2Q0_Ut1v3GDTUKjiUFpLkQK-hljQYCHLJk9gg2JBFluINmKfA6rQC1DmuHEeCtKoFgnZR_Y1OWnyRQ3GIxLeeEVewj0LJF2-m)** 2\. A nation isn’t a nation without a border — AND A SECURE ONE AT THAT! Violent crime, human trafficking, a deadly flow of drugs, they can all be traced back to one place: Joe Biden’s wide-open Southern Border. **[When I’m in the Senate, we’re securing the border and we’re upholding our laws.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=aa26029384334775bd1f905f77185a0a&_e=eacRMrAJJLUoUsoFb5j0LyBx8DA7wqwXx08tqgoMT-T_wuqM9KUEmLe03u6ICcoZkoV3OWDQ5fpELxEjzFFtrwDPSa4trT347yzV2uq-4wnkpg2WShGfXS22xJn0fzStQ1r2keXozUn7lXaxdRcwsxMfCZYY5ury3LkJkbuQIUo2I9oR_sVhfaaHX5icOw6ixKniS44XysooQbre9CAO827tPmYqcuvjXYP8qYC3P_iWIwvkBdyrn4HNpB6Nbet7ZW-oFbAXTs0Vhv_E1-7vvcX1RgcsB4Mqu5GUUlPjjq3WmG7qK7DKOVP8YoukR8jSCusO2NsLsmmqIry5CkCCkJ6orMxMWrF7WqbLsYw0-k1XX1O1JgT5-JgKEXtjuLy7-sA4N6sLCgYSe1Iq6uOqorytmT0bAfLCOIqPCEefDw3Yyx4vh0ziJ2smK27LAZ7R)** 3\. Fire Joe Biden and re-elect President Trump. You read that right — we can’t stop at flipping the Senate. We need to take back the White House too. **[And once we do, we need proven conservative fighters in the Senate who will stand beside President Trump and enact the America First Agenda. I’m the man for that job. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=aa26029384334775bd1f905f77185a0a&_e=eacRMrAJJLUoUsoFb5j0LyBx8DA7wqwXx08tqgoMT-T_wuqM9KUEmLe03u6ICcoZkoV3OWDQ5fpELxEjzFFtrwDPSa4trT347yzV2uq-4wnkpg2WShGfXS22xJn0fzStQ1r2keXozUn7lXaxdRcwsxMfCZYY5ury3LkJkbuQIUo2I9oR_sVhfaaHX5icOw6ixKniS44XysooQbre9CAO827tPmYqcuvjXYP8qYC3P_iWIwvkBdyrn4HNpB6Nbet7ZW-oFbAXTs0Vhv_E1-7vvcX1RgcsB4Mqu5GUUlPjjq0LyF7lWzGgTpzoeYukb9OnIGwQ2JjtR825pBU9SiEnHdtD2zwCS95me0NvCzWzXQ-BVysCAdWlupQ_zrsVbIX-PKBjohmZYbwQGdsSAwuv_5RqWw66c3PzT7P7CL4P1F67F9Bpp8hqUnoSmgHpUSJh)** We can't put the cart before the horse though, because there is still a long way to go until the elections in November — and the key to pulling off a big win is maintaining the momentum.

We have to work day-in and day-out educating the American public about our conservative agenda, and doing the work to prove that they have better options than Joe Biden and candidates hand-picked by Chuck Schumer.

And to do that, I’ll need your help.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lexi?=
subject: Playbook to Beat Trump in 2024
body:
What Biden and the Democratic Party can learn from a fundamental advertising premise. | | | | |
---
Friends:
This week’s conversation on people, planet, & democracy contains a playbook for Biden to beat Trump in 2024 (and for Democrats, Independents and Moderate Republicans to beat MAGA in the House and the Senate). It is based on my belief that Trump will be the Republican nominee and we should not be shocked by that. We should learn from it and update our moves accordingly.
Read:
[The “But Look at All We’ve Done” Dance Will **Not** Win Against Trump in 2024 ](https://lexireese.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=833a984b31aaa09af9ff0ffae&id=f91d621588&e=0f9388ee95)
As always, comments welcome and please share with others who like to think about going all out for a brighter future.
Stay tuned for next week’s post about Silicon Valley billionaires’ emergent, idiosyncratic and (I believe) dangerous political ideology.
Lexi

| [Subscribe](https://lexireese.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=833a984b31aaa09af9ff0ffae&id=fe4090a8df&e=0f9388ee95)

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Black History is American History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78229511/452777702/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg1YzE4ODQtNTFjMS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-guHw-VYF-G14Ak-kdw_J0xHULX4687_FTGnjkz7V38=)
---
Folks,

As we kick off February, I want to recognize the beginning of **Black History Month** —a time to honor and uplift the voices of those who have shaped our nation's history, culture, and character.

**This month, let us listen to the stories that are too often left untold. And let us recommit ourselves to a more just and equitable society by honoring the efforts and achievements of generations of Black Americans.**

**Let us also remember that Black history is American history.** This month and all year round, we must uplift the voices that are woven into the very fabric of our nation that make a difference in our communities every day.

As we celebrate Black Americans’ innumerable contributions to our nation, we will continue the hard work toward healing, equality, and justice – this day and every day.

Wishing you a meaningful and joyous Black History Month.

Sincerely,

Dr. Raul Ruiz
| | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202
www.drraulruiz.com/

clean_body: | = Folks, As we kick off February, I want to recognize the beginning of Black History Month —a time to honor and uplift the voices of those who have shaped our nation's history, culture, and character. This month, let us listen to the stories that are too often left untold. And let us recommit ourselves to a more just and equitable society by honoring the efforts and achievements of generations of Black Americans. Let us also remember that Black history is American history. This month and all year round, we must uplift the voices that are woven into the very fabric of our nation that make a difference in our communities every day. As we celebrate Black Americans’ innumerable contributions to our nation, we will continue the hard work toward healing, equality, and justice – this day and every day. Wishing you a meaningful and joyous Black History Month. Sincerely, Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 www.drraulruiz.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. **But despite the Court’s ruling, Greg Abbott has blocked federal immigration authorities from doing their jobs and has refused to follow the law.**

Friend, we're officially in the full swing of the election year. And I'm _all in_ to protect my battleground seat in Nevada so I can keep up the fight for affordable health care, reproductive freedom, and the issues that matter most to working families. **But I need people like _you_ by my side to win.**
Here's why: _CNN_ ranks me as the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, which is why Mitch McConnell has personally recruited a far-right Republican to defeat me. And polling already shows me locked in dead heat with my GOP opponent – in the race that will likely decide Senate control.
**If I'm going to fight back and defeat the GOP here in Nevada, it's critical that we show the full strength of this grassroots team right from the start. That's why I have a personal request for you, friend:**
**[I'm looking for 100,000 people to step up and become Election Year Founding Donors by midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to be one of them. Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78230027/452778951/-1853236879?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3413-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE4Njc5OS01M2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5Zv7VcYVkYAmCinpsHYAqCNJ5pGpbpSHkZ5cwiX2js=)**

Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. Privacy Policy

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Kari Lake’s QAnon Fundraiser
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We just learned that Kari Lake is going to have a fundraiser with two avowed QAnon supporters tonight. These two are so extreme that even Mike Pence canceled a fundraiser with them.
#

Hey there, Peter. It’s Ruben.
Wanted to reach out and thank you for putting up with a ton of emails over the past few days. We hit our goals late last night, and it isn’t lost on me that we would not have come anywhere close without you.
So really, thanks.
We’re going to give you a much needed break from hearing from me for the first few days of the month, but to do that we need to start February strong.
And it’s important we do, because we just learned that Kari Lake is going to have a fundraiser with two avowed QAnon supporters tonight. These two are so extreme that even Mike Pence canceled a fundraiser with them.
Whatever she raises with those nutjobs, we’ve got to beat it. So I’m asking you to chip in $5 today. I’m asking because we can’t let Kari Lake get the edge on us, and we definitely can't let somebody that praises election deniers and takes donations from QAnon fanatics get anywhere close to the Senate.
I know we just came off a big push, but this is important. So please:
[**Can you make an $5 donation to tell Kari Lake she’ll never step foot on the Senate floor? QAnon is a dangerous conspiracy theory group, and anyone associating with them should never serve in elected office.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240201-1-30&t=1&akid=1921%2E734936%2EFUi4ZO)**
[STOP KARI LAKE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240201-1-30&t=2&akid=1921%2E734936%2EFUi4ZO)
Thank you,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=1921%2E734936%2EFUi4ZO). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1921%2E734936%2EFUi4ZO). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1921_734936_FUi4ZO&akid=1921%2E734936%2EFUi4ZO)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Exciting news regarding the Michigan Republican Party
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/exciting-news-regarding-the-michigan-republican-party?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Fellow Republicans,

Last week, we announced the MIGOP District Convention would be held at Huntington Plaice in Detroit on March 2, 2024. The theme for this year’s convention is “**One Party. One Purpose.**” That purpose is simple... **WIN MORE ELECTIONS IN 2024!** Approximately 2,000 Precinct Delegates and 2,000 alternates will come together to select representatives from each district to go to the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, WI, where they will vote on the Republican nominee for president and RNC Committeeman and Committeewoman elections.

During the MIGOP District Convention, we will also pledge to unleash and fortify Michigan’s middle class and put hard-working Michiganders back in charge of their government. This pledge signifies the Michigan Republican Party’s commitment to create legislation to incentivize growth within our working middle-class communities and protect small business owners from draconian-like regulations that democrats try to force on them.

To fulfill our pledge, we ask that you donate to the Michigan Republican Party Fund. We will use your donations to:
* Invest in programs that focus on Citizen Education.
* Purchase and utilize innovative tools to grow our Party and recruit volunteers.
* Make critical data purchases to ensure accurate metrics for voter outreach and election integrity efforts.
* Invest in talented people who will help usher the Michigan Republican Party into a new era of innovation.
* Fund Election Security operations that center around voter roll clean up, FOIA requests, and proactive legal efforts.

#
The Michigan Republican Party is thrilled with the growing momentum to win more elections in 2024 and beyond.

Please use this link to make your donation:

[https://secure.anedot.com/michigan-republican-party/general-fund](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=3dfe653fe2&e=a2af77507c)

In Liberty,

_Kristina Karamo_
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party

---
| | | | | | [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=836e579855&e=a2af77507c)

3450 Alpine Ave. NW
Box 206
Grand Rapids, MI 49544

You can [update your preferences](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=dbd5f57381) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&t=b&e=a2af77507c&c=dbd5f57381).

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Rise of the Independents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
A record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.”

|
---
| | | **A record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.”
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indepen_1_28_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
A recent Gallup poll found that a record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.”
Compared to the 25% of Americans who identify with the Republican Party, and 25% who identify with the Democrat Party, _those who identify as Independent make up the largest swath of voters in the country today._
That Independents represent 49% of the country is a political earthquake to the East Coast Elites and the Uniparty Establishment in Washington.
_They know this is the first time in history that so many Americans identify as Independent_.
They know that Democrats and Republicans and their candidates face rejection at the polls in November.
The elites know that millions of Americans are fed up with the same-old, same-old politics as usual—the backroom deal-making, the collusion, the corruption, the cover-ups, the scandals, and the special interests.
And the majority of voters do not want a rematch between Biden or Trump—a match between the “lesser of two evils.”
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indepen_1_28_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
We agree with the majority of Americans. And we know Americans deserve better.
The national U.S. presidential election should be about which candidate can earn the trust of his or her citizens, unite opposing sides, and heal a deeply divided nation.
Which candidate can voters trust to do the right thing at the right time? Which candidate will deliver Americans truth and transparency and be deemed trustworthy enough to earn their vote—even if they sometimes disagree with that candidate?
We believe Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is that candidate, and we are deeply humbled to have earned your support.
In our ongoing effort to turn the ship of state around and give Independents a voice in 2024, [please consider supporting Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for President with a gift of $5, $10, even $15 or more, ensuring a powerful start to February](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indepen_1_28_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3).
Your contribution will propel this independent campaign into the mainstream news cycle, onto the debate stage, on your state ballot, and into the White House in 2025.
[Perhaps you are in a position to give $5, $10, $15, or even $24 a month to help us in our historic effort.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indepen_1_28_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4) Any amount is a godsend and greatly appreciated!
Thank you.
Team Kennedy

clean_body: A record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.” | | | | A record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.” | Dear Peter, A recent Gallup poll found that a record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.” Compared to the 25% of Americans who identify with the Republican Party, and 25% who identify with the Democrat Party, those who identify as Independent make up the largest swath of voters in the country today. That Independents represent 49% of the country is a political earthquake to the East Coast Elites and the Uniparty Establishment in Washington. They know this is the first time in history that so many Americans identify as Independent. They know that Democrats and Republicans and their candidates face rejection at the polls in November. The elites know that millions of Americans are fed up with the same-old, same-old politics as usual—the backroom deal-making, the collusion, the corruption, the cover-ups, the scandals, and the special interests. And the majority of voters do not want a rematch between Biden or Trump—a match between the “lesser of two evils.” We agree with the majority of Americans. And we know Americans deserve better. The national U.S. presidential election should be about which candidate can earn the trust of his or her citizens, unite opposing sides, and heal a deeply divided nation. Which candidate can voters trust to do the right thing at the right time? Which candidate will deliver Americans truth and transparency and be deemed trustworthy enough to earn their vote—even if they sometimes disagree with that candidate? We believe Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is that candidate, and we are deeply humbled to have earned your support. In our ongoing effort to turn the ship of state around and give Independents a voice in 2024, . Your contribution will propel this independent campaign into the mainstream news cycle, onto the debate stage, on your state ballot, and into the White House in 2025. Any amount is a godsend and greatly appreciated! Thank you. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections in the next few months. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2024 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

name: EVENT ALERT @ Our Revolution
subject: INVITE: Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, Ayanna Pressley at our California GOTV Kick Off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14310?source=email-20240201&t=1011&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ]RSVP

Peter Willis, you’re
invited!

This Monday marks the start of early voting in California, and you won’t
want to miss Our Revolution’s LIVE California GOTV Kick Off Call with U.S.
Reps. Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, and Ayanna Pressley, and progressive
activists around the country!

Not only are we backing Barbara Lee for the U.S. Senate seat in
California, Our Revolution is working to elect powerhouse progressive
slates across the state with candidates for Congress, critical state and
local offices, and Democratic committee seats to help transform the party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14310?source=email-20240201&t=1012&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ]It’s time to mobilize! RSVP now and we’ll send you a Zoom link to join
this exciting event starting at 6:30 pm PT/9:30 ET on Monday!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14310?source=email-20240201&t=1013&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14310?source=email-20240201&t=1014&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ]RSVP

At this live virtual event, you’ll hear all about what’s at stake in these
exciting races and how we can grow progressive power in California and
beyond.

From Sacramento to San Francisco, Alameda to Contra Costa County, we’re
activating our grassroots army to get out the vote and build our
inside-outside movement for real change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14310?source=email-20240201&t=1015&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ]Click here to make sure you get a reminder to tune in LIVE to Our
Revolution’s California GOTV Kick Off Call on Monday — and share it with
your friends!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20240201.zXWxO9&t=1007&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240201.slQpus&t=1008&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20240201.2N6kU_&t=1009&akid=5278%2E5885482%2ETRsOQ5 ]GIVE MONTHLY

name: Warning
subject: Magnesium: The nutritional conspiracy of the century
body:
Good news...there's a miracle that occurs when your body gets ALL the magnesium that it needs.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1TwyAQhn_NcmtmWQikBw62mTjj101nPFIgFgWTktTYf--0Vo_79ewzr81jiv3JgN4A0T76CYhA3ADR4XXJ5fie729X9lHcrQ7qKdfnKW2BaD6N4X_1SqlCtjGdu7pl3ojeo2TBcI2qoXWNyPZGYdjpECSnnfI1DyRQSc7djnpppe5ZNIQkkZCT4A2uK-mocRprLwLZ0DQg8fKnsjmU6Cyf5sWWMgy5ckNmyezneZwuYh1Qt5Sh-jy6FI7T75kbMlB3VQbqvs5V6783h4_ntQTRXVIQrXp5UFtsbWbF-HGJKcVJaZD49of5CQAA__8XEl9q)
Magnesium deficiency could be one of the greatest health conspiracies in history...

First, let's be clear: magnesium is THE single most studied mineral in existence.

It powers over 300 critical, life-saving reactions in your body. ([including dozens of shockers mentioned here](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1OwzAQhJ_GuTVar39z8AGoggSCO0fH3iYGu0mdRFXfHrVCXGc-zTe-LDmdbo6ZZ4Y4pbgyRCaeGOLl61rq_l3eXw_-Q7wdLvqzqHuLLwxxuy30j_6ttFR8yvfUHJvoxCmCbMhxA9pipwCayamolATdDYQDaUTsSAbBpQHJSWvbJIeAEhA4Cm6ha2VAGwyoKAg9WcskPDytL1RT8Hzdrr7WeS5tmEuT3bRty_o41jPsix_PtKa9DJX8zzbVeR-nO8mwP-8hk69M9GNm4qjVYIIIJE4qapCdEnaQSpumurhcU85p1YZJGB_6MJffAAAA__8HoF67 "including dozens of shockers mentioned here"))

To date, thousands of studies have proven it to be beneficial for the heart, energy, metabolism, immunity, sleep, pain, and more.

The only two-time Nobel Prize winner, Linus Pauling, recommended daily supplementation of magnesium (at least 350mg per day).

So do over 100,000 courageous doctors--including top MDs from Harvard.

**BUT THERE 'S A PROBLEM... **

While modern agriculture has stripped our soil and diet of magnesium (and up to 80% of the population is deficient)...

The food and nutritional supplement industries have fed us "magnesium" that **DOESN 'T FIX THE PROBLEM** -- because:

1. Most fortified foods/products use SYNTHETIC (chemical-made), low-grade magnesium the body can't absorb... AND...

2. Most ONLY CONTAIN 1-3 forms of magnesium (at best); when the reality is your body needs ALL 7 FORMS OF MAGNESIUM

Given how much magnesium helps with stress, sleep, heart health, energy and more...

_It 's easily one of the most dangerous health hoaxes ever._

THE GOOD NEWS: **there's a miracle that occurs when your body gets ALL the magnesium that it needs,** in all the forms that it needs, at the optimal dosage.

Just remember -- if you're *only* taking one form of magnesium -- **YOU ARE STILL DEFICIENT**!

===>> **[Why Getting ALL 7 FORMS Of Magnesium Lowers Stress, Fixes Sleep, and Boosts Healthy Metabolism](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1OwzAQhJ_GuTVar39z8AGoggSCO0fH3iYGu0mdRFXfHrVCXGc-zTe-LDmdbo6ZZ4Y4pbgyRCaeGOLl61rq_l3eXw_-Q7wdLvqzqHuLLwxxuy30j_6ttFR8yvfUHJvoxCmCbMhxA9pipwCayamolATdDYQDaUTsSAbBpQHJSWvbJIeAEhA4Cm6ha2VAGwyoKAg9WcskPDytL1RT8Hzdrr7WeS5tmEuT3bRty_o41jPsix_PtKa9DJX8zzbVeR-nO8mwP-8hk69M9GNm4qjVYIIIJE4qapCdEnaQSpumurhcU85p1YZJGB_6MJffAAAA__8HoF67 "Why Getting ALL 7 FORMS Of Magnesium Lowers Stress, Fixes Sleep, and Boosts Healthy Metabolism ")**

Enjoy!

name: Padora HQ
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
February is Black History Month. We celebrate because, for too long the role of Black Americans in our country’s long and painful history has been ignored, belittled, or distorted. But we cannot forget the history and contributions of generations of folks who have made this country what it is today.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=3be1ea96e3dc41f79fc606baf50cc6e9&_e=ASh-rS09jr6oOv3gjUNVq0zxJWFvv-3oA4_Ft2aVJRlQH2hY0MS18Q-yxeuJsJD6w-g1vOM1El_MRqUT1zBTEi89t0RRpIjD5RNA2q9uyu-u2XOg5RbOp5PRcjJ5pSkx1iadTVfPCIuKEabTTCLokWW0A-uHwvYF11CmxRHo4tksjzz7KOLbIj6F1nV8ZuKWISeM3aOYIE7YVvKCR036qQ%3D%3D) February is Black History Month. We celebrate because, for too long the role of Black Americans in our country’s long and painful history has been ignored, belittled, or distorted. But we cannot forget the history and contributions of generations of folks who have made this country what it is today. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=3be1ea96e3dc41f79fc606baf50cc6e9&_e=ASh-rS09jr6oOv3gjUNVq0zxJWFvv-3oA4_Ft2aVJRlQH2hY0MS18Q-yxeuJsJD6a6I9NINRy8UjKyDMq_IrPGISb5iEdhC5lCEmeP4n9jxzwYGyImGWoHg7huKVSwacrjnUnRCKFwHTiCtfoLPAQeH1zEFC4hoBhQvvzAKLxTAY-T6cqgF7Rn7RxtaOybFgTvT7QE2DP41PMoy8qcHFaQ%3D%3D) While there are a dozen names that come to mind when we think of Black American history – Martin Luther King Jr., Harriett Tubman, Rosa Parks, Maya Angelou, Barack Obama – there are countless other Black Americans who have significantly contributed to Black liberation, the foundations of American democracy, community building, politics, and every sect of cultural growth. At a time when history and education, particularly relating to Black Americans, are being rolled back and distorted, it’s more important than ever that we acknowledge and celebrate Black History Month. Our shared history is what makes this country special, and we cannot grow as a country if we do not come together and collectively decide to move forward. We hope that you will take time today to reflect on the importance of Black History Month, and we at Team Padora wish you a happy and healthy day. Best, Padora HQ Paid for by Padora for Colorado

body:

Peter we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this important mail from Mark.

SIGN ON: TELL CONGRESS TO PASS THIS BILL [https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240201_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Peter, leaders like Senator Jon Ossoff and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez have been calling for a ban on members of Congress for being allowed to trade stock.
Why? Because they are given timely information about industries, updates from agencies, and much more before the average person, giving them the advantage to make decisions that lead to profit.
And now that there are a few Republicans on board with Democrats, we have a real chance to get this bill through.
That’s why we’re calling on 10,000 supporters to sign our petition to tell Congress to ban congressional stock trading! [https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240201_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
SIGN ON: TELL CONGRESS TO PASS THIS BILL [https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240201_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Thank you in advance for signing on!
– DR

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78231904/452785344/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.01_b1_sakvts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjg4YjM5OC01YWMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_E8jFXGSDxH5lhKCCgGCnTVQefdGhAdsRGGEuC1tJk=)

**[So with this election looking like a 2022 rematch, we’re setting a rapid response goal of raising $7,000 before Friday night. name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Thanks for getting 2024 started right!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
February is here and there is a lot we can do! |
---

| | | | Thank you to everyone who has made the effort to support our campaign this year. From volunteers making phone calls, writing postcards, and knocking on doors, to those contributing before our end-of-January fundraising deadline, it’s been a strong start for 2024! Thank you. Now, it’s February. Here, February means Rodeo and early voting! The Texas primary is about four weeks away, and the deadline for registering to vote in the primary is next Monday, February 5! [_**If you know someone in Texas who needs to register, you can find information about how to register before the deadline here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78231980/452785681/2026188535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGZkOThmYi01YWMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S61v5i2RMMHxspHdN2LOIoNbPRFzOAbmFmwaDjlkBWY=&emci=fbdd0a98-27c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=b4fd98fb-5ac1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=30230943) | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78231981/452785682/2026188535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGZkOThmYi01YWMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S61v5i2RMMHxspHdN2LOIoNbPRFzOAbmFmwaDjlkBWY=&emci=fbdd0a98-27c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=b4fd98fb-5ac1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=30230943)

With early voting starting mid-month, we are doing all we can to talk to voters. Our next Day of Action is this Saturday, February 3, starting at 9 a.m. [_**Sign up here to join us as we knock on doors, write postcards, make calls, and help our neighbors make plans to cast their ballots.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78231983/452785684/-14779768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGZkOThmYi01YWMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S61v5i2RMMHxspHdN2LOIoNbPRFzOAbmFmwaDjlkBWY=&emci=fbdd0a98-27c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=b4fd98fb-5ac1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=30230943)

These elections are as important as any we’ve had. The stakes are high, and we all need to show up in every way we can. All of the support adds up—whether joining in our days of action, contributing funds, planting a yard sign, or putting our new 2024 bumper sticker on your car!
We are on a mission to mobilize voters in #TX07 in this year’s elections, and the first one is almost here. We couldn’t do what we need to do without you. Thank you!
Together, we can do anything,

clean_body: February is here and there is a lot we can do! | | | | | Thank you to everyone who has made the effort to support our campaign this year. From volunteers making phone calls, writing postcards, and knocking on doors, to those contributing before our end-of-January fundraising deadline, it’s been a strong start for 2024! Thank you. Now, it’s February. Here, February means Rodeo and early voting! The Texas primary is about four weeks away, and the deadline for registering to vote in the primary is next Monday, February 5! | | | | With early voting starting mid-month, we are doing all we can to talk to voters. Our next Day of Action is this Saturday, February 3, starting at 9 a.m. | = These elections are as important as any we’ve had. The stakes are high, and we all need to show up in every way we can. All of the support adds up—whether joining in our days of action, contributing funds, planting a yard sign, or putting our new 2024 bumper sticker on your car! We are on a mission to mobilize voters in #TX07 in this year’s elections, and the first one is almost here. We couldn’t do what we need to do without you. Thank you! Team Rick’s very own Tim Potts recently appeared in the Harrisburg Patriot to discuss Rick’s candidacy. Take a look at what he had to say:

* * *

_“When 10th District MAGA Rep. Scott Perry is not committing treason, he’s studying the field of Democrats in the race to replace him. No doubt he has a dream opponent to run against in the fall.

Perry’s dream Democrat is someone who doesn’t live in the district, has never run for office, has never voted in a Democratic primary, has never established a Democratic base, has never won as a Democrat in a Republican district, has never served our country in uniform, has never run a small business, has no understanding of foreign relations or economics, has no experience with rural life, doesn’t have the listening and learning skills of a teacher, and has already been beaten once before.

Rick Coplen has none of those liabilities, which makes him Scott Perry’s worst nightmare. That’s exactly what makes Rick the best candidate to confront him and beat him.

Starting on January 23, 10th District Democrats can sign just one petition to put the strongest possible Democrat on the ballot in November. That’s Rick Coplen.

Don’t make Scott Perry’s dream come true. Bless him with a nightmare and sign Rick Coplen’s petition. Name recognition can be bought. Qualifications to serve our people and communities can’t.”

Timothy Potts, Carlisle, Pa._
* * *

We know that Rick is the leader PA-10 needs. He has what it takes to defeat Scott Perry, and advocate for our communities on day one in Congress.

**But we need your help to get him there. If you haven't signed Rick's petition yet, let us know. We'll help you get it done.

Reply directly to this email to let us know.**

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My police officer husband is facing ten years in prison
body:
We live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin – and the “defund the police” mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark’s reputation

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l85Rk9FVQC4iZ9Ek0jU3og~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnsmKP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1ST05XA3NwY0IKZbpwLbxlq0aZqlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l85Rk9FVQC4iZ9Ek0jU3og~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnsmKP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1ST05XA3NwY0IKZbpwLbxlq0aZqlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l85Rk9FVQC4iZ9Ek0jU3og~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnsmKP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1ST05XA3NwY0IKZbpwLbxlq0aZqlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l85Rk9FVQC4iZ9Ek0jU3og~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnsmKP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1ST05XA3NwY0IKZbpwLbxlq0aZqlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l85Rk9FVQC4iZ9Ek0jU3og~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnsmKP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1ST05XA3NwY0IKZbpwLbxlq0aZqlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l85Rk9FVQC4iZ9Ek0jU3og~~/AARclAA~/RgRnnsmKP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAxX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1ST05XA3NwY0IKZbpwLbxlq0aZqlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Restore Our Nation

_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: NextGen America
subject: Oops...our bad!
body:
Now returning to our regularly scheduled Black History Month programming!

| | **Oops! Our bad!** _**A previous version of this email misspelled Amanda Gorman's name. It has been corrected below.**_
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78232219/452786620/119682553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI3N2YxNy01ZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00AfkwPiduwDNF4GngfI0oU6e_laHJ8Ard8wxzhd3CY=&emci=9957f209-4bc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=79b77f17-5dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)
Team, from boycotting buses to demanding clean water in Michigan, Black history has always been pushed forward by the youth. This month, we’re doing more than saying empty words about how grateful we are for the history-makers who came before us. We’re amplifying the history that young Black Americans are making _right now_. Here’s our list of Black history-makers making waves in the present day. Think we missed anyone? **[Let us know about Black activists making history where you are.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78232220/452786621/-1802631748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI3N2YxNy01ZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00AfkwPiduwDNF4GngfI0oU6e_laHJ8Ard8wxzhd3CY=&emci=9957f209-4bc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=79b77f17-5dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78232221/452786622/926251607?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI3N2YxNy01ZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00AfkwPiduwDNF4GngfI0oU6e_laHJ8Ard8wxzhd3CY=&emci=9957f209-4bc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=79b77f17-5dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)** Best known to the world as Little Miss Flint, **Mari Copeny** has spent her formative years fighting to bring awareness to the water crisis in Flint, Michigan. Mari’s used her platform to bring politicians on board to solve problems that have cost people their lives. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78232222/452786623/-639832334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI3N2YxNy01ZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00AfkwPiduwDNF4GngfI0oU6e_laHJ8Ard8wxzhd3CY=&emci=9957f209-4bc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=79b77f17-5dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) **Justin Pearson** represents Tennessee’s 86th district in the Tennessee House of Representatives. He and his colleague Justin Jones were unjustly expelled from the Tennessee House just last year for participating in a protest for gun control on the House floor. Since being reinstated to the Tennessee House, Rep. Pearson has continued to fight for common sense gun control laws in Tennessee, as well as advocate for other issues like affordable housing and voting rights. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78232223/452786624/2089051021?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI3N2YxNy01ZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00AfkwPiduwDNF4GngfI0oU6e_laHJ8Ard8wxzhd3CY=&emci=9957f209-4bc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=79b77f17-5dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) **Amanda Gorman** is the youngest inaugural poet in U.S. history. Her poem _The Hill We Climb_ , which she recited at President Biden’s inauguration, calls for unity and togetherness while also celebrating her heritage as a Black woman in America. **[Want to highlight a Black activist in your area? Let us know about someone doing great work in your area today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78232224/452786625/166736720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI3N2YxNy01ZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00AfkwPiduwDNF4GngfI0oU6e_laHJ8Ard8wxzhd3CY=&emci=9957f209-4bc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=79b77f17-5dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)** | [**Uplift a Black activist →** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78232225/452786626/-1399347221?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI3N2YxNy01ZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00AfkwPiduwDNF4GngfI0oU6e_laHJ8Ard8wxzhd3CY=&emci=9957f209-4bc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=79b77f17-5dc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)

name: Sen. Sherrod Brown
subject: An honest update on this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
reaching out personally:
| | |
---
Hello, friend – it’s Sherrod.
This isn't the email I wanted to write, but I really have no other choice. Unfortunately, **a recent poll shows me neck and neck with my millionaire GOP opponents.**
